name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: Moving forward after this year’s elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate Contributions or gifts to Shaheen for Senate are not tax deductible
body:
Will you share your thoughts with me?
| | |
---
Friend, there’s no easy way to say this. 2024 was an incredibly tough year for Democrats, and next year promises to be even more challenging.
In January, Donald Trump and Republicans will take control of the White House and Congress, and we will have to do what we can to make progress wherever possible, stop them from rolling back our fundamental rights and protect the future of our democracy.
It won’t be easy, but together, we can be a check on Donald Trump and his allies and fight for the future Americans deserve. I’m ready to put in the work, but I need you with me, friend. [**That’s why I’m asking you to share your thoughts in my 60-second focus group today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99184680/519123959/-417810679?refcode=jtk3042-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDQvMS84ODk1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDQ0ZDRiMy04YWMxLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g44sMGqKbI49i-nBnmnOQJS7EvgipHEeQBrQQuM3ZBQ=&emci=b2c15f27-76bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=6444d4b3-8ac1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=858201)
| | [JOIN THE FOCUS GROUP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99184681/519123960/-417810679?refcode=jtk3042-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDQvMS84ODk1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDQ0ZDRiMy04YWMxLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g44sMGqKbI49i-nBnmnOQJS7EvgipHEeQBrQQuM3ZBQ=&emci=b2c15f27-76bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=6444d4b3-8ac1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=858201)
---
I know that, when times get tough, it can be tempting to bury our heads in the sand and try to block it all out. That’s exactly what Trump and his cronies are hoping we’ll do.
Instead, we need to do the opposite and be _more engaged than ever._ They need to know that we're far from backing down, we’re ready to fight harder than ever to defend our rights and take back control of our government in 2026.
[**Staying in communication and aligning our priorities is a big part of that, which is why I’m asking you to complete my focus group before midnight tonight. As one of my most engaged supporters, I’m counting on you to weigh in and help inform our strategies for 2025.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99184682/519123961/-417810679?refcode=jtk3042-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDQvMS84ODk1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDQ0ZDRiMy04YWMxLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g44sMGqKbI49i-nBnmnOQJS7EvgipHEeQBrQQuM3ZBQ=&emci=b2c15f27-76bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=6444d4b3-8ac1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=858201)
| | [BEGIN SURVEY NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99184683/519123962/-417810679?refcode=jtk3042-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDQvMS84ODk1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDQ0ZDRiMy04YWMxLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g44sMGqKbI49i-nBnmnOQJS7EvgipHEeQBrQQuM3ZBQ=&emci=b2c15f27-76bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=6444d4b3-8ac1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=858201)
---
Thank you,

Jeanne
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To keep up with the latest, follow us on [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99184684/519123963/-250234780?refcode=jtk3042-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDQvMS84ODk1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDQ0ZDRiMy04YWMxLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g44sMGqKbI49i-nBnmnOQJS7EvgipHEeQBrQQuM3ZBQ=&emci=b2c15f27-76bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=6444d4b3-8ac1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=858201), [Instagram](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99184685/519123964/1446375094?refcode=jtk3042-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDQvMS84ODk1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDQ0ZDRiMy04YWMxLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g44sMGqKbI49i-nBnmnOQJS7EvgipHEeQBrQQuM3ZBQ=&emci=b2c15f27-76bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=6444d4b3-8ac1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=858201) and [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99184686/519123965/1488444405?refcode=jtk3042-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDQvMS84ODk1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDQ0ZDRiMy04YWMxLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g44sMGqKbI49i-nBnmnOQJS7EvgipHEeQBrQQuM3ZBQ=&emci=b2c15f27-76bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=6444d4b3-8ac1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=858201). subject: why haven’t you signed our card?
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
closing at midnight
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22673%2E4449941%2Ecfe4gc)
---
Listen, we hand-selected you out of hundreds of thousands of our grassroots Democratic supporters...

**_...So we were BLOWN AWAY when you didn’t sign our exclusive holiday card to the Bidens!_** [**_We’re giving you one last chance to sign before we close our card at midnight »_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/58075?t=7&akid=22673%2E4449941%2Ecfe4gc) | [Sign our exclusive holiday card for President Biden and First Lady Jill Biden now! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/58075?t=8&akid=22673%2E4449941%2Ecfe4gc)
---
**TO:** President Joe and First Lady Jill Biden
**FROM:** A Grateful Democrat
**Subject:** I’M THANKFUL FOR YOU THIS HOLIDAY SEASON! Dear President Biden and First Lady Jill Biden,

This Holiday season is filled with joy, hope, and good tidings all because of your hard work and dedication to serving the American people.

**_For that, I would like to personally say THANK YOU!_** [**_Despite the relentless attacks you face from MAGA Republicans, you continue to prioritize unity, protecting our freedoms, and putting people over politics. So I’m signing this card and chipping in $7 to Fight for Reform to continue to invest in critical state and local battleground races across the nation to show that Democrats will continue to stand behind your work »_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/58075?t=9&akid=22673%2E4449941%2Ecfe4gc) | [Donate $7 to support our work now »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/58075?t=10&akid=22673%2E4449941%2Ecfe4gc)
---
**President Biden:** You led our country out of a pandemic and strengthened our economy all while passing a historic agenda – _giving the American people a light in the darkness amidst ongoing MAGA Republican chaos!_

**Dr. Biden,** you continue to set an example of what leadership looks like, confronting every challenge with dignity and grace!

And although we anticipate the challenges awaiting us in the new year, we are ready to face them head-on knowing that your empowering and unwavering leadership will help us overcome anything.
[**_Happy Holidays to you both, and THANK YOU for how you continue to show up for the American people!_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/58075?t=11&akid=22673%2E4449941%2Ecfe4gc)
**_X A Grateful Democrat_**
[Donate $7 to support our work now »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/58075?t=12&akid=22673%2E4449941%2Ecfe4gc)
---

---
| | Peter, my name is Jimmy Patronis.
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=df64e204f29d4767ada506bb2fd29914&_e=u6oihYH6rLt7ZLyBDtm_nfI5vmhu7ao5cMkEv-J5glMaPhmr7k4HmezBmBSMAmc4jg6hYsx6sVvpBwd9BITHUk9em-68OOiSQeU7VX6ZibYbHDayhpD7T0U-P-FhFsSWS6b-mTwYQ2sBtDZZZpg8ihresvH-sHW_WG7qe7rkUeDtS44V7qvAdr7CuLmY8O4SwzGatfNAcywQO7wOiIeLpBsCHvJ2waMu2cu4c8aWvFglYLbREADf-ViEbStObeKbBdu6Npg8FHVZahrCJS_irQ%3D%3D)
---
I served as Florida’s Chief Financial Officer with Ron DeSantis, and I was proud to be a part of the team that helped make our state the strongest in America. **With our House Majority razor-thin, we need to make sure Matt Gaetz’s replacement is a fierce ally of President Trump and will vote to pass his MAGA agenda. As a day one supporter of President Trump, I have decided to resign from my statewide office to run for Florida's 1st Congressional District and be a steadfast conservative voice for this country.** **[Democrats are seeing this Special Election as an opportunity to tighten the majority and ruin Trump’s plans to restore America. That’s why I need you on my team, and why I need you to fuel this fight.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=df64e204f29d4767ada506bb2fd29914&_e=u6oihYH6rLt7ZLyBDtm_nfI5vmhu7ao5cMkEv-J5glMlyxqWlLa8_dMNoyboJZtSiia30kh2QoUw3T61gfkvPzueSpTu_hfuWQRFBIUYw_MojKDM8YhOfSr4qt6889cuaw8KWVAu1b8CPI4LGybIxXRh-_OLvFDnUmPFbhSZLVuykXclCEfOY-IxpTNW1629pmjihSQ0f4vzHCTG8H1kR5BYOpkLMYe-GFN29YoDjfc5QatFa1SQtuNFt8Ars7_CQyMUFpdD7RtHvkVPn2F7Gg8fBFG1ETVYGia-qMS0zoLlUaMN1d-Rj9zY3e4y-g6mMvXoMHLHoI5GZFnOqErrXlfxbDYCtWN1G-COjZwF1qxTCIuaKVwaTJ_k0DaNpCVN)**
---
[**HELP SEND JIMMY TO CONGRESS**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=df64e204f29d4767ada506bb2fd29914&_e=u6oihYH6rLt7ZLyBDtm_nfI5vmhu7ao5cMkEv-J5glMlyxqWlLa8_dMNoyboJZtSiia30kh2QoUw3T61gfkvPzueSpTu_hfuWQRFBIUYw_MojKDM8YhOfSr4qt6889cuaw8KWVAu1b8CPI4LGybIxXRh-_OLvFDnUmPFbhSZLVuykXclCEfOY-IxpTNW1629pmjihSQ0f4vzHCTG8H1kR2ZfQZiCeGAdQ_fE_w2sbjJlGtZf9wspY2n2zPJETxt0xwLMrA5eOwAXb4WSoVtG-0zVTDeD0cKdmu5FxdrckgSk5hUK6zMlb-soJYpR7qArM90Ar64aEcgIuOQ7v8Qn0heRGyVjPb8kXNc71Oq24p5DWf1Tqex5r7hSpfvOlg6J)

President Trump trusts me to enact his America FIRST agenda in Congress because he knows I’m 100% MAGA. That’s why President Trump FULLY endorsed me in this race.

We must get our message to voters, and if you’re a proud Trump voter, I need you to step up and make sure we hold onto this seat. [**Can you chip in a donation to support my America-First campaign for Congress?**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=df64e204f29d4767ada506bb2fd29914&_e=u6oihYH6rLt7ZLyBDtm_nfI5vmhu7ao5cMkEv-J5glMlyxqWlLa8_dMNoyboJZtSiia30kh2QoUw3T61gfkvPzueSpTu_hfuWQRFBIUYw_MojKDM8YhOfSr4qt6889cuaw8KWVAu1b8CPI4LGybIxXRh-_OLvFDnUmPFbhSZLVuykXclCEfOY-IxpTNW1629pmjihSQ0f4vzHCTG8H1kR1BXZ_JdrUFJRqYZXr1CEGxmhWgNP-s6yd4A0AspnP1odz-rJynm8QY0DmOJshEJXz-x1NP5zakAtbTX6prUxX-jug2MvWmaF-cWaBhMJ622yt77cBqx37kyy34c40x1pCrAAxlogZ5ujdc87nJJDI8MvtQc5hAvL-stiElZyjfb)

name: Tobias Read
subject: Please tell me what you think
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=241223em-RS [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=241223em-RS]
I will assume the office of Oregon Secretary of State in just a few weeks, and I am eager to serve the people of our great state.
While I’m proud of our victory in November, Oregon faces some tough times ahead. Whether it’s protecting our reproductive rights, ensuring that the Affordable Care Act isn’t repealed, ensuring that public lands stay in public hands, or pushing back against efforts to weaken Oregon’s election laws and restrict voting rights...we’ve been here before. So it will be offices like this one to fight for what makes Oregon a special place.
We need people like you to speak up, defend our values, and continue working to advance Oregon.
As we prepare for 2025 and what lies ahead, I want to know what issues you care about, what problems you need help solving, and what you’re thinking about for the future of politics. I hope you'll take a few moments to fill out this survey and tell me what's on your mind: [https://secure.ngpvan.com/DFiCgSrZJEu55qmpD1t8ig2]
TAKE THE SURVEY >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/DFiCgSrZJEu55qmpD1t8ig2]
Here’s what I know for sure: Those who seek to pull us backward can only win when we’re divided.
But I firmly believe we have more in common than that which divides us.
That’s why I’m reaching out to you today. By sharing your priorities and the issues affecting your life, you can help me ensure that I continue to fight for the issues that matter to Oregon.
Please complete my 2025 priorities survey today and share your thoughts. I look forward to reading your responses. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/DFiCgSrZJEu55qmpD1t8ig2]
TAKE THE SURVEY >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/DFiCgSrZJEu55qmpD1t8ig2]
Thank you for making your voice heard,
Tobias Read
Oregon Secretary of State-elect

clean_body: [] I will assume the office of Oregon Secretary of State in just a few weeks, and I am eager to serve the people of our great state. While I’m proud of our victory in November, Oregon faces some tough times ahead. Whether it’s protecting our reproductive rights, ensuring that the Affordable Care Act isn’t repealed, ensuring that public lands stay in public hands, or pushing back against efforts to weaken Oregon’s election laws and restrict voting rights...we’ve been here before. So it will be offices like this one to fight for what makes Oregon a special place. We need people like you to speak up, defend our values, and continue working to advance Oregon. As we prepare for 2025 and what lies ahead, I want to know what issues you care about, what problems you need help solving, and what you’re thinking about for the future of politics. I hope you'll take a few moments to fill out this survey and tell me what's on your mind: [] TAKE THE SURVEY >> [] Here’s what I know for sure: Those who seek to pull us backward can only win when we’re divided. But I firmly believe we have more in common than that which divides us. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today. By sharing your priorities and the issues affecting your life, you can help me ensure that I continue to fight for the issues that matter to Oregon. Please complete my 2025 priorities survey today and share your thoughts. I look forward to reading your responses. [] TAKE THE SURVEY >> [] Thank you for making your voice heard, Tobias Read Oregon Secretary of State-elect [] CONTRIBUTE [] [] [] [] Friends of Tobias Read (5208) PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Kari Lake
subject: A Merry and Blessed Christmas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Media Council
body:
When I created O’Keefe Media Group, I did so knowing there would be few breaks. Corruption doesn’t sleep.

| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zugru59gc1tj7roj890vvpovcmr1g1ng1ni06eho_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j60o76cth2bs)
---
MERRY CHRISTMAS _From Kari, Jeff, Ruby, and Leo_
---
| | From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5ie1eenih1qfg2i6hocclisnjb2eelvk8o2utp0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j60o76cth2bs)**
---
|
---
Dear Friend,I wanted to send you this _Christmas Card_ to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Friend, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Friend, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider **[generously helping me this Christmas.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlf8j1mbd9fmclh197v61r29r3fjk4dv4377d63g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j60o76cth2bs)** Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Friend, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones.
---
Friend, I’m **not** giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you.
---
You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country.
---
_Not_ the Left’s lawfare._Not_ power-drunk liberal prosecutors._Not_ litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.
---
[Will you help me defeat the left’s lawfare by rushing back a generous contribution to my “**First Amendment Fund** ”?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp6fjs1n8gvm8mv2qemcc8ehaqumjgn730t9lg1g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j60o76cth2bs)Your generous support will help me cover the outstanding court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsel, and more. The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility.They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.Friend, it’s scary to think about what this Christmas might look like if the Left had won... Thanks to generous supporters like you, I’m spending this holiday with my family. But these legal bills are looming over our heads. I would be so thankful if you could help out.Your donation will get me one step closer to paying off these legal bills. But if you’re in the position to send more, I want you to know personally how much it means to me and how large of an impact it will have. Every dollar given will help me finish this fight... without financially destroying my family.[All I ask is that rush your “**First Amendment Fund” Emergency Contribution** before midnight, if you can.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcbf2hl1h5bdmomgbdvtofnq5nasqggofb575hio_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j60o76cth2bs)
---
[ **DONATE **](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7rshiko57kcjr34lf7bph3sifcpee453vg22u2o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j60o76cth2bs)
---
Thank you for always being there for me, especially during this holiday season. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Merry Christmas,
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake
---
|
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake
---
| | P.S. Christmas is coming up fast, so I hope my message doesn’t get lost in the shuffle. I need your help. The left’s lawfare has put hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal fees on my lap. A generous group has stepped up and offered to help me pay off these outstanding bills, but they can’t do it without your generous support. Will you please help me end this lawfare by rushing your **“[First Amendment Fund” Emergency Contribution?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsea80d3r7f85vgj73lrvf1vf59188jgq8e0r728_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j60o76cth2bs)** Thank you for your support during this difficult time, and Merry Christmas to you and your family.

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: “Charles Dickens’ A ChristmasCarol” – Our free online course
body:
Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf90qav3i3iqqvkhi78k2sd6euo8eq4661mc95d0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j60o76cth2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol._ "

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvcf55hfasnombh6nv7l80763uv91jq4s3om9c20_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j60o76cth2bs)
Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives.

You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ ," by clicking on the link below.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdvh02q91smokrlafdca3s1b59r7rk1ab2f7t0hg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j60o76cth2bs)**

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

---

1600 Daily
---

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: Bah! Humbug!
body:
Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zoh4u0mssg7c5n58a596kan81rnahft77dqbljc0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j64or6chh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol._ "

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zplogu7mks4r6ggvqakte5njuqft6t7ni3g7i8k0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j64or6chh2bs)
Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives.

You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ ," by clicking on the link below.

body:

So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zr1lnk8tp6u2vjea6thegd25nslrivt7gte6vrqo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j6cpb0cjh2bs) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: “Charles Dickens’ A ChristmasCarol” – Our free online course
body:
Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn9icqlmnjhs19tqcvvejl915b84co0isfh4t0d8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j62ob6clh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol._ "

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zggubugvekstcpct17dllrrst70cg9053c0i5hmg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j62ob6clh2bs)
Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives.

You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ ," by clicking on the link below.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqcpkptak16enjgql46v2lqrgchr5vun2u5auv08_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j62ob6clh2bs)**

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

---

American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: James O'Keefe
subject: WORRIED: Before Christmas . . .
body:
When I created O’Keefe Media Group, I did so knowing there would be few breaks. Corruption doesn’t sleep.

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1s3tc2juop7ck1nnl4p6ugvi1v0s7pul0mk4l2g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j62ob6cth2bs)
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg3l860g33hl84r5sg34fm9560v1125hkeb88d60_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j62ob6cth2bs)
Dear Friend,

A sense of absolute joy abounds as I've traveled the country during this holiday season.

Americans are optimistic about the future of our nation, and they should be! A rapid shift is occurring, and it's up to us to make sure it progresses and these positive changes stick!

When I created O'Keefe Media Group, I did so knowing there would be few breaks. Corruption doesn't sleep.

If you're not aware of OMG, so far in 2024, we have:

* ✓ Exposed the biased inner workings of Disney, IBM, and Google

* ✓ Uncovered the web of money funding illegal immigration

* ✓ Gone undercover to get the inside story of the White House, Congress, the CIA, the IRS, the Pentagon and many more government agencies

* ✓ Exposed a plot to monopolize cryptocurrency

* ✓ Investigated the Secret Service and their failure to protect President Trump

* ✓ Infiltrated the DNC convention

* ✓ Exposed massive fraud within the Democrat's fundraising platform, ActBlue

* ✓ Went undercover to capture the hypocrisy of MSNBC

* ✓ Filmed Meta engineers admit to election interference

* ✓ Monitored the vote in the 2024 election

* ✓ Exposed the massive incompetence of FEMA

* ✓ Highlighted the fraud behind NIH and the COVID scam

* ✓ And produced a groundbreaking documentary on immigration, Line in the Sand.

And we're not done yet!

The holidays are always financially challenging for organizations like mine. While people are in a giving mood, donations typically go to well-meaning organizations that help children in need or families. They rarely go to groups like mine that fight the negative elements in society.

**[I'm writing to ask for your help to get through this month and into the New Year.

](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd69am913heb0fel9c8a9b5lrfpekjj6k9v232ig_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j62ob6cth2bs)** To meet our fundraising goals, I must raise $33,400 before Christmas.

This will help pay my hard-working staff. Cover upcoming travel as well as train and equip the brave undercover journalists who will still be working over the holiday break as government officials are taking time off to travel and meet "new friends" like us.

So far this month, we've raised only 10% of our required budget, and I'm getting worried.

[**Please make a year-end donation to help me and my team keep going.

**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zld585uqu6oh11pcdah726ne54kij5o5ke28ncug_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j62ob6cth2bs) **[I would greatly appreciate any amount you can donate, whether $10, $100, or more.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu91jsa8qvi88cp906uas9m4i28dlsmsjgh6c5sg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j62ob6cth2bs) **It will be put to immediate use.

Please don't forget about us. We remain hard at work for you, the American people, and the Truth.

Thank you again for all that you do.

In Truth,

James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

name: Kari Lake
subject: A Merry and Blessed Christmas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Media Council
body:
When I created O’Keefe Media Group, I did so knowing there would be few breaks. Corruption doesn’t sleep.

| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zclfj85qrboplgen1gjtmfdgii6ei45k4uatadbo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j6ep32cdh2bs)
---
MERRY CHRISTMAS _From Kari, Jeff, Ruby, and Leo_
---
| | From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0dl8jp31lq68n4peilqd4jlgkb994a9avs751q8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j6ep32cdh2bs)**
---
|
---
Dear Friend,I wanted to send you this _Christmas Card_ to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Friend, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Friend, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider **[generously helping me this Christmas.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znf5vc4olo5j0apnfgofarf4jqv4ec149l3tju0o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j6ep32cdh2bs)** Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Friend, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones.
---
Friend, I’m **not** giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you.
---
You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country.
---
_Not_ the Left’s lawfare._Not_ power-drunk liberal prosecutors._Not_ litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.
---
[Will you help me defeat the left’s lawfare by rushing back a generous contribution to my “**First Amendment Fund** ”?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zf91b7hos3gsvm6im4ahk8f2cu0c50551hbqe3so_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j6ep32cdh2bs)Your generous support will help me cover the outstanding court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsel, and more. The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility.They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.Friend, it’s scary to think about what this Christmas might look like if the Left had won... Thanks to generous supporters like you, I’m spending this holiday with my family. But these legal bills are looming over our heads. I would be so thankful if you could help out.Your donation will get me one step closer to paying off these legal bills. But if you’re in the position to send more, I want you to know personally how much it means to me and how large of an impact it will have. Every dollar given will help me finish this fight... without financially destroying my family.[All I ask is that rush your “**First Amendment Fund” Emergency Contribution** before midnight, if you can.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4t5jb4jh0gpmq6a07861tfkf5tc3tkjm8jv4epg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j6ep32cdh2bs)
---
[ **DONATE **](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7lls9cefermcbjldq2lrimevr2vuc0iung9mudg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j6ep32cdh2bs)
---
Thank you for always being there for me, especially during this holiday season. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Merry Christmas,
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake
---
|
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake
---

A generous group has stepped up and offered to help me pay off these outstanding bills, but they can’t do it without your generous support. name: Lacy Lunsford
subject: This might be our last Christmas together
body:
I was going through our family photos when I found this

| | | I was going through our family photos when I found this one from a past Christmas.
---
| |
---
Dear Friend,I was going through our family photos when I found this one from a past Christmas.
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zscphjbije3e1t3cmhrdnddnk2c57gscio27rkj0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j61o34c9h2bs)
---
Looking at it used to make me so happy. It brought back all the wonderful memories we've made as a family during the Christmas season. But now it makes me cry realizing that this might be the last Christmas our little boys get to spend with their father.My husband Brad is a proud U.S. Army veteran. He served two tours of duty in Iraq as a Cavalry Scout. And today he is also a decorated, 9-year veteran of the Las Cruces, New Mexico, police department.I'm used to my husband being in danger. But never in my wildest dreams did I think the biggest threat to Brad wouldn't come from a radical terrorist or a violent gangster......but from a Soros-funded, anti-police prosecutor. **[**That's why I'm writing you today as a last resort to ask if you'll help me fight for my husband.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2ctm4bq7klj5j7rc1op0p90t9qoed9al9hatgs8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j61o34c9h2bs)** Instead of enjoying this Christmas season, my family will be thinking about and dreading the coming of February when **this Soros-funded prosecutor will try to rip** **my husband away from me and our sons -- and lock him up for 11 years -- for saving a fellow officer's life.** Our nightmare started the day my husband responded to a shoplifting call. When Brad and his partner, Officer Arbogast, moved to detain the suspect who was carrying a knife, the suspect got violent.As they tried to subdue him, the suspect grabbed Officer Arbogast's taser, yanked it free, and pointed it directly at him.In that moment, my husband had no choice -- it was the suspect's life or his partner's. He drew his pistol and fired, killing the suspect and saving Officer Arbogast's life.When one of Brad's coworkers called me to tell me there had been a shooting, I burst into tears. I knew he did what he had to do to protect his partner so they could both make it home to their families. And when an Internal Investigation and the local District Attorney cleared my husband of any wrongdoing, I thought this awful episode was behind us.I couldn't have been more wrong.Because more than a year after the incident, the Attorney General of New Mexico charged my husband with Voluntary Manslaughter! The New Mexico Attorney General is a rabid far-Left activist who hates the police. He was funded by George Soros. And because my husband is white, and the suspect was black......this radical prosecutor is determined to make a name for himself by destroying my husband and dragging his name through the mud. **Make no mistake -- these charges are a slap in the face to every brave man and woman who has ever put on the badge.** Now you can see why I'm so heartbroken and furious.My husband is an honorable man who wanted nothing more than to serve his country and his community. That's why he served for 3 years in the Army as a cavalry scout. And it's why he served for 10 years as a police officer.But more than that, he's a wonderful husband and an incredible father to our 9- and 6-year-old boys.And I can't bear to think of what it will do to them if one day, Daddy is taken away and they're forced to grow up with their father behind bars. But unless people like you speak up to defend my husband against these disgusting Soros-funded political attacks......Brad will miss 11 years of Christmases, birthdays, wedding anniversaries, and Little League games.As I mentioned earlier, Brad's trial starts in February and already, the legal bills have become overwhelming for our family.Thank God, we got a call from Jason Johnson.Jason is a retired police officer -- and he's the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF).If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Brad. Not only did LELDF decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best lawyers and expert witnesses available.So I must ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone. **[**Will you donate $35 or any amount to LELDF to help me save my husband?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z83vhgmrran4halu3ic1rqjlvfalsqk1b113e920_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j61o34c9h2bs)** If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for your help. But I'm so scared for Brad and I will do whatever I can for him -- and for our sons. [**So I pray this Christmas season you'll find it in your heart to make a tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100 or more to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgm2th1up59o3v1g5pjp681stovj59u5h5njdt0g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j61o34c9h2bs)**** Brad and I -- and our two sons -- are counting on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you to help keep Brad home where he belongs.No matter what you’re able to give today, please pray for us. Thank you in advance for your support.
---
Gratefully,
---
Lacy Lunsford
---
P.S. This Christmas season my boys, and I are terrified that this might be our last one as a family. I can't imagine having to spend 11 long, lonely years, trying to raise the boys by myself -- and worrying every day about my husband, locked up with hundreds of violent criminals. Please don't let my two boys grow up without their father -- **[**please follow this link right now to make a tax-deductible donation of $35 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z62utop9jek14efkq0r8qeb9d5m0rkf1qe0d26to_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j61o34c9h2bs)** P.P.S. Brad's trial starts in February, so we're quickly running out of time. Thank you for helping my family fight back against this Soros-funded prosecutor!
---
|
---
_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter!_ © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5s5lueds6c98gk3rul3ghfvi2glin8c0b54af6o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j61o34c9h2bs)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303
---

So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6lu0tqrv1pmms71l5f7miqr8pmqr5pr7c19mstg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j61o32c1h2bs) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." name: Kari Lake
subject: A Merry and Blessed Christmas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Media Council
body:
When I created O’Keefe Media Group, I did so knowing there would be few breaks. Corruption doesn’t sleep.

| | |

| |

#
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3bha39s1ohei1mruhjgnrms1t9ci4tbc2fc2b08_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j61o32cph2bs)
---
MERRY CHRISTMAS _From Kari, Jeff, Ruby, and Leo_
---
| | From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0b2hf165sg6moen47veu7ie8rjceii2hheeke60_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j61o32cph2bs)**
---
|
---
Dear Friend,I wanted to send you this _Christmas Card_ to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Friend, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Friend, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider **[generously helping me this Christmas.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo9smk7hhptvnfd5dhq6n6toia56o1njdan94t3g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j61o32cph2bs)** Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Friend, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones.
---
Friend, I’m **not** giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you.
---
You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country.
---
_Not_ the Left’s lawfare._Not_ power-drunk liberal prosecutors._Not_ litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.
---
[Will you help me defeat the left’s lawfare by rushing back a generous contribution to my “**First Amendment Fund** ”?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z43gkgisji99bsosp3ocmq73er21r7k41pp7u638_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j61o32cph2bs)Your generous support will help me cover the outstanding court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsel, and more. The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility.They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.Friend, it’s scary to think about what this Christmas might look like if the Left had won... Thanks to generous supporters like you, I’m spending this holiday with my family. But these legal bills are looming over our heads. I would be so thankful if you could help out.Your donation will get me one step closer to paying off these legal bills. But if you’re in the position to send more, I want you to know personally how much it means to me and how large of an impact it will have. Every dollar given will help me finish this fight... without financially destroying my family.[All I ask is that rush your “**First Amendment Fund” Emergency Contribution** before midnight, if you can.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl7uev55tqroaic85cqmhbv0ukjp7eb13fe1b45o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j61o32cph2bs)
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze9q7usdiri8ds71htfd4nep4lvdh5tkjgp661i8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j61o32cph2bs)
---
Thank you for always being there for me, especially during this holiday season. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Merry Christmas,
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake

Will you please help me end this lawfare by rushing your **“[First Amendment Fund” Emergency Contribution?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkhkv8glal6uecg71tbkc7v4bllu293nnb73ek7o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j61o32cph2bs)** Thank you for your support during this difficult time, and Merry Christmas to you and your family.

name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: “Charles Dickens’ A ChristmasCarol” – Our free online course
body:
Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

This sponsored message from First Look News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2za6onp2frk8hu3d0ue14nr6rc14tifciu2ie8070_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j61p72clh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol._ "

[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zfv0emijnde0d17tpe2oq3miqtp5kvgs52ftc928_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j61p72clh2bs)
Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives.

You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ ," by clicking on the link below.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ziasc4ik5nnap3b8lgo869jsm9n86k3k65qk11s0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1j61p72clh2bs)**

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

---

First Look News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: “Charles Dickens’ A ChristmasCarol” – Our free online course
body:
Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zfv0tsd1gt98gp4m8sh2sv08pvvijum060tmlsmo_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1gm0pr2c9h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol._ "

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0ggu83knufd7ae2v71db9rovfls9nklgg4f5q7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1gm0pr2c9h2bs)
Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives.

You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ ," by clicking on the link below.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7dd8k1161u3pho290e5enfv24h03updk84omhno_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1gm0pr2c9h2bs)**

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Serving our fellow Americans
body:
Tea Party Patriots Action post-election poll proves it’s time for a change in government
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** What an incredible end to a roller coaster of a year, from the triumph in November's election to enjoying family and friends this holiday season.
**To our cherished Jewish brothers and sisters, we also extend our heartfelt wishes for a Happy Hanukkah.** **May this Festival of Lights bring you joy, unity, and the warmth of cherished traditions. Your dedication and hard work in helping to steer our country's course are deeply appreciated.****
**As we approach the end of the year, let's remember the spirit of community service that defined our election efforts. You've shown what it means to serve tirelessly, day in and day out. However, we know there are still many people across our great nation, such as those in North Carolina who are still putting the pieces back together after Hurricane Helene, who are struggling. As true patriots, let's use this holiday season to make a tangible difference in the lives of those in need.
Remember to give back, as the spirit of generosity can light up lives in the darkest times. As we look forward to January 20, 2025, let's anticipate a future that's brighter and more hopeful than we've seen in years.
Thank you for all you do to make our country a better place!
Wishing you and your family all the best,
Jenny Beth Martin and the entire Tea Party Patriots Action support team **__** **** ************

name: Hillsdale College via Real American Reporting
subject: “Charles Dickens’ A ChristmasCarol” – Our free online course
body:
Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

This sponsored message from Real American Reporting is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z53g6ra0p1k12ue2ks9ioev8nielogecvivc4r7o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1gm4pb2cph2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol._ "

[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2ztmri3geqdlre25num2looort1tbm4htmnkrn038_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1gm4pb2cph2bs)
Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives.

You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ ," by clicking on the link below.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z1k54v7micgtvdcp5deb61p795ir0t6vb1fa0318_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1gm4pb2cph2bs)**

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

---

Real American Reporting
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z55qvedprcrfi5l45hqoqqusv5sjp07k8jjfk220_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1gm4pb2cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq4t9k66q3bd9ieir38ctieko7fcjheiprect66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni6co74clge9oh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zgd6umn1u7e5633bmreldrs3pfkg094jcraeei0o_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1gm4pb2cph2bs)_

body:
When I created O’Keefe Media Group, I did so knowing there would be few breaks. Corruption doesn’t sleep.

| [](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkb2O3SAQhZ8Gd1h4wNhbUESy3G3alBY_gy-yMQhw9vUj32i7NCnnzDdH-jS_PrdPHc5w7T91RHXYspW6RbOluNOvVEpAR42gUdcNGAg6AAWxQeeU-7BSyw7VMPGRcSFm1r3UpNH4SXBvwUjj2Cg5Gwcv58lz7wG7oJ6eAUCwWUwge-dBcj9K5swszYcjgukTS-sPxGzTtRestWC-zRmsvnqbYneqV2u5Ev6DwEpgrWjvgr2-0KX2EATWdCB6jOiC3ku68xPFnRr0qSC1rxJqi7rSaGhOWRO-3i1uNd3FIuHLv1gC8mGezjsSvrzv_mZWx6zDfhG-fPt9b9LV8GqEL4ctBKSO6X6PMHZFufwVzjNUORHB9qjD-RZs__GK3wr-BAAA__8hq5WT)
[](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkb2O3SAQhZ8Gd1h4wNhbUESy3G3alBY_gy-yMQhw9vUj32i7NCnnzDdH-jS_PrdPHc5w7T91RHXYspW6RbOluNOvVEpAR42gUdcNGAg6AAWxQeeU-7BSyw7VMPGRcSFm1r3UpNH4SXBvwUjj2Cg5Gwcv58lz7wG7oJ6eAUCwWUwge-dBcj9K5swszYcjgukTS-sPxGzTtRestWC-zRmsvnqbYneqV2u5Ev6DwEpgrWjvgr2-0KX2EATWdCB6jOiC3ku68xPFnRr0qSC1rxJqi7rSaGhOWRO-3i1uNd3FIuHLv1gC8mGezjsSvrzv_mZWx6zDfhG-fPt9b9LV8GqEL4ctBKSO6X6PMHZFufwVzjNUORHB9qjD-RZs__GK3wr-BAAA__8hq5WT)
Dear Friend,

A sense of absolute joy abounds as I've traveled the country during this holiday season.

Americans are optimistic about the future of our nation, and they should be! A rapid shift is occurring, and it's up to us to make sure it progresses and these positive changes stick!

When I created O'Keefe Media Group, I did so knowing there would be few breaks. Corruption doesn't sleep.

If you're not aware of OMG, so far in 2024, we have:

* ✓ Exposed the biased inner workings of Disney, IBM, and Google

* ✓ Uncovered the web of money funding illegal immigration

* ✓ Gone undercover to get the inside story of the White House, Congress, the CIA, the IRS, the Pentagon and many more government agencies

* ✓ Exposed a plot to monopolize cryptocurrency

* ✓ Investigated the Secret Service and their failure to protect President Trump

* ✓ Infiltrated the DNC convention

* ✓ Exposed massive fraud within the Democrat's fundraising platform, ActBlue

* ✓ Went undercover to capture the hypocrisy of MSNBC

* ✓ Filmed Meta engineers admit to election interference

* ✓ Monitored the vote in the 2024 election

* ✓ Exposed the massive incompetence of FEMA

* ✓ Highlighted the fraud behind NIH and the COVID scam

* ✓ And produced a groundbreaking documentary on immigration, Line in the Sand.

And we're not done yet!

The holidays are always financially challenging for organizations like mine. While people are in a giving mood, donations typically go to well-meaning organizations that help children in need or families. They rarely go to groups like mine that fight the negative elements in society.

**[I'm writing to ask for your help to get through this month and into the New Year.

name: Lacy Lunsford
subject: This might be our last Christmas together
body:
I was going through our family photos when I found this

| | | I was going through our family photos when I found this one from a past Christmas.
---
| |
---
Dear Friend,I was going through our family photos when I found this one from a past Christmas.
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4hh9718178esmq7qttgjumeambv9knd946no5f0_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1gm1o74cdh2bs)
---
Looking at it used to make me so happy. It brought back all the wonderful memories we've made as a family during the Christmas season. But now it makes me cry realizing that this might be the last Christmas our little boys get to spend with their father.My husband Brad is a proud U.S. Army veteran. He served two tours of duty in Iraq as a Cavalry Scout. And today he is also a decorated, 9-year veteran of the Las Cruces, New Mexico, police department.I'm used to my husband being in danger. But never in my wildest dreams did I think the biggest threat to Brad wouldn't come from a radical terrorist or a violent gangster......but from a Soros-funded, anti-police prosecutor. **[**That's why I'm writing you today as a last resort to ask if you'll help me fight for my husband.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0m4f7vrqln3eit4hh0a6ugj6t1tlg5a3rpphc98_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1gm1o74cdh2bs)** Instead of enjoying this Christmas season, my family will be thinking about and dreading the coming of February when **this Soros-funded prosecutor will try to rip** **my husband away from me and our sons -- and lock him up for 11 years -- for saving a fellow officer's life.** Our nightmare started the day my husband responded to a shoplifting call. When Brad and his partner, Officer Arbogast, moved to detain the suspect who was carrying a knife, the suspect got violent.As they tried to subdue him, the suspect grabbed Officer Arbogast's taser, yanked it free, and pointed it directly at him.In that moment, my husband had no choice -- it was the suspect's life or his partner's. He drew his pistol and fired, killing the suspect and saving Officer Arbogast's life.When one of Brad's coworkers called me to tell me there had been a shooting, I burst into tears. I knew he did what he had to do to protect his partner so they could both make it home to their families. And when an Internal Investigation and the local District Attorney cleared my husband of any wrongdoing, I thought this awful episode was behind us.I couldn't have been more wrong.Because more than a year after the incident, the Attorney General of New Mexico charged my husband with Voluntary Manslaughter! The New Mexico Attorney General is a rabid far-Left activist who hates the police. He was funded by George Soros. And because my husband is white, and the suspect was black......this radical prosecutor is determined to make a name for himself by destroying my husband and dragging his name through the mud. **Make no mistake -- these charges are a slap in the face to every brave man and woman who has ever put on the badge.** Now you can see why I'm so heartbroken and furious.My husband is an honorable man who wanted nothing more than to serve his country and his community. That's why he served for 3 years in the Army as a cavalry scout. And it's why he served for 10 years as a police officer.But more than that, he's a wonderful husband and an incredible father to our 9- and 6-year-old boys.And I can't bear to think of what it will do to them if one day, Daddy is taken away and they're forced to grow up with their father behind bars. But unless people like you speak up to defend my husband against these disgusting Soros-funded political attacks......Brad will miss 11 years of Christmases, birthdays, wedding anniversaries, and Little League games.As I mentioned earlier, Brad's trial starts in February and already, the legal bills have become overwhelming for our family.Thank God, we got a call from Jason Johnson.Jason is a retired police officer -- and he's the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF).If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Brad. Not only did LELDF decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best lawyers and expert witnesses available.So I must ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone. **[**Will you donate $35 or any amount to LELDF to help me save my husband?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc4r27vhu6c91rqmc5dif4uj61oin043balkb6po_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1gm1o74cdh2bs)** If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for your help. But I'm so scared for Brad and I will do whatever I can for him -- and for our sons. [**So I pray this Christmas season you'll find it in your heart to make a tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100 or more to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcd62n3bp75jjche2ddc673fqio2cus03c9b8618_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1gm1o74cdh2bs)**** Brad and I -- and our two sons -- are counting on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you to help keep Brad home where he belongs.No matter what you’re able to give today, please pray for us. Thank you in advance for your support.
---
Gratefully,
---
Lacy Lunsford
---
P.S. This Christmas season my boys, and I are terrified that this might be our last one as a family. I can't imagine having to spend 11 long, lonely years, trying to raise the boys by myself -- and worrying every day about my husband, locked up with hundreds of violent criminals. Please don't let my two boys grow up without their father -- **[**please follow this link right now to make a tax-deductible donation of $35 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zaej93v5tjadpue3tka5cescgljafgi524e7s86g_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1gm1o74cdh2bs)** P.P.S. Brad's trial starts in February, so we're quickly running out of time. Thank you for helping my family fight back against this Soros-funded prosecutor!
---
|
---
_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter!_ © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zubqupshsljvl8l38fs7g53laitro8u0rnapd738_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1gm1o74cdh2bs)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303
---
---

ICYMI News
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf1klg2kotudubr8ami2qhj442stlg20oq8qu8f8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj0shhm0pj246h22sh2s8i6epj5c1gm1o74cdh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhcn92fjbk59n21p14d0f973npuennmnmjvaafsg_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1gm1o74cdh2bs)_

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Intel
subject: They’ve promoted American decline for decades
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWhjAReWNI
You know that most institutions of higher education have been
hotbeds of anti-Americanism for decades.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWhjAReWNI

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Dear
Friend,

You know
that most institutions of higher education have been hotbeds of
anti-Americanism for decades.

In recent
years, the radical ideologies hatched in higher education have
spread into the mainstream of American life.

The need
to push back aggressively has become urgent.

Next
year, we must do even more for the cause of liberty and the
American way of life. And I think the opportunities are
significantly better than in the past.

We must
do all we can to revive and preserve the principles and practices
of liberty and limited constitutional government on the
battlefield of education.

Hillsdale
College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades. With
the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's mission, we
are determined to redouble our efforts at this crucial time for
our nation.

That's
why we have set a goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31
to expand our Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty Through
Education in 2025.

The focus
of this vital project is to foster informed patriotism
nationwide, especially among younger Americans. And we need your
help.

Before
the end of 2024, would you consider supporting Hillsdale College
with a tax-deductible gift? We have set a goal to raise
$6,000,000 from our friends nationwide by December 31.

Hillsdale's educational outreach on behalf of liberty has never
been more urgent than it is today. That's because efforts to
undermine patriotism and destroy the American way of life have
been increasing-with the ultimate goal of transforming American
government and society.

Your
year-end gift will help us to promote informed patriotism by
educating millions of Americans-especially younger
Americans-about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

One way
we accomplish this is through our free online courses-courses
such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the
Constitution," "Land of Hope: The Great American Story," and
"Marxism, Socialism, and Communism."

We must
increase the number of citizens we reach and teach through these
free online courses, as well as through our several other
educational outreach efforts-efforts such as Imprimis and our
ongoing work to help launch and support Hillsdale-affiliated K-12
charter schools nationwide.

Defeating
the anti-American Left on the battlefield of education is an
essential part of reviving and preserving the American way of
life.

Hillsdale
College refuses to accept even one penny of government
support-not even indirectly in the form of federal or state
student grants and loans. This principled independence frees us
from many burdensome and corrupting federal regulations and
allows us to remain true to our mission.

It also
means that we depend entirely on the support of citizens like
you.

I see the
tremendous impact of this support as I travel around the nation
and talk to those who benefit from Hillsdale's educational
outreach. It is especially gratifying to see the impact on
younger Americans.

Your
year-end contribution will help us expand Hillsdale's educational
outreach on behalf of liberty in 2025.

If you
agree that it is vitally important to promote informed patriotism
by educating increasing millions of citizens (especially younger
Americans) about our nation's great heritage of liberty, please
make your best tax-deductible gift to Hillsdale College by
December 31.

You can
give your year-end tax-deductible gift using this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/64099318:WhjAReWNI:m:3:2627245898:E1A5B70B1278DDC17B0A390B220FB63B:r

We are
honored by your partnership in the crucial year ahead.

Warm
regards,

Larry P.
Arnn

President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing
Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 25, 2023.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWhjAReWNI

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWhjAReWNI

You can give your year-end tax-deductible gift using this secure link: We are honored by your partnership in the crucial year ahead. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system April 25, 2023.
