name: Survival Food Kit
subject: The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis
body:
This might be your only warning...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19464/6374453/aaa8e0570b1e891dd637baede483abcac8ed2cc8/c9458b9a10a2a67b96ad0c42f4cc58fe1f8a67e0)
---
| | |
---
_December 24th, 2024_
---
| | |
---
**The Truth About The
Coming Food Crisis**
---
| |
---
**This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_“Food shortages are coming.”_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life – depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19464/6374453/aaa8e0570b1e891dd637baede483abcac8ed2cc8/c9458b9a10a2a67b96ad0c42f4cc58fe1f8a67e0). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19464/6374453/aaa8e0570b1e891dd637baede483abcac8ed2cc8/c9458b9a10a2a67b96ad0c42f4cc58fe1f8a67e0) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19464/6374453/aaa8e0570b1e891dd637baede483abcac8ed2cc8/c9458b9a10a2a67b96ad0c42f4cc58fe1f8a67e0) on these survival food kits while you can. **More Raving
Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19464/6374453/aaa8e0570b1e891dd637baede483abcac8ed2cc8/c9458b9a10a2a67b96ad0c42f4cc58fe1f8a67e0)

name: Don Huffines
subject: Texas Taxpayers Are Aiding and Abetting the Chinese Communist Military
body:
I love Christmas—such a great opportunity to be with our family. Most importantly, we get to celebrate the birth of our Lord and Savior, Jesus Christ.
No images? [Click here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-e-sdrhlyk-yuddtktydi-e/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-sdrhlyk-yuddtktydi-r/) Hello fellow patriot!I love Christmas--such a great opportunity to be with our family.Most importantly, we get to celebrate the birth of our Lord and Savior, Jesus Christ.From my family to yours, I hope you have a wonderful Christmas and a restful holiday! **Back at Mar-a-Lago**
# Mary Catherine and I were back at Mar-a-Lago the other night, supporting Charlie Kirk and his creation, Turning Point USA. Charlie is a true American hero, a one-of-a-kind warrior who has and will fundamentally change the USA. It is unbelievable what all TPUSA has accomplished.
**WHAT'S GOING ON IN TEXAS?** To many across our nation's surprise, the Texas House is DEMOCRAT-CONTROLLED.A small handful of LIBERAL REPUBLICANS and ALL of the RADICAL, child-grooming, open-border-loving Democrats have teamed up to elect the Speaker of the Texas House.In exchange for their votes, the RINOs promise to give out POWERFUL committee chairmanships and KILL Texas GOP Legislative Priorities, such as school choice and border security.Any Republican that votes with Democrats for Speaker of the TX House is committing POLITICAL SUICIDE.It's time for REPUBLICANS to pick the Speaker of the Texas House so we can finally STOP the invasion, ELIMINATE school property taxes, BAN taxpayer-funded lobbying, and PASS school choice! 2026 is coming.I'm sick and tired of sellout RINOs and will go ALL-IN on defeating more traitors. Who's with me? **Texas Taxpayers Are Aiding and Abetting the Chinese Communist Military** Chinese nationals have direct access to Texas universities and research facilities. Whether they want to or not, Chinese nationals are legally obligated to deliver all information to the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) and its military. Texas' sensitive research and intellectual property are being funneled directly to the CCP and its military, and Texas taxpayers are subsidizing this theft! There is only one solution to prevent this: prohibit the enrollment or employment of Chinese nationals at all public and private Texas universities and research institutions. **Texas Traffic is OUT OF CONTROL** Because of government incompetence, Texans waste millions of hours on our deadlocked roads. **Celebrate Jesus** [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-sdrhlyk-yuddtktydi-y/) This Christmas, we need to trust in Jesus and His plan and be appreciative of all that we have.[WATCH: Christmas message from Don Huffines](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-sdrhlyk-yuddtktydi-j/) May God bless you, your family, and the great state of Texas. Our greatest days are coming. See you on the battlefield, and Merry Christmas!!For Liberty, Prosperity, and Virtue Always, Don Huffines
_Father, papa, businessman, and former TX Senator_ P.S. Follow me on [Facebook](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-sdrhlyk-yuddtktydi-t/), [Instagram](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-sdrhlyk-yuddtktydi-i/), and [Twitter](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-sdrhlyk-yuddtktydi-h/) for updates. Your family and friends can join this email list by [clicking here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-sdrhlyk-yuddtktydi-k/).Want me to speak at your event? Join your podcast? [Click here to fill out my request form.](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-sdrhlyk-yuddtktydi-u/) [JOIN OUR MOVEMENT TO SAVE TEXAS](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-sdrhlyk-yuddtktydi-o/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-sdrhlyk-yuddtktydi-b/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-sdrhlyk-yuddtktydi-n/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-sdrhlyk-yuddtktydi-p/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-sdrhlyk-yuddtktydi-x/) | [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-sdrhlyk-yuddtktydi-c/) | **[ABOUT](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-sdrhlyk-yuddtktydi-q/) | [NEWS](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-sdrhlyk-yuddtktydi-a/) | [EVENTS](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-sdrhlyk-yuddtktydi-f/) | [SPEAKER/MEDIA REQUEST](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-sdrhlyk-yuddtktydi-z/) | [DONATE](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-sdrhlyk-yuddtktydi-v/)** [Preferences](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.updatemyprofile.com/t-sdrhlyk-17329976-yuddtktydi-s) | [Unsubscribe](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-u-sdrhlyk-yuddtktydi-g/)

subject: Oh no! We're embarrassed...
body:
We asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible.

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee0752f2db944c798280f5d6e57f5a00&_e=cho0PWzJIWv8ubS0fMLmTeOTseKfFZh2miEtq9_so5LwaNr5SiWax52miUEEmbPnjE_4ID_v8caUFtLZTXmjZL5lXi8LitYH-04o0AjtL6s8sCpv9BU-BWo19N6hWSUDlJa2totp9U9jKIrZsqPZ8LXudPL2a6oJPNwCPBRVIvXngKYjZQs6U-DRI1E-GDiH6yWJzllD6vqWSFnMhko314oyvS8bxVSR7PaXChrxWubsWG67Si_hn773fDSI1R_njZYqYb9f0KOrTpbkKmrdEEY1G049nR34t9mKvr6NIPdmHcN9_UiS-mcobmBenLIdrL2QDD_aL-NPByWK9qiJCViYbUIA7Gz0WcwfPik9Ymn3fr6_GHPVYlKd7pIWNadA), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee0752f2db944c798280f5d6e57f5a00&_e=cho0PWzJIWv8ubS0fMLmTeOTseKfFZh2miEtq9_so5LwaNr5SiWax52miUEEmbPnjE_4ID_v8caUFtLZTXmjZL5lXi8LitYH-04o0AjtL6s8sCpv9BU-BWo19N6hWSUDlJa2totp9U9jKIrZsqPZ8LXudPL2a6oJPNwCPBRVIvXngKYjZQs6U-DRI1E-GDiH6yWJzllD6vqWSFnMhko314oyvS8bxVSR7PaXChrxWubIaU2f7-9RXTGp-wytSiqPKNehcG1C4Ku0a-6Wr-YoXOqRhlM_27Q5_6gC0Ihb7IoBWBUZaXCm-1Fe1PP6EQM3HZVwDVEP1QQThZQeLpnNmGItOerq69L9vxmHRU2KHuxtTEQ-pnMHD3soNxd1rUK1) [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee0752f2db944c798280f5d6e57f5a00&_e=cho0PWzJIWv8ubS0fMLmTeOTseKfFZh2miEtq9_so5LwaNr5SiWax52miUEEmbPnjE_4ID_v8caUFtLZTXmjZL5lXi8LitYH-04o0AjtL6s8sCpv9BU-BWo19N6hWSUDlJa2totp9U9jKIrZsqPZ8LXudPL2a6oJPNwCPBRVIvXngKYjZQs6U-DRI1E-GDiH6yWJzllD6vqWSFnMhko314oyvS8bxVSR7PaXChrxWuYlneJjxjwy0azA9UMn0CPBC5RXzCdaavChNIfER7LJYWW26FmjYefwjcXwqqr2-c-RS9fxzzCQXIX3-LJ0F4YKpPYftmv4IYYA07eE_ra8ObITsuZbZSEVCVND9DN92M74DhxFUCU8_KC2dJqSjeXO) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee0752f2db944c798280f5d6e57f5a00&_e=cho0PWzJIWv8ubS0fMLmTeOTseKfFZh2miEtq9_so5LwaNr5SiWax52miUEEmbPnjE_4ID_v8caUFtLZTXmjZL5lXi8LitYH-04o0AjtL6s8sCpv9BU-BWo19N6hWSUDlJa2totp9U9jKIrZsqPZ8LXudPL2a6oJPNwCPBRVIvXngKYjZQs6U-DRI1E-GDiH6yWJzllD6vqWSFnMhko314oyvS8bxVSR7PaXChrxWubXRX-F97X38LxfAoghEamEXlG1fP_-MwMhXhk5HOFbfHmp2tzErSLqr7D-5FivtYj9D-9JFXYJUKw2Ocpytd_IdFq7e_j97vlhrzLCuznAcPx489xMKE4b2YqlvBQkNUXgKE1-K64owTRHINheog5s) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee0752f2db944c798280f5d6e57f5a00&_e=cho0PWzJIWv8ubS0fMLmTeOTseKfFZh2miEtq9_so5LwaNr5SiWax52miUEEmbPnjE_4ID_v8caUFtLZTXmjZL5lXi8LitYH-04o0AjtL6s8sCpv9BU-BWo19N6hWSUDlJa2totp9U9jKIrZsqPZ8LXudPL2a6oJPNwCPBRVIvXngKYjZQs6U-DRI1E-GDiH6yWJzllD6vqWSFnMhko314oyvS8bxVSR7PaXChrxWubHbGgMyzaOGOtW0BWlrlv7opdVVT2UvXabBPkrYM2-b-_IB3Z9geeXua7M1JMv4B5g7KlnRicENU2HthGPWC-pvD4497OP4OJuFvqWo4bvzoLrWuIUajCXrO9Kjs-IWVp3AL5af6Sf3ucxk-zJW-4Z)

subject: WORRIED: Before Christmas . . .
body:
When I created O’Keefe Media Group, I did so knowing there would be few breaks. Corruption doesn’t sleep.

| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c122f94864124290afd768f8c047c5a2&_e=wDCaUFdOx6u1c87R1MSLTiKNp5BdlXmkOF36Fd4Gpjz-2WbrQtD9FlsOPajaQ95OAo_tGgydYgYwtIsDz3OFjJRZyXkxz6v3xAovmHWRZj41BA8kqHnJUFLVHXm8uBHmoZREErXlQxrvW7k9liCGx2ExvpDkjKCPbRl6QT8jWVJkpRLy867YLhfj-Sw11feecubSTAGM3l62wJuJsCi6JGsPZh97E5ZAVSe8Y-TlEcxePunGIG3c5oEi1pc5ETkILqMuKqNXD1SxAjyqNeG6PC2LLkqrskmhoMXENcHoLvKTNZ63gBPwu2nIbfHwbcGTXQjFEl9yPGuU6xkFD2eO-PjGSGR_HGAfjnGPmuhwI4o5EMq50K_GiX_z878Kkz49Nd1F7W-TjWJTTaKxUHh1RQ%3D%3D)
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c122f94864124290afd768f8c047c5a2&_e=wDCaUFdOx6u1c87R1MSLTiKNp5BdlXmkOF36Fd4Gpjz-2WbrQtD9FlsOPajaQ95OAo_tGgydYgYwtIsDz3OFjJRZyXkxz6v3xAovmHWRZj41BA8kqHnJUFLVHXm8uBHmoZREErXlQxrvW7k9liCGx2ExvpDkjKCPbRl6QT8jWVJkpRLy867YLhfj-Sw11feecubSTAGM3l62wJuJsCi6JGsPZh97E5ZAVSe8Y-TlEcyn3dxseNv9lwEU6_E5Vz6Op0fHCWgMkCwbnL7E42ptmujGNVCZcFyRnSsmeymElCqb--c-_-DkTsLNc1xMaCilw_SM1KkCV5vmZCZgSZsXzQVXxPuuAx3sf2NE1X1aJ78hX8rmLrwzaA4uabblSOpXdM4d3v-O6ffsVqExaug_pg%3D%3D)
Dear Friend,

A sense of absolute joy abounds as I've traveled the country during this holiday season.

Americans are optimistic about the future of our nation, and they should be! A rapid shift is occurring, and it's up to us to make sure it progresses and these positive changes stick!

When I created O'Keefe Media Group, I did so knowing there would be few breaks. Corruption doesn't sleep.

If you're not aware of OMG, so far in 2024, we have:

* ✓ Exposed the biased inner workings of Disney, IBM, and Google

* ✓ Uncovered the web of money funding illegal immigration

* ✓ Gone undercover to get the inside story of the White House, Congress, the CIA, the IRS, the Pentagon and many more government agencies

* ✓ Exposed a plot to monopolize cryptocurrency

* ✓ Investigated the Secret Service and their failure to protect President Trump

* ✓ Infiltrated the DNC convention

* ✓ Exposed massive fraud within the Democrat's fundraising platform, ActBlue

* ✓ Went undercover to capture the hypocrisy of MSNBC

* ✓ Filmed Meta engineers admit to election interference

* ✓ Monitored the vote in the 2024 election

* ✓ Exposed the massive incompetence of FEMA

* ✓ Highlighted the fraud behind NIH and the COVID scam

* ✓ And produced a groundbreaking documentary on immigration, Line in the Sand.

And we're not done yet!

The holidays are always financially challenging for organizations like mine. While people are in a giving mood, donations typically go to well-meaning organizations that help children in need or families. They rarely go to groups like mine that fight the negative elements in society.

**[I'm writing to ask for your help to get through this month and into the New Year.

](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c122f94864124290afd768f8c047c5a2&_e=wDCaUFdOx6u1c87R1MSLTiKNp5BdlXmkOF36Fd4Gpjz-2WbrQtD9FlsOPajaQ95OAo_tGgydYgYwtIsDz3OFjJRZyXkxz6v3xAovmHWRZj41BA8kqHnJUFLVHXm8uBHmoZREErXlQxrvW7k9liCGx2ExvpDkjKCPbRl6QT8jWVJkpRLy867YLhfj-Sw11feecubSTAGM3l62wJuJsCi6JGsPZh97E5ZAVSe8Y-TlEcygk-pJvC7cDat0F7C16G4qC33rRFRYeRsOyNuJJjhNmotriIcmZWlpqxld7Rac59ItT4EEvZQ45uLgPraRdUsHEGYPgyfpQbM5DMbOC4RlZDDx-kpumvb1vMkrth_LlHO_cq4iMdk7-PArSqWMmwVGAjujcswBFIPdihsz3qbTdg%3D%3D)** To meet our fundraising goals, I must raise $33,400 before Christmas.

This will help pay my hard-working staff. Cover upcoming travel as well as train and equip the brave undercover journalists who will still be working over the holiday break as government officials are taking time off to travel and meet "new friends" like us.

So far this month, we've raised only 10% of our required budget, and I'm getting worried.

[**Please make a year-end donation to help me and my team keep going.

clean_body: When I created O’Keefe Media Group, I did so knowing there would be few breaks. Corruption doesn’t sleep. | Dear Friend, A sense of absolute joy abounds as I've traveled the country during this holiday season. Americans are optimistic about the future of our nation, and they should be! A rapid shift is occurring, and it's up to us to make sure it progresses and these positive changes stick! When I created O'Keefe Media Group, I did so knowing there would be few breaks. Corruption doesn't sleep. If you're not aware of OMG, so far in 2024, we have: ✓ Exposed the biased inner workings of Disney, IBM, and Google ✓ Uncovered the web of money funding illegal immigration ✓ Gone undercover to get the inside story of the White House, Congress, the CIA, the IRS, the Pentagon and many more government agencies ✓ Exposed a plot to monopolize cryptocurrency ✓ Investigated the Secret Service and their failure to protect President Trump ✓ Infiltrated the DNC convention ✓ Exposed massive fraud within the Democrat's fundraising platform, ActBlue ✓ Went undercover to capture the hypocrisy of MSNBC ✓ Filmed Meta engineers admit to election interference ✓ Monitored the vote in the 2024 election ✓ Exposed the massive incompetence of FEMA ✓ Highlighted the fraud behind NIH and the COVID scam ✓ And produced a groundbreaking documentary on immigration, Line in the Sand. And we're not done yet! The holidays are always financially challenging for organizations like mine. While people are in a giving mood, donations typically go to well-meaning organizations that help children in need or families. They rarely go to groups like mine that fight the negative elements in society. To meet our fundraising goals, I must raise $33,400 before Christmas. This will help pay my hard-working staff. Cover upcoming travel as well as train and equip the brave undercover journalists who will still be working over the holiday break as government officials are taking time off to travel and meet "new friends" like us. So far this month, we've raised only 10% of our required budget, and I'm getting worried. **It will be put to immediate use. Please don't forget about us. We remain hard at work for you, the American people, and the Truth. Thank you again for all that you do. In Truth, James O'Keefe Founder and CEO O'Keefe Media Group Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Bah! Humbug!
body:
Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c13d73e790f146a19d1c9343004c1c5f&_e=POOMmR-vCJX0_19bN_qOFSOjQ4h4SJWEgQwrUlt2Jn3pvOKv1CVD6O7oKE8Bw8iyWSPQM-CVuQk9ix4M8lOxGnGzfhV3WmGPi7YQJ8xlRgUSG7bPRETwS_2X_TcSxmvQdLk-AYr77Yn2s-kT4Bra0Ulh9gn-HjxfjVGmP7xsA9zOjsDekMgCvpZuVzaCoNF96y5-ObNYWGHZycpOgWgIORf2vdNCCzbRoxjwf27S5-f18dSTb7ebJ1sG5oDh7jL0IZfndShtYIJ9nGuno39whepL5BA401NThBBb-zenWEU99eyNtg2O0Uyre1uTF2cZVTq7QGUZNFBSD0ZvJa_Y8T-lyaJmRm8_5rh2Zdkw1mqVSPHn66u3QtJghsGqLTJezEsBpYT-e9fASUelJZlx4rAW7g6-hYzj78EFczbu-Yw%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol._ "

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c13d73e790f146a19d1c9343004c1c5f&_e=POOMmR-vCJX0_19bN_qOFSOjQ4h4SJWEgQwrUlt2Jn3pvOKv1CVD6O7oKE8Bw8iyWSPQM-CVuQk9ix4M8lOxGnGzfhV3WmGPi7YQJ8xlRgUSG7bPRETwS_2X_TcSxmvQdLk-AYr77Yn2s-kT4Bra0Ulh9gn-HjxfjVGmP7xsA9zOjsDekMgCvpZuVzaCoNF96y5-ObNYWGHZycpOgWgIORf2vdNCCzbRoxjwf27S5-f18dSTb7ebJ1sG5oDh7jL0IZfndShtYIJ9nGuno39whZN-_PYo3e8T-MCMMoNXfs9q4VnXFNP_vGftNhRt92kHpldPCkZ4Vaamqo0pPwOB6O_JepRljYfZTZdp_G8cWpFg3WUos5BAHZoxT44V4x7AEYTDHlgQFGIyAzAI1okuFFQBsYXbpwjSD41m6sv41Qs%3D)
Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives.

You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ ," by clicking on the link below.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c13d73e790f146a19d1c9343004c1c5f&_e=POOMmR-vCJX0_19bN_qOFSOjQ4h4SJWEgQwrUlt2Jn3pvOKv1CVD6O7oKE8Bw8iyWSPQM-CVuQk9ix4M8lOxGnGzfhV3WmGPi7YQJ8xlRgUSG7bPRETwS_2X_TcSxmvQdLk-AYr77Yn2s-kT4Bra0Ulh9gn-HjxfjVGmP7xsA9zOjsDekMgCvpZuVzaCoNF96y5-ObNYWGHZycpOgWgIORf2vdNCCzbRoxjwf27S5-f18dSTb7ebJ1sG5oDh7jL0IZfndShtYIJ9nGuno39whc-8yvzIJQ_O-Ejyoh7HoIo18r4LzCwlQ6CBK2XGsM6xFPwR_fYoakDCV8EUZz5JPWmrQO9bABd0qAGKg8p15Y14pngRGIF0Nvrs1LN_HzdOngfiR3OEbCqynLcwff3Mv_AqjBiMJBr-JRB7speWnS0%3D)**

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

---

Conservative Liberty Wire
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=c13d73e790f146a19d1c9343004c1c5f&_t=QHBDfeGHKMqCOyy-NpoCFctUuAVkIsYyc5eANamNyshZ-aGo8SD4shyhQv0jMVc4k9_FERMEfaOIrx0XwkGbMRKjvm9ln5_8FM_G50Vob5nlemy8jmuS5TriswJKkdev5p2R2eyV76AiL6UdMEfiJO4mWKM3cjhwvY5TW5X8ayc%3D)

name: 4Patriots
subject: Food shortages are coming
body:
We asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible.

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. "I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6a9a210000524a259d356df778de0443&_e=p_hpCW2dP-aAudj0R3OI1Ptli3yF4-7todCQh1vu65nPnhYBoboe65jqTpl-i-df3byjXg8rtaAR-iG7NElZEqXThcTrPJTq-PZVKAJLUGeufZlXL6Kqau96ffvqn-xpND92w3WMisBzD-JyDiruzo7T7VzREu_IJZQwTenXN9xwcCfRiusd2B2ifcBjxbZmU3P0llKFgWHabNgDSPEk9AmTQUtNYZPg710A6j5LeYw6agpZolTtEEdgGntsNVCZbnogJOnl4rnf_6AWQEutn1QYoGYnMn_rZpyoP3J_tfIg8axUS2ZB59ZvaUXUzua-OnimRhwuGVR55SJRG0X8sdIbQ7A7q2ByoAZ75E6tkG7JinhkyJPsgX-JewAoCOCg)

name: Hillsdale College via Full Mag News
subject: Bah! Humbug!
body:
Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d4587de74e6640ee9815ea8611a9089d&_e=kGj8a0DPkKivs4fPCSjPiXpP8fgYdvVsF3-ClmXzvXVMah-kFj5tfwNJ5eCRjw_T9JcePiQ6bCHNKfYz7P92NDPkVF_QuPXtaNHnqsOtYRtfqDhsFELLrBuYQl6nG5Wm49tum-9nyXbNiz3_FlHueB75mpSzF9553KlVE_4IZaN8cw1Dlgc02YNXSri2R4X3jNIj_uOEeABvXNrYSFnDx1a8eWsZIYG4SmIwianqt1eSoUgC4tUvffDoj5XcuHEG3fctYqroZdHdfpUT9FBJw7jiCq7nFzIaR7i9SvAPiknSg1gh7VcZ5N5EkdN-gDLjDSRZoYQ1wwpxWF7lzdekxgnIzQG5fN4bWBwBKlIk66_icdrGz9a2VpRsk3U7T0yCc4ehwR45FPfl-Ux_hanpoRwBjWTYHpRrM-KRiG5ktiw%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol._ "

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d4587de74e6640ee9815ea8611a9089d&_e=kGj8a0DPkKivs4fPCSjPiXpP8fgYdvVsF3-ClmXzvXVMah-kFj5tfwNJ5eCRjw_T9JcePiQ6bCHNKfYz7P92NDPkVF_QuPXtaNHnqsOtYRtfqDhsFELLrBuYQl6nG5Wm49tum-9nyXbNiz3_FlHueB75mpSzF9553KlVE_4IZaN8cw1Dlgc02YNXSri2R4X3jNIj_uOEeABvXNrYSFnDx1a8eWsZIYG4SmIwianqt1eSoUgC4tUvffDoj5XcuHEG3fctYqroZdHdfpUT9FBJw2DbgaqXxOyvb2ArOD6oF2LLpO58987_CvZZQe36rBBfkxLsD_6ppKwvzxzzMQOLZ01y3gD3cBYcNbelvMGb2RccnL76VitQpxhFCblFWaaVwfYGVUDrt8sT5t2wy8AC62XgEKwqz5c5sBrETgwdTcw%3D)
Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives.

You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ ," by clicking on the link below.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d4587de74e6640ee9815ea8611a9089d&_e=kGj8a0DPkKivs4fPCSjPiXpP8fgYdvVsF3-ClmXzvXVMah-kFj5tfwNJ5eCRjw_T9JcePiQ6bCHNKfYz7P92NDPkVF_QuPXtaNHnqsOtYRtfqDhsFELLrBuYQl6nG5Wm49tum-9nyXbNiz3_FlHueB75mpSzF9553KlVE_4IZaN8cw1Dlgc02YNXSri2R4X3jNIj_uOEeABvXNrYSFnDx1a8eWsZIYG4SmIwianqt1eSoUgC4tUvffDoj5XcuHEG3fctYqroZdHdfpUT9FBJwyHPBSc7CUO2XoJTYzPrww4YL4I5YAa0r9COmAPvr0ac_ic6CXCTBGQ0tRY-GPucYccLb-Y_PgcRq9d8okHE--5rmQe2m8VY5nlDGjUItSOO_4pyl8yBSqmrc1-9W6rA0Bd558OpADJ7gMtdC1Fb5oE%3D)**

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

body:
We have one final deadline to meet. Can we do it?

|

| | |

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: “Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol” – Our free online course
body:
Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sizzS_GyKllQMXshLLXEPA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpTSriP0S-~~)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol._ "

[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sizzS_GyKllQMXshLLXEPA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpTSriP0S-~~)
Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives.

You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ ," by clicking on the link below.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sizzS_GyKllQMXshLLXEPA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpTSriP0S-~~)**

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

| | From the Desk of

# **[Kari Lake](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b0b6452327fe48358845a84732f72433&_e=97KhCGYYbLtC_dqHWhn8zzldIz8m1gBwf30V3ViBDNwblDGk_Vhy38ta9fx_bwh00Tw2DAyEPU13OUiqTutlIZPwJM0bT4CqccMhACQHqTmRtJa8AWFf3zwjQcsmOZz2UChmuUnjN8kyWlRQpgsiZLZuVEKfBsYUXeP4zxJNp4FN9ZTqCylVQuOjU8R3mh9j7ho_UmpIXz1j_vdE7zFmXi-AyRkWfFO70ewsW8BzfRxfZk_kkR8UAHkN3LVjaM1hwluZJimKIo4yhd6n9-p36y6QUMSqZCw3JQ3Erqipftd_n8wU9eC_zTBZcMZOAk74bIWxoJYDzapR6VMNJBvsU01ayLpGHeE_IlO8KJMR__hRuALDqm1tBuFy1fbXm0atvvrw7RGTMOTP3BJ5W3DyqmUwnYdLckXcskm-t5mGPVhSzZ30xMryqBLle94iBB_w)**

Dear Friend,I wanted to send you this _Christmas Card_ to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Friend, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Friend, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider **[generously helping me this Christmas.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b0b6452327fe48358845a84732f72433&_e=97KhCGYYbLtC_dqHWhn8zzldIz8m1gBwf30V3ViBDNwblDGk_Vhy38ta9fx_bwh00Tw2DAyEPU13OUiqTutlIZPwJM0bT4CqccMhACQHqTmRtJa8AWFf3zwjQcsmOZz2UChmuUnjN8kyWlRQpgsiZLZuVEKfBsYUXeP4zxJNp4FN9ZTqCylVQuOjU8R3mh9j7ho_UmpIXz1j_vdE7zFmXi-AyRkWfFO70ewsW8BzfRxfZk_kkR8UAHkN3LVjaM1hwluZJimKIo4yhd6n9-p362YUObcxGimiTlzZJHnq8NwEu2nswYA11zH4SQodTC5XBfZmvQz477reu6wsEo_IeVbMbwekO0q8yl1nUJSR875x6DLdjQ0810A2ULvBW963HyMSZc5PLoUBJMXkAr6k1mG-9asfuRLGMvzaeTxzAeYqqNx7kTgrxpSajPi-tUlx)** Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Friend, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones.
---
Friend, I’m **not** giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you.
---
You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country.
---
_Not_ the Left’s lawfare._Not_ power-drunk liberal prosecutors._Not_ litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.
---
[Will you help me defeat the left’s lawfare by rushing back a generous contribution to my “**First Amendment Fund** ”?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b0b6452327fe48358845a84732f72433&_e=97KhCGYYbLtC_dqHWhn8zzldIz8m1gBwf30V3ViBDNwblDGk_Vhy38ta9fx_bwh00Tw2DAyEPU13OUiqTutlIZPwJM0bT4CqccMhACQHqTmRtJa8AWFf3zwjQcsmOZz2UChmuUnjN8kyWlRQpgsiZLZuVEKfBsYUXeP4zxJNp4FN9ZTqCylVQuOjU8R3mh9j7ho_UmpIXz1j_vdE7zFmXi-AyRkWfFO70ewsW8BzfRxfZk_kkR8UAHkN3LVjaM1hwluZJimKIo4yhd6n9-p36816VGHcqxGOQ-el5HsW11sEsDnD6AvrGi778ad953pX_D-NSqP5bO01B-7FlLDMSa8P4sJDk_bF6886r5HQ9U-kwCGa1zdq-rV7lFcIyncL7b1GsT2oiDiapcsAVNbv5N4gNbyFdYKXBqvH9UVyBnuemPn8PdUk5BxESu3GAmwT)Your generous support will help me cover the outstanding court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsel, and more. The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility.They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.Friend, it’s scary to think about what this Christmas might look like if the Left had won... Thanks to generous supporters like you, I’m spending this holiday with my family. But these legal bills are looming over our heads. I would be so thankful if you could help out.Your donation will get me one step closer to paying off these legal bills. But if you’re in the position to send more, I want you to know personally how much it means to me and how large of an impact it will have. Every dollar given will help me finish this fight... without financially destroying my family.[All I ask is that rush your “**First Amendment Fund” Emergency Contribution** before midnight, if you can.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b0b6452327fe48358845a84732f72433&_e=97KhCGYYbLtC_dqHWhn8zzldIz8m1gBwf30V3ViBDNwblDGk_Vhy38ta9fx_bwh00Tw2DAyEPU13OUiqTutlIZPwJM0bT4CqccMhACQHqTmRtJa8AWFf3zwjQcsmOZz2UChmuUnjN8kyWlRQpgsiZLZuVEKfBsYUXeP4zxJNp4FN9ZTqCylVQuOjU8R3mh9j7ho_UmpIXz1j_vdE7zFmXi-AyRkWfFO70ewsW8BzfRxfZk_kkR8UAHkN3LVjaM1hwluZJimKIo4yhd6n9-p36wJ5-P4ZsxWGCjs6jOan-rbfQyMaQzcBqwu4-HagH_cZABUVONRcWu6Ee9-Gv5gIACedi9rDfom2FJ55ltgI_E8zsi854yWJYkVbH05A1ibhYVz7cgTinS8_Hd5N9ya-PbRjkX0MxdxDon0Jw-jkz3YBxFAgzz67oKXMtjDRZn3G)

Hi,

This is Majority Leader Steve Scalise. I respect you too much to waste your time. I get it. You're busy with more important things.

**But I needed to make sure you had your eyes on this before you log off for the holidays.**

I just penned our final memo for 2024. Three new Special Elections could determine the fate of our House Majority AND our Republican Trifecta that will fast-track President Trump's agenda.

_I humbly ask you to read every word. _

The significance of what we're about to tell you cannot be overstated. _**[Use this secure link to review my memo as soon as possible:](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=240b714170dd41eeabbdd039fe898fc2&_e=LJHb70v8-Im939rRTZAGWnyjDUOVeFh-ZpUe_7FhnVKvU9iz1RkU6NyvnG4DExp25Ie6TcXvVIXh3tHS8Nak_uECxMbzPQw4V3UkJFAKQvkFYSO1k5qYsUw0FS6vh4iFAblU21wVqSxW-3PyZsux7uFL684lQGla7V4VWZuUl7A-_ly5tyQipUFs5ruX7ZmXnXtiALRpdNtB2XC-e2O7w2CoZGcio86WCmzTcyEKKWMhADsx8cUwJqI8xrrZv534tr74DKO4IQk1AG7GTfWrNgE_8qxfP4dYgo1yXk87ezZmo4p_VsZF44D9FnvDNKitkZp9LTnimPMfs8c7s7m5nt9CKUw2YwXFtjfKbRD7DYJFeZxuxDVb3bl8I3bi4rpoU740lXslMMDPw2qgDff4Zuc4ptrlDigZZZvMZn4Dx9OO_VlTLW2HiKh_0HZ-fjlwvaRFuikhBXph78E266qGXw%3D%3D "Use this secure link to review my memo as soon as possible:")**_

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: “Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol” – Our free online course
body:
Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/cKCsB-wWbaCdUR_hDp1Mdg~~/AARclAA~)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol._ "

[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/cKCsB-wWbaCdUR_hDp1Mdg~~/AARclAA~)
Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives.

You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ ," by clicking on the link below.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/cKCsB-wWbaCdUR_hDp1Mdg~~/AARclAA~)**

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

---

Conservative Broadcast
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you , you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. More Raving Customer Reviews! Rory H. "I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." Billy H. "Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." Kevin S. "The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." Carol B. "I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." Ken K. "I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." Justin A. "My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." Gary M. "I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." John H. "We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." name: Hillsdale College via Inside Scoop Politics
subject: Bah! Humbug!
body:
Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

This sponsored message from Inside Scoop Politics is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkUGL2zAQhX-NfLOxRooVH3xIcQwLu9uyKfQoFGnsDMiSkeT27xe3ac97fQ_em2_ejzf9ZshTWN7NigPlrFPWwegHeV_bR6JcamtSfdfQgqw51CA1r9xwAn6ezxUOXIlTK0XXnarHMN-NnOWseiXmWcrOzede9M6Iu23VXaiKhiOHA0jO-RmgaTtUiMCFc70yqmey3TdnCjYUMjnMNsZti54K2dzEtFR-eJSyZSYuDCYGUwyeAjbHxdkZjw26ncFk454yZgZTwoVywXSIf4hWkw-o6JmYsmVibHnbw3sLEl6Bj1_H6_XGoNvLqnPck0Umxi3FvKEtFJantaKjfWVixNWQf4rWrJuhJTAx_u_6W_X0YygYChPjF_394_Lyev3Q3y71y-1W_3tMlQa3_SLvKXeKyXY54hsb16p8fqCfA_wOAAD__yyGmeA)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol._ "

[](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkUGL2zAQhX-NfLOxRooVH3xIcQwLu9uyKfQoFGnsDMiSkeT27xe3ac97fQ_em2_ejzf9ZshTWN7NigPlrFPWwegHeV_bR6JcamtSfdfQgqw51CA1r9xwAn6ezxUOXIlTK0XXnarHMN-NnOWseiXmWcrOzede9M6Iu23VXaiKhiOHA0jO-RmgaTtUiMCFc70yqmey3TdnCjYUMjnMNsZti54K2dzEtFR-eJSyZSYuDCYGUwyeAjbHxdkZjw26ncFk454yZgZTwoVywXSIf4hWkw-o6JmYsmVibHnbw3sLEl6Bj1_H6_XGoNvLqnPck0Umxi3FvKEtFJantaKjfWVixNWQf4rWrJuhJTAx_u_6W_X0YygYChPjF_394_Lyev3Q3y71y-1W_3tMlQa3_SLvKXeKyXY54hsb16p8fqCfA_wOAAD__yyGmeA)
Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives.

You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ ," by clicking on the link below.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkUGL2zAQhX-NfLOxRooVH3xIcQwLu9uyKfQoFGnsDMiSkeT27xe3ac97fQ_em2_ejzf9ZshTWN7NigPlrFPWwegHeV_bR6JcamtSfdfQgqw51CA1r9xwAn6ezxUOXIlTK0XXnarHMN-NnOWseiXmWcrOzede9M6Iu23VXaiKhiOHA0jO-RmgaTtUiMCFc70yqmey3TdnCjYUMjnMNsZti54K2dzEtFR-eJSyZSYuDCYGUwyeAjbHxdkZjw26ncFk454yZgZTwoVywXSIf4hWkw-o6JmYsmVibHnbw3sLEl6Bj1_H6_XGoNvLqnPck0Umxi3FvKEtFJantaKjfWVixNWQf4rWrJuhJTAx_u_6W_X0YygYChPjF_394_Lyev3Q3y71y-1W_3tMlQa3_SLvKXeKyXY54hsb16p8fqCfA_wOAAD__yyGmeA)**

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

---

Inside Scoop Politics
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

clean_body: Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite. This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile. "Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster." Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite. The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser. But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol. " Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of A Christmas Carol , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation. In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster." It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine. Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year. And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives. You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol ," by clicking on the link below. And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well. Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

## Paxton Sues NCAA over Transgender Athletes
Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton [filed a lawsuit against the NCAA](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O4yAUhZ_G7rC4FxzsgmIbd9l2S4ufGxsJQwRsnLz9KNFoumnPz6ej8--6Xk2IIW1_zUG6PW95RY6SATKUqzchvlbZe225n6EnDUqMXMyzUP2uwdkJgYgUNxYUTWBn77xUhCicvfRBv2GAKAEEgBzEpLzlnuMISt4EdZKTDy2Xoe3U6GnqLb7yg8rg8tFHvbd2r5340-HS4XKe55CsS3TWt9_hUu-5tNrh4nKMtBH7ET4wZlrLJdGLbZSomMjqf6osOWNYKya9A3ukRpWd-aBUv_usuGRgGnG89EX7-xliDPWiOsm3w4T4Wdd-veuh8SsAAP__H1VwOw) in a state district court on Sunday, alleging it is engaging in deceptive practices by allowing biological males who identify as transgender to compete in women’s college sports. Citing the [Texas Deceptive Trade Practices Act](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DGP4yAQBeBfY3cTmRliTOHiGnd77ZURgXGCloAFs3Hy709Ov92TnvRJ7_37uny5mGK-_XUPnuW1lgsOqEEhoL4EF9P7ovswX4dgVc-zMnQeyFoy_X32Kwc7jTgaWq0nQ9M1IDNdiZnIuz7OB6YQtVKklD7RZMJ1CAOeldErcacHDlFKPcmdhV-ureldnlxPvjz6NN9FttbRnw6XDpd930_fzx8-yg4XVyX6xB0umffW4bKVFCX6I34scCKlZn7DjTNXl-CbM2zuJSVD--EG2TsH2weKm5NYMkh1ud04B67g5J5YuMFeHpwbtK1UOXgcLaxDWD0yAZuzAT0aC9NoESbC0Z6t9Xa0fZ3DtseUYhtNp4fbw8X02Sa_nv2c8X8AAAD__5ICgsk), Paxton asked the court to bar transgender athletes from competing in women’s sports in Texas or stop the NCAA from labeling these events as women’s sports. “ _The NCAA is intentionally and knowingly jeopardizing the safety and wellbeing of women by deceptively changing women’s competitions into co-ed competitions_ ,” [said Paxton](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00D-PnDAQBfBPA90g_9s1FC7S0F3alGjAA2vF2MiewPLtozsl5XWv-Onp6f36mD4wxJC2n7iT4_eaJyWUAalAmcljiPdkWu9m4QfZkpNWP4QeBm3bl3vSbAfqn55W1LbH3vbC0Iymn5feL482uM8yqZSRUktpOt1bPwsv1ENas2pqjCAfOJeOX8T0xrrGO59UuiXvbXQv5qM2-kejxkaN13V1XwiZc0l0b5SoYOy2fDZqTHTVRo2FImGlz_jfwT8IvynBgW_OCeofqpAWRDhKZloYrrxTqlCPXLgCJg9HoZMSwxxyzFtYMMJOCTwtdHA4Kd5tcf64QoyhPm1jxLZjiF_j-ds3T6f-BgAA__--k33Y). In 2023, Texas legislators passed a law requiring athletes at state-funded schools to compete on teams designated for their biological sex, expanding restrictions earlier applied to public K-12 schools.
## Biden Gives 7 Texans on Death Row Life in Prison
Seven federal inmates from Texas are among 37 death row prisoners who [had their sentences commuted](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L_OnDAQBPCnMZ3R7to-m8JFGrovbUrkP8thycAJnOPu7aOckvJrR6OfRvPra_oKpZbt_jOs7Ntr3icC0hJJkp5yKPU96S77CHnAjj1aZUANg7Ld4m-I1mVjgAFd1HNKZObgDBhM2jroiv-LIZFGVIi6V87mCBnIoNWzYqGBc2n70beFG7_COdf3_uSjT_vaVb-09jiF-iFoFDRe19WneOLQt6egMRytpMqCxo2vU9BY9xSqoPEDCRpjybzJzKEt8tgvmfZ1_d04_4tO3hpvieX_PjkjAVKmm5mlJUCpLZB0KoMMEGN0NlkG6g6fH1eptZw3KzTc11DqZ3H79sKnpz8BAAD__3u9b9M) by President Joe Biden on Monday morning, receiving life sentences without the possibility of parole. Biden, who [issued a moratorium on federal executions](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGu4yAURL8Gd1hwjeOkoEjjrbLtlhZwLzErDBEQO_n7p6R_1RQzGh2df7flZkIM6f7XbKTby-cFBCgugYNa0IT4XlSH2gq8yI60nIZRDJfLMHWrtk5ZJ8_CqdFLO06ncTKIFs-eLEoPXdCfMwmgpBykVP1wntAKFDDKSfmBmBKEoeXSt5UavUz18Z13Kr3LWxf12tqjsuHKYGYwH8fRbzV9OgYzJf6sDOZExydcCRsxmP9n4jYgJe7ytj0bVe4JqZjIkUxbeaXUKDniPhdeaf8u0x5cI-Qh8S8Gg9kUfr3KI93-vLui8XGEGEM9TUyJ-2ZC_CK2X53tGn4CAAD__-tlcOw) when he took office, said his actions this week were aimed at sparing prisoners from President-elect Trump’s vow to resume such executions. All of those previously scheduled for execution had been convicted of murder. All but one of the Texas inmates were sentenced for killing a fellow prisoner. [See the list here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OozAUhZ_GdEbX1wZD4WIbd9l2S-SfS7DW4AickLz9KNFMOe05R5-Ovn-X6eJSTtv1r1vJ1OdcJgRUXCBHNUWX8mtSTTQe4igaMkLLDuQ4St0sJkbo5wG0V5oUaQHQj12nhll56dQQmmTeMIGohJBCqFYOOnqIgJ3QapbEFFBMtextXajS0x1zfpUH7W0oa5PNUuvtYPIPQ8vQnufZ_l_K_V0ytG6vKWRiaDc6D4Y2l-AyQ_sBMbQ-Rdp4JFcXvpeTh7Ku90rxOzpoq7QF4j97HDoOECL23cw1guBKA_JBRuAOvPeDDpoAm93E25lyTkevmYLr6lL-PK6_KnwY_AoAAP__D9hwew). The president's announcement comes less than two weeks after he pardoned 39 inmates convicted of nonviolent crimes and commuted the sentences of nearly 1,500 people who were released from prison and placed on home confinement during the pandemic.
## Cowboys Cheerleader Gifts $600 Blowdryers
Dallas Cowboys cheerleader Marissa Phillips [surprised her 40 fellow squad members](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLsOm0AQAL8GurXuxau4Io07p02JlrvFrLL4CHeA_feR06ceaTSaX4_xgSz8ev7ElXx5z2k0yjjQBowbI7J8RldHP6k46Jq87myj7DDYrl784OY22IhaBYOdpWDcMIXZtk2vzeRszf4r08Y4ra3W7mb7Lk4qKtPozs2WKqcockn7rSxU6I15lk86ab-FtNbil1K2XNkflblX5r5R2oS-qDL3iCKYIaRrSp8MYSHahTDSDkJ4UganYCaRdEH-c2CEldaJ9gy5sAjwC_KSwm-4uCzAr8gnxwMFjhyhVQpOlIMgLDvnsmKGJ88lQ9-1Td-qevdxu1iEc9tVTj1XZPkXXf578fTmbwAAAP__0-B2-Q) with $600 Dyson Airwrap blowdryers during their Christmas party, documenting the unwrapping on social media. In a [series of Instagram videos](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FqwzAQgOGnkbYY3elkWYOGluAtpdChtIuRLdkWyHawRZS8fUn37D8f_N-X7uJiiuv04ZZg833cOhRIJ8ATUuddTI-OuLe98AZ4sKClEtIYqflsBwIB3qi6ETL0vTSurrUiMjX2RqmGR_vEAJEAJABVstG-F16gAk2jDIxE8DFve5XnkMPdHWN6bLewV8O28GTnnK8Hk28MW4ZtKaWK65HdtLvlWTBs9xASw_Z8Xj_18PP--1UYtny3_lpiSvGoNSMxLS6mfzK_fLxZ_AsAAP__7uVRjA), Phillips described her teammates as her “best friends” and said they “deserve the world.” She also thanked Dyson for helping her pull off the surprise and gave a shoutout to her fiancé for his help wrapping the gifts. Her teammates took to the comments section to express their excitement and surprise, describing the moment as “iconic” and calling Phillips “my favorite Santa ever.”
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kEGLuzAQRz9NvFWSmbHRQw5_EG_9Q2GhewvRjDUQq2ha22-_2N097vXHm8fwLid7ciGG2_W_G9mkZz9ZkEAHBQcg612IL0uZN630lcrYKI2FxKpCnQ2mLwvukXxbgW-p01RCSVDJwrtSu67MgtllCoCUQqUox1L7VnoJhdLUIwuS7EOaljwNnPjp1j6-pgcveTeNWTRDSvMq8J-ARkCzbVs-crglXjqe084IaFBXCGcBzef5AvXHjmJzD15grVBjIeC43lslsE4D2x__9wgC6xtva-SUfjfc78ACvUNki_HzFmIM61ELktfRhfh-Lv1Z62HgKwAA___2p2fn) Does your furry friend need care? Citing the , Paxton asked the court to bar transgender athletes from competing in women’s sports in Texas or stop the NCAA from labeling these events as women’s sports. “ The NCAA is intentionally and knowingly jeopardizing the safety and wellbeing of women by deceptively changing women’s competitions into co-ed competitions ,” . In 2023, Texas legislators passed a law requiring athletes at state-funded schools to compete on teams designated for their biological sex, expanding restrictions earlier applied to public K-12 schools. Biden Gives 7 Texans on Death Row Life in Prison Seven federal inmates from Texas are among 37 death row prisoners who by President Joe Biden on Monday morning, receiving life sentences without the possibility of parole. Biden, who when he took office, said his actions this week were aimed at sparing prisoners from President-elect Trump’s vow to resume such executions. All of those previously scheduled for execution had been convicted of murder. All but one of the Texas inmates were sentenced for killing a fellow prisoner. . The president's announcement comes less than two weeks after he pardoned 39 inmates convicted of nonviolent crimes and commuted the sentences of nearly 1,500 people who were released from prison and placed on home confinement during the pandemic. Cowboys Cheerleader Gifts $600 Blowdryers Dallas Cowboys cheerleader Marissa Phillips with $600 Dyson Airwrap blowdryers during their Christmas party, documenting the unwrapping on social media. In a , Phillips described her teammates as her “best friends” and said they “deserve the world.” She also thanked Dyson for helping her pull off the surprise and gave a shoutout to her fiancé for his help wrapping the gifts. subject: Biden Cuts Death Sentences, Asteroid Near Miss, and a Fireworks Bust
body:
President Joe Biden commuted the sentences of [37 federal death row inmates](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAQhX-NvRHBHWB3YOiSLV07WhiO-CpsLEyS5t9XaeeO7z3p6dP3eZkunjNv1w-_kmupTCBBCwUC9BQ95-ek--gSERD25NSARmqpxrFfHI5kUCWjAO1sDKRgpYzeaPTRj1L37F5vCkArhRbsSYVhRmnwLRKSQey0pMit1NNX4a0tlPKz3KmeQln77JbW9qPD9w7OHZz9vtHjeE2vUBuHTB2cZ460iUi-LaKWhwhlXW_NNy7bIVq9rbugbwq3vyLZYTYktTYYovLe4ojBKDsHpRNK2VcX9wfnzIcdOi2vq-f8i9P-03N38BMAAP__2gFl8w), reducing their punishment to life imprisonment without parole.

# Tuesday, December 24, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1826, a drunken Christmas party at the United States Military Academy escalated into [the eggnog riot](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z8FqhDAQANCvSW4rmZkY10MOhSK92OtCLxLNRFPiZtG4xb8v7X1_4MG79UPvYor3-dOtbEvIAyrUF8AL6sG7mM5BS28DMzJJttBQrbSC61Uu1oAPxDBSaxhgbDXXAcAYGieeXHAy2j8NEDUAGTQVTM1IqqbWM3FNJLRiH0vequ8c72XhkM785K2a8iqTXUp57ILeBHYCuzMf5ahGFth9zfhRbqXUvRbUBXbl2FjQ-764jb3crH_8xJTibhqh1by6mP7J8qr4tPgbAAD__0thUl4), which involved over one-third of the cadets after a large quantity of whiskey had been smuggled into the academy. Happy Christmas Eve to our readers! Today in our _Holiday_ section, we feature a husband who accepted his wife's dare to dress up as Buddy from _Elf_ and reenact scenes in public on the actual streets of New York. [Check out the video here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFugzAQxvGnMZuR72wgHjx0oVO6dkTGPuAqg1Fwgnj7Kt07_6RPn_7f9-HuOfE2f_mVXJnygAqNBJRohug5XYOpopuIkHRFDjrdKKPgdqsWZ2Jrle1US6MF24EGUKOyDQRNtpluFbv3GiAaAN1iW0PoRq0abSNparQWRlHkkh_1T-atLDSlK7_oUYe8VsktpeyH0B8Ce4G9H8NG51HP-c0C-8_7W3q_croE9i-OlAX24zPGS1Ka5LHnUijK7Qry9Fzk8jxGv0XpQ6C98DbLkyc6JEDbGURsq4eL-8kp8dF2wqh59Zz-3pT_6rwc_gYAAP__q4ZlJg) Today's sponsor is the [Voice of the Martyrs](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z71uwyAUxfGngc0W3Is_MjBUSj0lXTsiYi4JFTEWkFh--8rdu_90jv7fV3O1IYbl_mWfpKtPBgSoRkIDyjgb4m4Ud9oTASEnLQfshBJyHPlDn24j-oHUSfqhU1ZIgajsiN6S9b2QPOhjTQIoKbGHvpXzcEPR4ckRUofIlCAXasrtTwpLfZCPe3pTbuf05FE_al0Lww8GE4Np27Z2pVxoftWQlsMwmHayuaHFNZnKmpZCB8bJlPTKM5k5OWJ4_rzIfryAOvOs3bqFGEPpB6bE_WlD_Lur_-W_NfwGAAD__7EkW28), who are helping provide aid to Christians in hostile territories.

## Biden Commutes Federal Death Sentences
President Joe Biden commuted the sentences of [37 federal death row inmates](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAQhX-NvRHBHWB3YOiSLV07WhiO-CpsLEyS5t9XaeeO7z3p6dP3eZkunjNv1w-_kmupTCBBCwUC9BQ95-ek--gSERD25NSARmqpxrFfHI5kUCWjAO1sDKRgpYzeaPTRj1L37F5vCkArhRbsSYVhRmnwLRKSQey0pMit1NNX4a0tlPKz3KmeQln77JbW9qPD9w7OHZz9vtHjeE2vUBuHTB2cZ460iUi-LaKWhwhlXW_NNy7bIVq9rbugbwq3vyLZYTYktTYYovLe4ojBKDsHpRNK2VcX9wfnzIcdOi2vq-f8i9P-03N38BMAAP__2gFl8w), reducing their punishment to life imprisonment without parole. His move [leaves only three people](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kMFq9CAURp_G7Ax6r4nOwsUPP9lNN6V0GYzeTCxGh2hnmLcv6b7b74PD4Xxe56uLKebbm9vJtrXMIEBxCRzUHFxMr1l1wa5EQNiRlRoHoYQ0ptusNNp7ckasQwB5GYVQsBgdFA0DGRW6aE-aBFBS4ghjL71eUAx4CYQ0IDIlKMRWjv6rxNw2WtOrPOjofdm7ZLfW7pXhPwYTg8ktPtOz9rdy3gymj3cG0xIDZe7Lvn83qrxSbpQ9VY6ax7y7c1wp0OESD-Taxo_yZDDVVo4XwykGhv-l1ELheDHdYcP9GVOKddRMidvuYvq1aX_VeVj4CQAA__93lmWD) still facing execution on federal charges: Boston Marathon bomber Dzhokhar Tsarnaev, Charleston church shooter Dylann Roof, and Pittsburgh synagogue mass shooter Robert Bowers. Biden said the decision aligns with his administration’s moratorium on federal executions and aims to prevent President-elect Donald Trump from resuming capital punishment. Trump’s team [condemned Biden’s decision](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00D9vwyAUBPBPA5sjeIDtDAxdvKVrRwvDc3gVfyJDE-XbV-7e-U6_k-7rtt4cJSr3T5fR9r2uIEAPEgbQa3CU3qvmwe6IgIqjlZMyQgs5zzxa72B3sMFoTBBOiW0EN-7yOqtw1g0ne2oSQEupRhgv0k-bEkZdAyo0SjEtMFCvx-W7UukR9_SuTzwuvmaebOz90Zj6YLAwWHrESCmdGYMl1owFX43B4kKmQq0frlMtDBYjjJazGTYKWAZfc_7p2IaGpWPx2AZ_UCdP7YT4YcPjRSlRGyemxT07-hvh_b9DnhZ-AwAA___3-2MP), calling it “abhorrent” and a “slap in the face” to victims and their families.
## Luigi Mangione Pleads Not Guilty
Suspected killer Luigi [Mangione pleaded not guilty](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0jzFvhSAUhX8Nbhq5gOjA0MXtde1oEK54G4QXpM-8f9_YvdtJzsn58n09loelSCl82gNN3fICPciWQwty8Zbie5GNNxsioGjQcC1UL3s-js1unNqknkCsGlfl7TQiKhynbeSr0I5DQ-Z-4wCSczHA0HGnV9ErMXkUqIRgskdPNZfuO1OqO27xnV9YOpePJpq91ufJxAeDmcF8XVfn1jPhdd49g_mODOb4Q4Haw6ZAOWFrS7EU0oGptme1FVu32xLwnjbF-OdFMdI5aCb7cFiKf7T6n_3LwG8AAAD__yENXT4) Monday in a New York court to charges of murdering CEO Brian Thompson outside a Manhattan hotel earlier this month. Mangione faces [three murder charges](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOtSAUhJ8GOwwcULwFxd_Y3b_d0iAc9ewimCte17ffuP12k0zmy8x8PIeno0hp_u9WtGXKAwjQXAIHPQRH8Rp0FeyECKgqtNKoRmghu65aLHZGdAIbB-phnPCTVy0YMUqQkzLTWJG9aRJAS6laaGvpzahEox4BFTZKMS0wUMmv-jNTKgtO8cpvfNU-r1W0SynbztQ_Bj2D_jzP2qfR3yaD_kYz6CXcWjHo92Pf0BdOiR-JCoYFXSwLx2_0R6E38i-K91YeD5qJry7NlBPyLaILO0-58PmgWK56KWusXjZs553YW8O0mFdH8bdY-euot4WfAAAA___gc2r_), including one for terrorism-related murder, according to an 11-count state indictment. If convicted, he could serve a maximum sentence of life in prison without parole. He also faces [federal charges](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OqzAUhJ8GOkf2OTY_hYvbpMttt0QGj8G7BkfgJMrbr0i_5Wg0o2_m6zbcXExxm_-7FbaEPJAkLRQJ0oN3Mb0HXXsbAALXsKplI7VUXVcv1vQgBfZGEbfo1MjBcxNGqNA1GqijPdsUkVaKG2ouampHloZ7D4ZhrrSEjyXvl-8ct7IgpHd-Yr9Mea2TXUq5HxX_q-ha0dXdN7yO0zrFXuKUUNH1scUCv8Clskxuh5iQxU9M5yqRHnGOYnXbHPMG0cm2d2YcYQLjwyF7ZnItaamazte79ffXmT2attJyXl1MH5jy1zlPS78BAAD__3ubZUM) that could potentially result in the death penalty. Prosecutors have indicated that the two cases will proceed on parallel tracks, with the state charges anticipated to go to trial first. Mangione's attorney has [raised concerns](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LtuxCAQheGngY7VMODLFhRp3G3alBY244UEG8uM1tq3j5w-9ZG-I_1fj_HhU07b89Ov5HgpIwJapVGhHYNP-T1aGdxChGQkOd2ZBizovpfRtX0fFj1NGDrTwkwdAELTInXTHWBeZHKXphGt1qbF9qbnbjLQmHsgQ40xwgKFxOW4fZe0caQlv8uLjttcVpldZN6rMB8CB4EDR4op52sTOMSy0kZnFThU9kzq9DxHgUNz-U2vVr89U9lIeeZybPRWNfu1qp2OXZ0-_wgc5OHCfqacU207YeG5-vR3IPm_GC-HvwEAAP__4FRguA) about the fairness of his trial, calling his treatment a 'spectacle' after the highly publicized perp walk.
## Weather Could Disrupt Holiday Travel
No significant storms are [predicted for this week](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAUhH-NvWHBexg7A0OXbOna0SLwCFQ4REBD8--rNOrY8U6f7qTv47SdTEzxenk3O-nm8wYcJBPAQG7OxPTY5Oi0JwLCkbRYcOaSi3Udg-Z-xtm41duzh1UpgQspOFh0ZgVY_Bj1c00ASCFQgZqEXc7IZzw4QpoRB8nJxZbL9JnjtQXy6ZHvVCab9zHp0NqtDvg2wHGAY-998vm7k2nhhTzLV2JX6nWAow0l1rabykJO0ZkHa8XcKbE_zudC1tTGvupYtLv1mFKsahkkv-wmpt_n9p-Ju4afAAAA___ZtGJu), but periods of rain and winter weather are anticipated to disrupt holiday travel, particularly in the eastern U.S. Rain, snow, and freezing rain are forecast for Washington, D.C., Maryland, and northern Virginia. A fast-moving system has prompted [a Winter Weather Advisory](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFutDAQhJ8GOiN7beAoXPzNdfe3KdGC18dGxj7ZFuTy9BHp086MRp--j8f8QA4cn_9xJ1t9mkGCEQoEmNkhh_dsWmc9EZBuyapR99JIdbu1m10UTQBmHKRGHIxejOmd9v20eI84yZbt9aYAjFJ6gKFT67ho2evJkaZe68ZIclxT7j4Tx7qRD-90UO7WtLfBbrW-SqP_NXBv4H6eZ-fTV-_Wq27gHuksV86xUhYnYd0oC3QHl5Tfwmeib45PkZGjKDGd4pVK4SWQWLfMpe5YBB0k9pTjNcQ1p1KE2482W_c6OQQuw9gY-dyRwy9V_cvSYeEnAAD__1FpbOU) in effect today from 5 a.m. to 1 p.m. Light to moderate snow is expected this morning in Wisconsin and Michigan before moving into the Northeast and New England. Meanwhile, the West and Northwest will experience a series of storms that will bring light to moderate rain and windy conditions. Overall, only 18 states, all in the Northeast, are facing hazardous travel conditions. [See a map of potentially challenging conditions here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD2P4yAQQH-N3WHBDP5IQXFNulx7pUXMEM8tNhGMgvLvV9l--6enp_fvtt48Jz4ff_1BTmJeQYNVBhTYNXhO79X2wUUiIOzJmRlHbbVZln53W5z1smxxRgx6vE8UFxwx2snry90E6tl9bAbAGoMTTIPZ5jvqES-BkEbEzmoKLLkM_zOfslNM7_yiMmz56JPbRZ61wz8dXDu4ttaGk1ptRF8foIPrtu-Fqxy-qsanUFFVcjnU4Z_KLKqKF6qq5VJFSfEvSmrLZ2DhfFYFWo9o5r648GycEtdp7qx-HJ7TT4H8duTl4DsAAP__6vlkOQ).

It will also help provide a voice for them among the global body of Christ. Your gift will be used in the following ways:
* Responding to the immediate and ongoing needs of persecuted Christians

* Providing Bibles to Christians in hostile areas and restricted nations
* Encourage and equip believers to remain steadfast in their faith

Prosecutors have indicated that the two cases will proceed on parallel tracks, with the state charges anticipated to go to trial first.
