name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: “Charles Dickens’ A Christmas Carol” – Our free online course
body:
Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=538aeed1df43431d93c08b822cec3efe&_e=EP8eUS31XRdOXWv3VpcBgxN1vcfMZD5kDnnEpVkUzMhJxm5xnpU3DbHe7diFGO8WO2Ikk-3qGhvje8Y1V7rxM4-EiAL9dGQ_3Tv7yqok_9y_KG1zV8XcADN91lIQ667Dfaizp0cZPfaISvxfCI4FC7QulUTt4YNRMrXKNHxvHHfsghGnjMKL1raYqvdU63i5oVRufwX1agdkGAm2VnUksUOCAoppci3jPqdVIljRC7KL8_T-MW3gZ1MH_KqFKOtyAMlY4yXVJ2DqIRmYGoy9lFV11Gp1QF3L8edh7GzfqVOmciiKXPKPiApoum9FEdFRo8jhm_lZWl9Q767-AA6aNFWvR6XDLtD5URR44_l9cGf7c5V0VoRXv9kaqIQziLGj4kkFhVsSSq6w4eFGJJxOlSbQ3z56HkiV2xY7nbH2WN4%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol._ "

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=538aeed1df43431d93c08b822cec3efe&_e=EP8eUS31XRdOXWv3VpcBgxN1vcfMZD5kDnnEpVkUzMhJxm5xnpU3DbHe7diFGO8WO2Ikk-3qGhvje8Y1V7rxM4-EiAL9dGQ_3Tv7yqok_9y_KG1zV8XcADN91lIQ667Dfaizp0cZPfaISvxfCI4FC7QulUTt4YNRMrXKNHxvHHfsghGnjMKL1raYqvdU63i5oVRufwX1agdkGAm2VnUksUOCAoppci3jPqdVIljRC7KL8_T-MW3gZ1MH_KqFKOtyAMlY4yXVJ2DqIRmYGoy9lKYazLGRX7NdY4XTkY2NuF2O58Znc07c-UcBXPBva4WVjM8BvbptyH1aykkkkuoItisMTTEUR6w78ikuiTUwWcU0fYmK81ZYehmPfBfQgWwmtotr1jbdIVUsWGaUzk_XWuCSIn04jXhQEBi8XBs08fo%3D)
Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives.

You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ ," by clicking on the link below.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=538aeed1df43431d93c08b822cec3efe&_e=EP8eUS31XRdOXWv3VpcBgxN1vcfMZD5kDnnEpVkUzMhJxm5xnpU3DbHe7diFGO8WO2Ikk-3qGhvje8Y1V7rxM4-EiAL9dGQ_3Tv7yqok_9y_KG1zV8XcADN91lIQ667Dfaizp0cZPfaISvxfCI4FC7QulUTt4YNRMrXKNHxvHHfsghGnjMKL1raYqvdU63i5oVRufwX1agdkGAm2VnUksUOCAoppci3jPqdVIljRC7KL8_T-MW3gZ1MH_KqFKOtyAMlY4yXVJ2DqIRmYGoy9lPOrLNiLzTgZozTaVpgLlNYkBNY-y4dWehSqSMdbIwB1q-ByXIHw3EVbNtXdEiJc6JCb-O3anXVoPzJHMy-GmtL9Yyq3bOh8uqSHtYmS0OLPdvQYtq8qe1fplyWLS6okhVYgvHrxhVn--b5xDFMnEFk%3D)**

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

---

clean_body: Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile. "Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster." Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite. The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser. But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol. " Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of A Christmas Carol , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation. In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster." It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine. Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year. And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives. You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol ," by clicking on the link below. And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well. Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College Reclaiming American Freedom PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: “Charles Dickens’ A Christmas Carol” – Our free online course
body:
Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=facc7b08380c4be29fcb8881a26fcc38&_e=6Z2WAUP1p19Mg-H87kLQ79b1b7WJTpn4Fh0iSgXlkik1XFro28n3DMiUB0nU49XJY1D5GY9CbFIwUCBBoAvlfDd2dcbeeDR1O3Vs2EIkBsWtarllMyzPhQ5noupENMPlN9PHZikviy-y6lxLEfbKfcZUCQjQ566jxJS8wC1XJSy2B1THYNMnUEP98UQXJt72uZPRPINqEM30pm2vHXm6EOifCt9uFEA1CK5XpOuWbPuf38hiI7uOUWxwSKdSddDfBP1grkm5Cx69fPRlITsDWFbYi6YeK35myhpv1RghgexgrRr70KicO8OU2-iOVMjQpaTe5lkUwwijzFiMkXXSzMaZsfydzK7j5JYNM_QQJ3wK0XhFY0iM8GMZjquIO1v8t1fGvzpiFULQkYpNEahnDVHcUno3rK7Oq0BpJ7ARsHM%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol._ "

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=facc7b08380c4be29fcb8881a26fcc38&_e=6Z2WAUP1p19Mg-H87kLQ79b1b7WJTpn4Fh0iSgXlkik1XFro28n3DMiUB0nU49XJY1D5GY9CbFIwUCBBoAvlfDd2dcbeeDR1O3Vs2EIkBsWtarllMyzPhQ5noupENMPlN9PHZikviy-y6lxLEfbKfcZUCQjQ566jxJS8wC1XJSy2B1THYNMnUEP98UQXJt72uZPRPINqEM30pm2vHXm6EOifCt9uFEA1CK5XpOuWbPuf38hiI7uOUWxwSKdSddDfBP1grkm5Cx69fPRlITsDWNrxNKphTTnej721Wq-dztmqQUjEhFlYtepQQiFZIPpsIGgUuUUZ6N87vesbLLnawnMpmDQsbkKpV4AT-ajtfo6bNz2uHllCmtwXmoChRfQ7p9hVNZq1WqZsbBYZ6ow_8zQCX2BYsnI_JxySAf2KgD0%3D)
Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives.

You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ ," by clicking on the link below.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=facc7b08380c4be29fcb8881a26fcc38&_e=6Z2WAUP1p19Mg-H87kLQ79b1b7WJTpn4Fh0iSgXlkik1XFro28n3DMiUB0nU49XJY1D5GY9CbFIwUCBBoAvlfDd2dcbeeDR1O3Vs2EIkBsWtarllMyzPhQ5noupENMPlN9PHZikviy-y6lxLEfbKfcZUCQjQ566jxJS8wC1XJSy2B1THYNMnUEP98UQXJt72uZPRPINqEM30pm2vHXm6EOifCt9uFEA1CK5XpOuWbPuf38hiI7uOUWxwSKdSddDfBP1grkm5Cx69fPRlITsDWGeQzfNcE5nYbaPdvEQK6A6_lMarfF5Vau07zkaO6lep7g90bkldS_qdtsCLHn5EyalNtVKwYitvtbIn1I00eP11q7JBuR0tFRSZWpgDeVqLMOv_Hseifc3di4gXhd2HWPYKLFyDOEGKPnXRKdQjF_M%3D)**

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

---

Freedom Nation Today
---

clean_body: Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile. "Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster." Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite. The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser. But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol. " Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of A Christmas Carol , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation. In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster." It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine. Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year. And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives. You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol ," by clicking on the link below. And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well. Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I’d like your thoughts on life, family, and freedom
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWy4SjSWJN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWy4SjSWJN

Dear
Fellow Patriot,

My team
and I are committed to championing the values that strengthen our
nation-life, family, and freedom. We're boldly standing up for
pro-life principles and leading the charge for the significant
improvement of our education system, with special emphasis on the
teaching of true American history.

Although
our resolve is unwavering, and our mission is clear, I need your
help to refine our strategies and improve our efforts. Your
invaluable perspective plays a critical role in shaping the
future of our efforts.

I have
prepared a brief survey about life, family and freedom that seeks
to understand your views better. The survey focuses on the
following key areas:

The
value of life for unborn children and the importance of pro-life
advocacy.
The
role of family in shaping our future and the influence of
education in reinforcing family values.
Your
views on individual freedoms and the significance of teaching our
nation's founding principles.

You can
start the survey here:
https://offers.americancornerstone.org/life-family-freedom-survey/

Your
feedback is crucial as we strive to address the issues that
matter most to you. Together, we can work towards meaningful
change in our communities and uphold the conservative values that
make our nation great.

Thank you
for taking the time to share your thoughts. I sincerely
appreciate your time, input, and unwavering support!

Best
Regards,

Dr. Ben
Carson
Founder
and Chairman
American
Cornerstone Institute

Your
donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and
preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our
country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods
to decrease the federal government's role in society and to
improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Copyright
© 2024 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved.

This is Majority Leader Steve Scalise. I respect you too much to waste your time. I get it. You're busy with more important things.

**But I needed to make sure you had your eyes on this before you log off for the holidays.**

I just penned our final memo for 2024. Three new Special Elections could determine the fate of our House Majority AND our Republican Trifecta that will fast-track President Trump's agenda.

_I humbly ask you to read every word. _

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: Bah! Humbug!
body:
Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4ced42fb0fe5483fb843943dca464a96&_e=JZ4ShgRWMg4uvmnizYA0ErlktcPvGvfGeu2NZsNU3fBj344sXbDXnXVnfO14Hg42a6mzyjmSGofWHOhJjHsG-nU51no-xhg6HwLxEFYVVBYkoypr5Wym-HlUxmy-D-sqzFsqIoZPh3ckQCW7kw00j-1DnvDrnUcLDQbZCF9o5BAevPj1BpWcylIy1Ssa9i24Xb5_i0HZAoINIB6WPkhdxE323fWbvsiKI5DQ2JhLIYeMEzGddAOWP-JkljVTTy9ZhnTRS97YUF7txgAIo4PE_6uhSJDuTnEylO5oFRW2GdrfKwiB3NCmx00Hq210g3bdbaLe8a9j01ArB72-VMFZxtq2zS16vKj0PLo2NSWIVQvS2hJXP2zSJAdGUa2DOnmzGz1qWF6-f3sujyj_09S6yH02wlLe2QdRlPeBBC2SKPA%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol._ "

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4ced42fb0fe5483fb843943dca464a96&_e=JZ4ShgRWMg4uvmnizYA0ErlktcPvGvfGeu2NZsNU3fBj344sXbDXnXVnfO14Hg42a6mzyjmSGofWHOhJjHsG-nU51no-xhg6HwLxEFYVVBYkoypr5Wym-HlUxmy-D-sqzFsqIoZPh3ckQCW7kw00j-1DnvDrnUcLDQbZCF9o5BAevPj1BpWcylIy1Ssa9i24Xb5_i0HZAoINIB6WPkhdxE323fWbvsiKI5DQ2JhLIYeMEzGddAOWP-JkljVTTy9ZhnTRS97YUF7txgAIo4PE_2mPvDagJdWvfHj0Jxz-qxMHUt2QbxbJ3s_S1QBqcFvg6zzA6CFzK_yFyusMDpfEVVlrZ_UT5hN6WFFO41V5xKVtk8EYl9j96fxF7OsnAdYGR9tdY6PiDu0jhksujB12XThIx17Rv-iK4xNkIFxJyLk%3D)
Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives.

You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ ," by clicking on the link below.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4ced42fb0fe5483fb843943dca464a96&_e=JZ4ShgRWMg4uvmnizYA0ErlktcPvGvfGeu2NZsNU3fBj344sXbDXnXVnfO14Hg42a6mzyjmSGofWHOhJjHsG-nU51no-xhg6HwLxEFYVVBYkoypr5Wym-HlUxmy-D-sqzFsqIoZPh3ckQCW7kw00j-1DnvDrnUcLDQbZCF9o5BAevPj1BpWcylIy1Ssa9i24Xb5_i0HZAoINIB6WPkhdxE323fWbvsiKI5DQ2JhLIYeMEzGddAOWP-JkljVTTy9ZhnTRS97YUF7txgAIo4PE_2x18EGaw9wCmGTYKY95IYA07--FaP3at6eESSMFPo1XE0Tggq9S17GS8YfaIvJA9qXke5GZ2d6o7znXguG67oPRriVqIsatktp142pnc2MmJq2pFP4J4idLPmi7L5SPsHhzFKvotq7Elm9Uj_GnQ0Y%3D)**

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

---

Conservatives Give
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

This is Majority Leader Steve Scalise. I respect you too much to waste your time. I get it. You're busy with more important things.

**But I needed to make sure you had your eyes on this before you log off for the holidays.**

I just penned our final memo for 2024. Three new Special Elections could determine the fate of our House Majority AND our Republican Trifecta that will fast-track President Trump's agenda.

_I humbly ask you to read every word. _

I just penned our final memo for 2024. Three new Special Elections could determine the fate of our House Majority AND our Republican Trifecta that will fast-track President Trump's agenda. I humbly ask you to read every word. The significance of what we're about to tell you cannot be overstated. "Use this secure link to review my memo as soon as possible:" | | "READ MY FULL MEMO →" Thank you, - Steve STEVE SCALISE House Majority Leader | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my "First 100 Days Survey"** so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first. | | | "CLICK TO BEGIN" - STEVE SCALISE | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: 🎤 Baby all I want for Christmas, is…
body:
Peter, It’s Christmas Eve. There is something so sacred and still about this day. The anticipation. The waiting.
|
---
| Peter, It’s Christmas Eve. There is something so sacred and still about this day. The anticipation. The waiting. As a child, Christmas Eve was magic. Preparing for Santa. Setting out the milk and cookies. Wondering what would be left under the tree. Wondering if you heard something on the roof. As a parent, the magic is renewed as you watch it through the eyes of your children. Today, my Christmas list might read... “just secure the border already!” or “please, not another tax increase!” But while we’ve left behind the days of wish lists and letters to Santa, we haven’t outgrown the longings of childhood. The objects of our longing are just different. More abstract.
* Peace on earth – and closer to home.
* Stability – financial, emotional, or relational.
* Joy that isn’t lost in our circumstances.
* Health – mental and physical.
* Closeness with those we love.
* Hope that a better future is in our grasp – or at least in our children and grandchildren’s.

And while extremist politics have sought to divide us more than ever in our history, we are reminded at times like these that at our core, we all share these same longings. For love. For peace. For a better world. I hope you find your deeper wishes coming true this Christmas and that you find joy in the small moments. May the magic and wonder grow as we open our eyes to receive and share life’s greatest gifts. Merry Christmas to you and yours. For New Jersey, Elizabeth Nader
---
|
---

subject: Merry Christmas: The Gift of Winning
body:
Are you tired of winning yet? Get ready, lots of winning ahead in 2025

| | | | |

|
# My Friends, Neighbors, and Fellow Republicans....
#
# Merry Christmas
---
|
---
| | | | | “Christmas is not a time nor a season, but a state of mind. To cherish peace and goodwill, to be plenteous in mercy, is to have the real spirit of Christmas.” **\- Calvin Coolidge**
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| **Mark Your Calendar and****Let’s Bring the Winning to Connecticut!**

|

CDM Founder L Todd Wood will lead a discussion on the underlying reasons for the Ukraine conflict, and why it must end immediately.

Additional panelists will be announced soon.WHEN: Tuesday January 14, 2025, 6pmWHERE: Westport VFW Post 399, [465 Riverside Avenue](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=fe07abbfce&e=8763c56857), Westport, CT

body:
Three new Special Elections could determine the fate of our House Majority AND our Republican Trifecta that will fast-track President Trump’s agenda.

|
---
| | | | [](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkUGL5CAQhX-NuRliaTQ55DAw9G2WZRnYo9im0i2oHbSSmZ-_uNC3OfSxqPe-96j6-2E_XIgh3365hAsVsqVaOm31LvItZBd5wvSwMIDiAjgoC926KAOr1B0uwshxGEEZ3d0XNa1S-W025rqJza94xVFPyqthm7WAuQtL4wgAJaQy49gbOV8HPXsxiU2P28rU4CIWqj3dseB-XGPwLhO61PtH6uJyJ9ork28MLgwuFf1RsP8KueDaFAwuTcxb_1CxjfeCyOuOPrjIMaKn8MiVx60h5KU0RAn5xuQ7lQMZ6IOS9S7tLtwyk-_Pzvb3G__88yl6IaQBsCTGaZpnzYUZNQON35bC-qLhGfPIhJla9smpEPCnmYH-PvL5w6Yry7p_hRhD1Yap4ZZciP_PQ69-8FzgXwAAAP__BUmbcA "Majority Leader Steve Scalise")
---

Hi,

This is Majority Leader Steve Scalise. I respect you too much to waste your time. I get it. You're busy with more important things.

**But I needed to make sure you had your eyes on this before you log off for the holidays.**

I just penned our final memo for 2024. Three new Special Elections could determine the fate of our House Majority AND our Republican Trifecta that will fast-track President Trump's agenda.

_I humbly ask you to read every word. _

The significance of what we're about to tell you cannot be overstated. _**[Use this secure link to review my memo as soon as possible:](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkUGL5CAQhX-NuRliaTQ55DAw9G2WZRnYo9im0i2oHbSSmZ-_uNC3OfSxqPe-96j6-2E_XIgh3365hAsVsqVaOm31LvItZBd5wvSwMIDiAjgoC926KAOr1B0uwshxGEEZ3d0XNa1S-W025rqJza94xVFPyqthm7WAuQtL4wgAJaQy49gbOV8HPXsxiU2P28rU4CIWqj3dseB-XGPwLhO61PtH6uJyJ9ork28MLgwuFf1RsP8KueDaFAwuTcxb_1CxjfeCyOuOPrjIMaKn8MiVx60h5KU0RAn5xuQ7lQMZ6IOS9S7tLtwyk-_Pzvb3G__88yl6IaQBsCTGaZpnzYUZNQON35bC-qLhGfPIhJla9smpEPCnmYH-PvL5w6Yry7p_hRhD1Yap4ZZciP_PQ69-8FzgXwAAAP__BUmbcA "Use this secure link to review my memo as soon as possible:")**_
| | [READ MY FULL MEMO ->](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkUGL5CAQhX-NuRliaTQ55DAw9G2WZRnYo9im0i2oHbSSmZ-_uNC3OfSxqPe-96j6-2E_XIgh3365hAsVsqVaOm31LvItZBd5wvSwMIDiAjgoC926KAOr1B0uwshxGEEZ3d0XNa1S-W025rqJza94xVFPyqthm7WAuQtL4wgAJaQy49gbOV8HPXsxiU2P28rU4CIWqj3dseB-XGPwLhO61PtH6uJyJ9ork28MLgwuFf1RsP8KueDaFAwuTcxb_1CxjfeCyOuOPrjIMaKn8MiVx60h5KU0RAn5xuQ7lQMZ6IOS9S7tLtwyk-_Pzvb3G__88yl6IaQBsCTGaZpnzYUZNQON35bC-qLhGfPIhJla9smpEPCnmYH-PvL5w6Yry7p_hRhD1Yap4ZZciP_PQ69-8FzgXwAAAP__BUmbcA "READ MY FULL MEMO →")
---

Thank you,
_- Steve_

**STEVE SCALISE**
House Majority Leader

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkT9r5TAQxD-N3MlYq3_PhYtAcJfjOAJXCtlavyeQZSOtneTbHz54XYrUO_ObYefvm3vzMcV8_-VXHKiQK9XR6ersE19i9omvuG4OOlBcAAfloAmDshCkaXAQVupOg7KmeQxKemOnZZp0L2QPQvswgZ7E7OfQ2w6bOFwcAaCEVFbr1sp-6kw_i5tYjF4CU51PWKi29MCC-zGlOPtM6Nd23tYmDQ-ivTL5wmBkMFacj4LtR8wFw6VgMF5ifvWPFRmMSyyVuOg6HvxX5fUoJ37xZdsIywWRY7kgJeY7k69UDmRgDlrd7Nfdx3tm8vXZ2v1-4e9_3kUrhLQAjoS-3frecGG1YWDw01EMPzQ8Y7ZMmOnKPjkVAv40MzCfRz6_uTRlCPtHTClWY5nq7quP6f-D6KcbngP8CwAA___nrJvA "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.

name: Hillsdale College via Old Glory Today
subject: “Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol” – Our free online course
body:
Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

This sponsored message from Old Glory Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/01fkjhpj4kuI5tn4Z2kdAg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpTVFIP0S-~~)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol._ "

[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/01fkjhpj4kuI5tn4Z2kdAg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpTVFIP0S-~~)
Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives.

You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ ," by clicking on the link below.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/01fkjhpj4kuI5tn4Z2kdAg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpTVFIP0S-~~)**

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

---

subject: A Merry and Blessed Christmas

body:
When I created O’Keefe Media Group, I did so knowing there would be few breaks. Corruption doesn’t sleep.

| | |

#
---
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yQTess5JImn7MBj77R42jw~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
MERRY CHRISTMAS _From Kari, Jeff, Ruby, and Leo_
---
| | From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yQTess5JImn7MBj77R42jw~~/AARclAA~~~)**
---
|
---
Dear Friend,I wanted to send you this _Christmas Card_ to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Friend, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Friend, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider **[generously helping me this Christmas.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yQTess5JImn7MBj77R42jw~~/AARclAA~~~)** Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Friend, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones.
---
Friend, I’m **not** giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you.
---
You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country.
---
_Not_ the Left’s lawfare._Not_ power-drunk liberal prosecutors._Not_ litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.
---
[Will you help me defeat the left’s lawfare by rushing back a generous contribution to my “**First Amendment Fund** ”?](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yQTess5JImn7MBj77R42jw~~/AARclAA~~~)Your generous support will help me cover the outstanding court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsel, and more. The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility.They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.Friend, it’s scary to think about what this Christmas might look like if the Left had won... Thanks to generous supporters like you, I’m spending this holiday with my family. But these legal bills are looming over our heads. I would be so thankful if you could help out.Your donation will get me one step closer to paying off these legal bills. But if you’re in the position to send more, I want you to know personally how much it means to me and how large of an impact it will have. Every dollar given will help me finish this fight... without financially destroying my family.[All I ask is that rush your “**First Amendment Fund” Emergency Contribution** before midnight, if you can.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yQTess5JImn7MBj77R42jw~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
[ **DONATE **](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yQTess5JImn7MBj77R42jw~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
Thank you for always being there for me, especially during this holiday season. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Merry Christmas,
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake
---
|
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake

A generous group has stepped up and offered to help me pay off these outstanding bills, but they can’t do it without your generous support. Will you please help me end this lawfare by rushing your **“[First Amendment Fund” Emergency Contribution?](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yQTess5JImn7MBj77R42jw~~/AARclAA~~~)** Thank you for your support during this difficult time, and Merry Christmas to you and your family.

# **[Kari Lake](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=919e81b0d7354a418fcf06fb3e1f9ecc&_e=o6Ll1VDO8b8sfZ-98GTXc7HcsX6u7iTY-rhCOT2QZj_4MfzWZ4JmSdP3RPSaUF7yUWMqHX4h8Oo6UU7rGqFmMbt8v5RkikvXiNaw-IBIOOhJCI-LGVYkVYhgpkIhoDXvGVjeJAh0mVhwZJgzw7gkNIugqXfjsD9j8z2CwZuGFK_Z-nsoodtr777TQmiUi7Onfd7SUBAILr3c8Shdp-rlfNhH59TiWXjtGnIJLXyM0kLjjiGyQv2SsNn9ZW7KiE7SGeAmqYwtdlZZ8fQR_BBzRmg7e3u0EBH8w5t-pG6fZij5pGq5DNhWtzhEhL7ym_y7PfynpwxSpBsdgLKgnChMxaXkWV_k3sAMnWag5f4AB--wWCW3z6hNgRV4VrX8f1j1WrjIw2-PJ4bVJ3zNmsaGTEkMZpyd9-slrRpgz8w0VOQ%3D)**

Dear Fellow Patriot,I wanted to send you this _Christmas Card_ to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Fellow Patriot, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Fellow Patriot, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider **[generously helping me this Christmas.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=919e81b0d7354a418fcf06fb3e1f9ecc&_e=o6Ll1VDO8b8sfZ-98GTXc7HcsX6u7iTY-rhCOT2QZj_4MfzWZ4JmSdP3RPSaUF7yUWMqHX4h8Oo6UU7rGqFmMbt8v5RkikvXiNaw-IBIOOhJCI-LGVYkVYhgpkIhoDXvGVjeJAh0mVhwZJgzw7gkNIugqXfjsD9j8z2CwZuGFK_Z-nsoodtr777TQmiUi7Onfd7SUBAILr3c8Shdp-rlfNhH59TiWXjtGnIJLXyM0kLjjiGyQv2SsNn9ZW7KiE7SGeAmqYwtdlZZ8fQR_BBzRgfvJ7OYh4RB0LFtl1Xbmr66Je6HH0Wzf0tjp-LpEGFUoQIz-ek8f_1GiXGltUCmTOx4ftqETkC6hGE33bbi52D62ZrhojPKUseSsECTyEtMisQRRlBFZnt-Y5erOnU5fPmHCOcM1wpmeNf1hFykQ5k%3D)** Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Fellow Patriot, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones.
---
Fellow Patriot, I’m **not** giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you.
---
You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country.
---
_Not_ the Left’s lawfare._Not_ power-drunk liberal prosecutors._Not_ litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.
---
[Will you help me defeat the left’s lawfare by rushing back a generous contribution to my “**First Amendment Fund** ”?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=919e81b0d7354a418fcf06fb3e1f9ecc&_e=o6Ll1VDO8b8sfZ-98GTXc7HcsX6u7iTY-rhCOT2QZj_4MfzWZ4JmSdP3RPSaUF7yUWMqHX4h8Oo6UU7rGqFmMbt8v5RkikvXiNaw-IBIOOhJCI-LGVYkVYhgpkIhoDXvGVjeJAh0mVhwZJgzw7gkNIugqXfjsD9j8z2CwZuGFK_Z-nsoodtr777TQmiUi7Onfd7SUBAILr3c8Shdp-rlfNhH59TiWXjtGnIJLXyM0kLjjiGyQv2SsNn9ZW7KiE7SGeAmqYwtdlZZ8fQR_BBzRiSu7o_vx_QEGwG0jpsHF_eGTrTxxJE24UCK_Hn6iMqvjkivi4RhnZLizLDHvhKBwJ6lpHZcY08rjKZmTsZr8woK5k0yQt2JCsY-0uAsdaVqFPMcZu9TEB_px31tqDosJ0QYupBRWqm1f_iUaf30g3Y%3D)Your generous support will help me cover the outstanding court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsel, and more. The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility.They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.Fellow Patriot, it’s scary to think about what this Christmas might look like if the Left had won... name: The New Pennsylvania Project
subject: Umoja to Imani: 7 Principles for 2025
body:
| | |
---
| | Hi Friend ,
---
| |
---
As we wrap up 2024 and head into 2025, we're thinking a lot about the seven principles of Kwanzaa:
---
**Umoja (Unity)
****Kujichagulia (Self-Determination)
****Ujima (Collective Work and Responsibility)
****Ujamaa (Cooperative Economics)
****Nia (Purpose)
****Kuumba (Creativity)
****Imani (Faith)**
---
Kwanzaa is a week-long secular celebration of African American culture, history, and values that takes place for seven days, from December 26th to January 1st. **It is a time to reflect on achievements, promote unity, and recommit to cultural ideals.**

**We're spending time reflecting on our own achievements here at NPP, and we wanted to share seven of them with you** :

---
# Seven 2024 achievements we're celebrating:
---
1\. Since 2021 we, along with the affiliated New PA Project Education Fund, have assisted more than **48,000 Pennsylvanians** in registering to vote 2\. In 2024, NPP and NPPEF assisted more than **13,000 Pennsylvanians** in registering to vote.

3. **78%** of voters self-identified as belonging to a**community of color**. 4\. Developed over **50 partnerships** with like-minded community organizations!5\. More than **46 virtual and in-person community events** , including candidate forums, town halls, community conversations, and webinars. 6\. Expanded year-round voter registration, civic education and mobilization in a total of **20 counties**.7\. Knocked **55,320 doors in the two weeks** before Election Day, exceeding out initial goals!

That's a whole lot of gratitude right there. We couldn't do it without you.

---
---
We hope you keep your loved ones close this holiday season. Rest up and take it easy - there's a lot to get ready for in 2025.

Whether you celebrate Kwanzaa, Hanukkah, Christmas, or the New Year, we wish you and your family the best for the holidays to come!

Your friends at New Pennsylvania Project
---
|
---
# UPCOMING EVENTS

---
| |
---
|
# Why Courts Matter: 201
---
Thursday January 30th
6:30-8:00PM
Online via Zoom

We will be hosting our second virtual town hall alongside **_Why Courts Matter - Pennsylvania_** , on the importance of our state and federal courts.**
**

clean_body: | | | | | Hi Friend , | | As we wrap up 2024 and head into 2025, we're thinking a lot about the seven principles of Kwanzaa: Umoja (Unity) Kujichagulia (Self-Determination) Ujima (Collective Work and Responsibility) Ujamaa (Cooperative Economics) Nia (Purpose) Kuumba (Creativity) Imani (Faith) Kwanzaa is a week-long secular celebration of African American culture, history, and values that takes place for seven days, from December 26th to January 1st. It is a time to reflect on achievements, promote unity, and recommit to cultural ideals. We're spending time reflecting on our own achievements here at NPP, and we wanted to share seven of them with you : Seven 2024 achievements we're celebrating: 1\. Since 2021 we, along with the affiliated New PA Project Education Fund, have assisted more than 48,000 Pennsylvanians in registering to vote 2\. In 2024, NPP and NPPEF assisted more than 13,000 Pennsylvanians in registering to vote. 3. 78% of voters self-identified as belonging to acommunity of color. 4\. Developed over 50 partnerships with like-minded community organizations!5\. More than 46 virtual and in-person community events , including candidate forums, town halls, community conversations, and webinars. 6\. Expanded year-round voter registration, civic education and mobilization in a total of 20 counties.7\. Knocked 55,320 doors in the two weeks before Election Day, exceeding out initial goals! That's a whole lot of gratitude right there. We couldn't do it without you. We hope you keep your loved ones close this holiday season. Rest up and take it easy - there's a lot to get ready for in 2025. Whether you celebrate Kwanzaa, Hanukkah, Christmas, or the New Year, we wish you and your family the best for the holidays to come! Your friends at New Pennsylvania Project | UPCOMING EVENTS | | | Why Courts Matter: 201 Thursday January 30th 6:30-8:00PM Online via Zoom We will be hosting our second virtual town hall alongside Why Courts Matter - Pennsylvania , on the importance of our state and federal courts. . | | | Last day to register to vote: Monday, May 5, 2025 Primary Election: Tuesday, May 20, 2025 Last day to register to vote for the General Election: Monday, October 20, 2025 Last day to request mail-in ballot: Tuesday, October 28, 2025 General Election: Tuesday, November 4, 2025 | Important Links: Voter Hotlines: Voter Protection Hotline: 1-866-OUR-VOTEDOS PA Voter Hotline: 1-877-VOTESPA Spanish/English Hotline: 1-866-VE-Y-VOTAAsian Languages Hotline: 1-888-API-VOTE Arabic/English Hotline: 1-844-YALLA-US | | Our Contact Information New Pennsylvania Project P.O. Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 4126996771 | | | | | ---|---|---

The TOP spot on our Christmas card for JD Vance is on hold just for YOU! Sign ASAP: https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=f7fb8948b6f2e7b33ea8e8f068c895d7533c110013046c0aa72e95296f586efd46ed64d28297ad521067f1a071986dc6cdc4d6945e7653241caa255128689903 WISH VP-ELECT JD VANCE A MERRY CHRISTMAS: https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=f7fb8948b6f2e7b33ea8e8f068c895d7533c110013046c0aa72e95296f586efd46ed64d28297ad521067f1a071986dc6cdc4d6945e7653241caa255128689903 >" alias="ADD YOUR NAME >>" conversion="false" data-linkto="https://">ADD YOUR NAME >> - Team Marsha ---------- Forwarded message --------- To: < https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=f7fb8948b6f2e7b33ea8e8f068c895d7533c110013046c0aa72e95296f586efd46ed64d28297ad521067f1a071986dc6cdc4d6945e7653241caa255128689903 dpwillis67@gmail.com > Date: Fri, Dec 20, 2024 at 6:18 PM ET Subject: Will you help wish VP-Elect JD Vance a MERRY CHRISTMAS? “Merry Christmas! We hope you have a wonderful holiday and we can’t wait until you and President Trump MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!” TO: Vice President-Elect JD Vance FROM: Peter Peter - we have an exclusive opportunity JUST for you! We just finished combing through our records to find the TOP 500 Trump-Vance supporters on our file, and your support profile blew us away! So now we are inviting YOU, Peter, to be the FIRST signature on our card to wish MERRY CHRISTMAS to Vice President-Elect JD Vance! We are opening up this card to everyone on our list first thing tomorrow morning, so make sure to take advantage of this exclusive opportunity as soon as possible to be the first to sign and leave a message! https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=f7fb8948b6f2e7b3c477f7f6291a9340796ffc166c2fbe9a05ab34d7df4aeb5bc35c181c8ce3ee797660e29796840ab8f76ead4610d893c0ce93b802319a43af Will you sign your name now and leave a message of support? https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=f7fb8948b6f2e7b3c477f7f6291a9340796ffc166c2fbe9a05ab34d7df4aeb5bc35c181c8ce3ee797660e29796840ab8f76ead4610d893c0ce93b802319a43af “MERRY CHRISTMAS, JD VANCE!” https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=f7fb8948b6f2e7b3c477f7f6291a9340796ffc166c2fbe9a05ab34d7df4aeb5bc35c181c8ce3ee797660e29796840ab8f76ead4610d893c0ce93b802319a43af > 🎄" alias="🎄 ADD YOUR NAME NOW >> 🎄" conversion="false" data-linkto="https://">🎄 ADD YOUR NAME NOW >> 🎄 We hope to see your name at the TOP of this card when we check tomorrow! - CHRISTMAS REQUEST (via Team Marsha) P.S. We’re forwarding ALL names and messages submitted today directly to the Trump-Vance team, so sign ASAP to be flagged by Team Marsha! name: Shontel Brown
subject: Happy Holidays!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Thank you for being a part of our team.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99203690/519193042/-211760203?refcode=EM_F_241224holidays_N_SB_90DO_4_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTIyZGE4Yi0wM2MyLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sGLaW9iUIrdnn-a9THqAbWfDhsz4wZenefTfMR79T4o=) Peter,

Before we take a short break, we wanted to wish you happy holidays!

I am so grateful to have been re-elected to serve as Congresswoman of Ohio’s 11th District. It is an absolute honor to be in the position to continue fighting for the American people with you by my side. As I prepare to enter my second full term in Congress, we know that we have a lot of work ahead of us. But I know that together, we are up for the battle.

**Thanks for standing with us, and happy holidays to you and your loved ones.**

Thank you,

Shontel Brown

[**P.S. We're facing a critical end-of-year goal and need to raise $7,000 by December 31. Before you sign off for the holidays, will you consider making a donation today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99203691/519193043/-211760203?refcode=EM_F_241224holidays_N_SB_90DO_4_NG_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTIyZGE4Yi0wM2MyLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sGLaW9iUIrdnn-a9THqAbWfDhsz4wZenefTfMR79T4o=) | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?

to help fund home-cooked meals
for our heroes!****](https://links.e.uso.) [GOAL: ** 3,000 MEALS **](https://links.e.uso.) ****
| [MATCH MY HOLIDAY GIFT](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/k3vwHbwGAZF-/NHU4ajNERUVYY3dVS2k1VTIzUnJUQ0VCZlozYks5RCtURC9xUWhYbS93UVpydkI2ZkpBUWYrZmtqTkNtYlNKbUNSZ1JqK1d6a3lVQkk3cHhnQnJHRVU4QmlENzczM0kxTWJqTUNYYlo0dVk9S0/blByZ05ESXp3eWZMQXZuUFJLWTgzRXRhNUJMQUpQV3VaVFFDSXlLNFY4eXdVZ05MNjBWVGFkQXoyemExZndMZWtvVFpPMUovTWtsejhYR2M5MkZHUVU1aWtSbm9DYkluS0)

Tomorrow, Americans will celebrate Christmas with family, friends, food and fun. However you celebrate, we sincerely hope you enjoy this time with family and loved ones.
But for troops deployed in some of the world's most dangerous places to protect our freedom, it'll just be another Wednesday. Another day in a lonely barracks, thousands of miles away from their loved ones. Another day of the same old mess hall food. Another day of hoping they'll be able to find a secure internet connection to call home before their kids go to bed. **It 's up to us to brighten this day for them.**
As the country gets ready to celebrate, the USO is determined to uplift our troops on this important day by providing programs and services, including at least 3,000 Holiday meals at military bases and USO Centers across the world.
**And we 're so glad to share that that The Coca-Cola® Company is _matching_ all gifts, [but we're counting on YOU to help us reach this ambitious goal by midnight tonight.](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/mWbZT-vr7ZT-/NHU4ajNERUVYY3dVS2k1VTIzUnJUQ0VCZlozYks5RCtURC9xUWhYbS93UVpydkI2ZkpBUWYrZmtqTkNtYlNKbUNSZ1JqK1d6a3lVQkk3cHhnQnJHRVU4QmlENzczM0kxTWJqTUNYYlo0dVk9S0/blByZ05ESXp3eWZMQXZuUFJLWTgzRXRhNUJMQUpQV3VaVFFDSXlLNFY4eXdVZ05MNjBWVGFkQXoyemExZndMZWtvVFpPMUovTWtsejhYR2M5MkZHUVU1aWtSbm9DYkluS0)**
[GIVE $37.50 TO HELP PROVIDE
ONE HOLIDAY MEAL](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[GIVE $75 TO HELP PROVIDE
TWO HOLIDAY MEALS](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[GIVE $150 TO HELP PROVIDE

---
[GIVE ANY AMOUNT
FOR HOLIDAY MEALS](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/-Z39JWeajZBw/NHU4ajNERUVYY3dVS2k1VTIzUnJUQ0VCZlozYks5RCtURC9xUWhYbS93UVpydkI2ZkpBUWYrZmtqTkNtYlNKbUNSZ1JqK1d6a3lVQkk3cHhnQnJHRVU4QmlENzczM0kxTWJqTUNYYlo0dVk9S0/blByZ05ESXp3eWZMQXZuUFJLWTgzRXRhNUJMQUpQV3VaVFFDSXlLNFY4eXdVZ05MNjBWVGFkQXoyemExZndMZWtvVFpPMUovTWtsejhYR2M5MkZHUVU1aWtSbm9DYkluS0)
---
Spending Christmas far away from their loved ones is just one of many, many sacrifices our troops make throughout the year in service of our country, asking nothing of us in return. **We may not be able to bring them home or fully understand the challenges they go through -- but we _can_ make sure they enjoy a home-cooked holiday meal.**
**[Please, with Christmas only hours away, will you rush $29 or more right now to DOUBLE the value of your gift to support our heroes this Christmas and into the new year? There couldn't be a more important time of year to make your first gift.](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/_K68QebWYVTX/NHU4ajNERUVYY3dVS2k1VTIzUnJUQ0VCZlozYks5RCtURC9xUWhYbS93UVpydkI2ZkpBUWYrZmtqTkNtYlNKbUNSZ1JqK1d6a3lVQkk3cHhnQnJHRVU4QmlENzczM0kxTWJqTUNYYlo0dVk9S0/blByZ05ESXp3eWZMQXZuUFJLWTgzRXRhNUJMQUpQV3VaVFFDSXlLNFY4eXdVZ05MNjBWVGFkQXoyemExZndMZWtvVFpPMUovTWtsejhYR2M5MkZHUVU1aWtSbm9DYkluS0)**
[MATCH MY GIFT](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/KAeVs76d_AFk/NHU4ajNERUVYY3dVS2k1VTIzUnJUQ0VCZlozYks5RCtURC9xUWhYbS93UVpydkI2ZkpBUWYrZmtqTkNtYlNKbUNSZ1JqK1d6a3lVQkk3cHhnQnJHRVU4QmlENzczM0kxTWJqTUNYYlo0dVk9S0/blByZ05ESXp3eWZMQXZuUFJLWTgzRXRhNUJMQUpQV3VaVFFDSXlLNFY4eXdVZ05MNjBWVGFkQXoyemExZndMZWtvVFpPMUovTWtsejhYR2M5MkZHUVU1aWtSbm9DYkluS0)

Thank you for supporting our country's heroes in uniform when it matters most.
--The USO

name: David Hogg
subject: This season, I’m celebrating
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20241224-1&t=1&akid=1572%2E587540%2EWGXpEi)
Peter, don’t let yourself be a Grinch about this past year.
Sure, we’ve had our ups and downs, but in our very first _full_ year as an organization, we elected seven incredible candidates to office.
In 2024, we elected Sarah McBride to the U.S. House of Representatives, Molly Cook to the Texas State Senate, Dante Pittman to the North Carolina House of Representatives, Bryce Berry to the Georgia House of Representatives, Oscar De Los Santos to the Arizona House of Representatives, and Christine Cockley to the Ohio House of Representatives. In 2023, we elected Nadarius Clark to the Virginia House of Delegates.
**Change will never come from the top down, it comes from the grassroots work we’re doing right now.** Electing these incredible candidates is one of the best ways to build a better future, and to fight back at the ground level against a Trump administration.
You were an incredibly important part of those victories, and you’re an incredibly important part of the work yet to come.
As you gather with friends and family to celebrate this holiday season, I hope you take a second to celebrate what you’ve contributed to this movement — because I know I am.
Cheers to 2025, and the work ahead. Thanks for doing it alongside me.
Merry Christmas!
David
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20241224-1&t=2&refcode2=1572_587540_WGXpEi&akid=1572%2E587540%2EWGXpEi)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1572%2E587540%2EWGXpEi)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1572%2E587540%2EWGXpEi)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE

Washington, DC 20003

name: Jay Jones
subject: A comforting holiday season
body:
jayjones.com [jayjones.com]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/108618/images/IMG_1689.jpeg]
Happy Holidays, team!
From my family to yours, I hope this holiday season brings you comfort, happiness, and light. During this period of uncertainty, I know many are worried or anxious about what’s to come in the new year.
What we can do now is focus on spending quality time with those who remind us what's important in life and why we must continue doing the hard work to make our world a better place.
Your support for our campaign has made this year one of the best of my life. I'm so grateful for the team that's with us in our mission to make the lives of every Virginian better, and I look forward to continuing that work next year.
From my family to yours, have a very Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays!
Warmly,
Jay

Jay Jones for Virginia
PO Box 2501
Arlington, VA 22202
United States

Charlie Kirk completely **[turned the tables on a smug woke student](https://substack.com/redirect/6b60137b-bd58-43b3-bb00-1b40bc6bcaaa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** who tried to play mind games with him during an intense abortion debate.
"What does 'fetus' mean," Kirk pressed the student, who was trying to hide behind semantics. "People use 'fetus' because they want to cloak the horror of abortion!"
**[Watch what the student does next:](https://substack.com/redirect/6b60137b-bd58-43b3-bb00-1b40bc6bcaaa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/6b60137b-bd58-43b3-bb00-1b40bc6bcaaa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/6b60137b-bd58-43b3-bb00-1b40bc6bcaaa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Vivek SNAPS at rude college girl who says "America was NEVER great!!"**
Vivek Ramaswamy **[fired back at a woke college girl who insisted America was"never great"](https://substack.com/redirect/ec796865-69d8-4a43-bf37-cf2219a330f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** due to racial discrimination.
"To you, being a man of color, when exactly was America great?!!" the student grilled Ramaswamy. "And if America was great in that period, would you personally go back to it?"
Vivek's answer was PERFECT...
"Would I go back to 2016-2020 in this country? I would!" he answered, cheekily referring to the first Trump administration.
The student asks if America was great during "slavery" and "Jim Crow". **[Watch how Vivek responds:](https://substack.com/redirect/ec796865-69d8-4a43-bf37-cf2219a330f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ec796865-69d8-4a43-bf37-cf2219a330f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/ec796865-69d8-4a43-bf37-cf2219a330f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Lunatic karen tries to STEAL Trump flag from truck - Gets a MAJOR reality check...
Watch this unhinged woman **[try to tear a Trump flag off of a man's truck](https://substack.com/redirect/3da2bbfe-3d34-4ed8-88c9-b60715761036?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in a public parking lot.
She gets caught redhanded and confronted by the truck's owner. What happens next is ridiculous!
**[Watch karma in action:](https://substack.com/redirect/3da2bbfe-3d34-4ed8-88c9-b60715761036?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: Thankful for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
|
#
---
Hi folks, I hope your holidays are filled with rest and gratitude — whether you are surrounded by loved ones, enjoying the holiday food, cheering on the Lions, or all of the above. **Today, I wanted to take a moment to express my thanks to you.** It’s been a productive year here in Michigan. We’ve done an incredible job making our state the best place in the country to live and raise a family. From passing balanced budgets, to providing free school lunches to students, or fighting like hell for reproductive freedom, we’ve done a lot — _and most importantly, we did it together._ I want to personally thank you for everything you’ve done to get us here — and everything we will do in the future. 2024 is almost over, but we’re not done rolling up our sleeves. Fight Like Hell PAC is preparing for an action-packed 2025 and beyond. We’ll be expanding our candidate trainings to build a bench of campaign staff and elected officials, and we’re ready to pull our weight in Michigan for the future, putting us in the best position to win in 2026. Let’s keep our foot on the accelerator to keep making a real difference for you and your family. With deep thanks and appreciation, Gretchen Whitmer P.S. clean_body: | Hi folks, I hope your holidays are filled with rest and gratitude — whether you are surrounded by loved ones, enjoying the holiday food, cheering on the Lions, or all of the above. Today, I wanted to take a moment to express my thanks to you. It’s been a productive year here in Michigan. We’ve done an incredible job making our state the best place in the country to live and raise a family. From passing balanced budgets, to providing free school lunches to students, or fighting like hell for reproductive freedom, we’ve done a lot — and most importantly, we did it together. I want to personally thank you for everything you’ve done to get us here — and everything we will do in the future. 2024 is almost over, but we’re not done rolling up our sleeves. Fight Like Hell PAC is preparing for an action-packed 2025 and beyond. We’ll be expanding our candidate trainings to build a bench of campaign staff and elected officials, and we’re ready to pull our weight in Michigan for the future, putting us in the best position to win in 2026. Let’s keep our foot on the accelerator to keep making a real difference for you and your family. With deep thanks and appreciation, Gretchen Whitmer P.S. As you think back about your own year, remember to be kind to yourself about your mistakes and proud of your successes. And remember: It’s always Shark Week when you’re a Michigander. = | = Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

**[So this Christmas Eve, you need to claim your Golden Gavel award before it expires at midnight.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=72e0f4094e854c20af6a3a4e5cfa0244&_e=g7YKzEYhe-OYVxyLAekNe8QCg_Gx2FRvZzNcqK8c2mqFteGUeNmvQ-icZFj20Zyttqjmex4qzJb2U9ehj6Bf1DD_0DO0uQhiAOogi07sfGZgBHk4rejKO5nvnyZLEhdU_yRZBMKpJmizaowDlPF4ejQCAxxluLORwpiQdtzgCq53UanRuo_qsuexXowOL3UXjThexBJ84wbkDIoqakdLoMWuXV5UsmFCjSalBHuuF60ZX7vLMzl1b3DoSYiHMhE_A0aueCgDBE1ErqfyLue3pdLvncWyC3LQFPUm2hWL2KfqnTWJMoPVBl_4NxPmClQea29tb9QRFsFZ4_M13wSZmOby7QENhuX1IE2ck2x7mDeova4B0Cq9h8_H3SH5zFzm-hiPALM-GKQlog9YwVsOHVgKVyiKqh4u_YMzL1V6dQ8_oYTGOq5aKMtBEiW3iZA0h9RVS0K52Vmta0olJguX7sxsqBsdyrLymwOJ3oIH6nLAK9vfILROkjnn6lZ4ZMMk "So this Christmas Eve, you need to claim your Golden Gavel award before it expires at midnight.")**

We hope you have a Merry Christmas Peter, because, after that, the real fight with the Democrats begins. And by claiming your prize, we'll be one step closer to getting our country back on track.

Congratulations and Merry Christmas,

Christmas for many of us means time at home with friends and family, church services, gift-giving, and festive celebrations. For
heroic Americans 200 years ago during the Revolutionary War, Christmas was a time of extreme deprivation and sacrifice. Under the
leadership of George Washington, the soldiers at Valley Forge faced hardship and were in critical need of supplies. Their courage
in the face of unimaginable adversity ensured their victory over the British in upcoming battles. To these heroes, we owe our
nation's freedom.

Rick Green joins the podcast to share this incredible story, which is often forgotten in today's culture. Green’s mission is to
help Americans understand our country’s Godly history and foundation. He travels the nation speaking and teaching on the U.S.
Constitution. He’s the founder of the Torch of Freedom Foundation and the Patriot Academy. A husband, father, and grandfather,
Green leads his family in the mission to restore patriotism in our nation. Like, share and subscribe.

10 Beloved American Christmas Traditions and Why We Love Them

Christmas is almost here, and Moms everywhere are putting the final touches on this year's family celebrations. Though observed in
many countries around the globe – there's something special when Americans start stringing the lights, turning up the music, and
pouring the egg nog. We can't help but shift the Christmas cheer into high gear. We are looking at ten of our most beloved
Christmas traditions, where they came from, and how we do them American-style.

clean_body: Wishing you and your family a blessed Christmas! This week we're remembering Christmas history and traditions. If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] December 24, 2024 • Newsletter Christmas at Valley Forge with Rick Green Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] Christmas for many of us means time at home with friends and family, church services, gift-giving, and festive celebrations. For heroic Americans 200 years ago during the Revolutionary War, Christmas was a time of extreme deprivation and sacrifice. Under the leadership of George Washington, the soldiers at Valley Forge faced hardship and were in critical need of supplies. Their courage in the face of unimaginable adversity ensured their victory over the British in upcoming battles. To these heroes, we owe our nation's freedom. Rick Green joins the podcast to share this incredible story, which is often forgotten in today's culture. Green’s mission is to help Americans understand our country’s Godly history and foundation. He travels the nation speaking and teaching on the U.S. Constitution. He’s the founder of the Torch of Freedom Foundation and the Patriot Academy. A husband, father, and grandfather, Green leads his family in the mission to restore patriotism in our nation. Like, share and subscribe. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] [] [] 10 Beloved American Christmas Traditions and Why We Love Them Christmas is almost here, and Moms everywhere are putting the final touches on this year's family celebrations. Though observed in many countries around the globe – there's something special when Americans start stringing the lights, turning up the music, and pouring the egg nog. We can't help but shift the Christmas cheer into high gear. We are looking at ten of our most beloved Christmas traditions, where they came from, and how we do them American-style. Read the Blog [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [ttps://www.youtube.com/channel/UCBBQ2X9bkXLgOhh-7RE0Yzw] Copyright © 2024 Moms for America, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Moms for America 1440 State HWY 248, Suite Q304 Branson, MO 65616 Visit our Website [] Visit our Store [] Visit us on Truth Social [] DONATE TODAY []

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Happy holidays from me and Team Sorensen!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
[|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/uwKfT4pu6dhZ2R8SbtoSrg~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRpTVlCP0QgaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZXJpY2ZvcmlsbGlub2lzLmNvbS9XA3NwY0IKZ2VM1GpntipHJFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABs~)
| | Happy holidays, Peter. As I spend quality time with my family and loved ones, I can’t help but reflect on how grateful I am for everything you’ve done to keep our “family” together in Illinois’ 17th District. I am already bracing for next year, and the challenges and opportunities that will come with it in Congress. But I’ll never lose sight of how blessed I am to represent the community where I was born and raised. The truth is, I couldn’t be here without you. Together, we built a grassroots movement around our shared values, and we elected the first-ever LGBTQ member of Congress from Illinois – then doubled down. We made history, Peter, and that’s thanks to you. No matter how you celebrate, I hope the season is filled with peace, laughter, and rest for you and yours. I’m so thankful to everyone who’s been involved -- in ways large and small -- and I hope you have a restful and enjoyable holiday. All my best, -Eric

clean_body: ~ | | Happy holidays, Peter. As I spend quality time with my family and loved ones, I can’t help but reflect on how grateful I am for everything you’ve done to keep our “family” together in Illinois’ 17th District. I am already bracing for next year, and the challenges and opportunities that will come with it in Congress. But I’ll never lose sight of how blessed I am to represent the community where I was born and raised. The truth is, I couldn’t be here without you. Together, we built a grassroots movement around our shared values, and we elected the first-ever LGBTQ member of Congress from Illinois – then doubled down. We made history, Peter, and that’s thanks to you. No matter how you celebrate, I hope the season is filled with peace, laughter, and rest for you and yours. I’m so thankful to everyone who’s been involved -- in ways large and small -- and I hope you have a restful and enjoyable holiday. All my best, -Eric ---|--- | Paid for by Eric Sorensen for Illinois. Eric Sorensen for IllinoisPO Box 1172Moline, IL 61265United States ~ "Website"•~ "Privacy Policy"

body:
With Republicans preparing to take full control of Washington, there’s one thing that’s clear: Building Democratic majorities in our statehouses has never been more important. | | |
---
| |
---|---
As you read this, state Republicans are waging an all-out war on our democracy – limiting abortion access, passing hateful anti-LGBTQ+ legislation, and restricting ballot access. They thought they could do all of this without consequences – but they don’t know what they’re up against. **Grassroots Democrats are _pouring_ in donations to stand up to them ahead of our end-of-year deadline:** [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsOpbiH4z4INAYfLFgFMiGKYkewyfsWMM9UPOOWmlv96N_3PFVSjeUm-M4Vmpu5QZ74pSW3YRB6yF1lks9uNl5uIxS60fod1u-TK1sPoCMtjOVaJQVlkjQiGnZFigH9QNPmYsrwRJXr6UKAWQ834vg8_7AgIeldBKTHqwtBlG0k8SWwbXj4Jy4KyF87bKts9hYeiZCKyIiYNZfb6yLvp4n4USgul2BWUCwSP29Xrpi7flBI4u3VSAJ7fwtKBfaIrVR3y90LkGw5bOfBCD3Gsy_6mc3Wh4lHOttsGF2YCpeOYGpFx4n_KLB5RcekpOzps2KMYV6MUhgL2bF3gwznhb_ZUBD7Kvb5kzGJ6B1quRovZ4mG7CS_CqsBbyaLAT3jTidBjkdTK30aQeA560Q9OBq6N-qpvTIMAW7q1nfn6g9Us1xiPI-ObCrvr_gUQU7kmKF1movh_XDHJlAD4A6NLgcVaHkG1Syke_Awr4Ysa4fBbcPhEo-nnLcIg2PQomBwjAzFKutOSMT8wFMmE4XonCqDzjZFRE6P27cF5amJTGIv5kIKd1e-Lms61Q8xqYwFEJKG2r2yntOb3VY1xkK56E88qS_MruxLVmdcFBVW-3s9gpskDtxI7N9afuljlLD8ydlWtp90J00gEsdtYIUEu8PpYrvxs26Zvm2zlgbGPa_K55LiYS5mb2R7G-fyPK6453DLqNx8r44vca4DeBgb4qrDOTCfWmcAXl3XSFBG2UXMOpz31L8ojjFpinzVPZegTRZ2wwEMIGuo-UPDkNlqCDqU/4ck/-fg086HKRB6iDuJWHCTTwA/h0/h001.yBFjhKm3OvvWPV5ZjHoZc6DRft-duxZB-2uNa2nZ9_o) A generous group of donors is matching all donations SEVEN TIMES _right now._ But this 7X-match offer is only active until midnight on December 31st, and we _still_ need to raise $130,000 to hit our goal... With Republicans preparing to take full control of Washington, there’s one thing that’s clear: **Building Democratic majorities in our statehouses has never been more important.**
**The money we raise today helps block extreme Republicans from gaining ground in upcoming special elections and defend Democratic power nationwide.**
State Democrats are our last line of defense against right-wing attacks. That’s why it’s vital we raise the funds we need to support them – and that starts with hitting our end-of-year fundraising goal before midnight on December 31st.

They thought they could do all of this without consequences – but they don’t know what they’re up against. Grassroots Democrats are pouring in donations to stand up to them ahead of our end-of-year deadline: A generous group of donors is matching all donations SEVEN TIMES right now. But this 7X-match offer is only active until midnight on December 31st, and we still need to raise $130,000 to hit our goal... | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | With Republicans preparing to take full control of Washington, there’s one thing that’s clear: Building Democratic majorities in our statehouses has never been more important. The money we raise today helps block extreme Republicans from gaining ground in upcoming special elections and defend Democratic power nationwide. State Democrats are our last line of defense against right-wing attacks. That’s why it’s vital we raise the funds we need to support them – and that starts with hitting our end-of-year fundraising goal before midnight on December 31st. name: Coach Tuberville
subject: Allow me to introduce myself
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE VICTORY FUND
body:
As a successful College Football coach, I want you to understand why I entered into politics | [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=188612b638544d38bd4c2509e457ae36&_e=NQBw3r6AKMr2w36m61orJRz5X-3KumC0lXz6scWn-37jLueXujeghKRCDvFKNj4b5bGaIK2ePwJkqMJcmPuVkZ1eIX84Q-H1BmQPfc3KM15w1oSsAbEmcv-G-iR7BAAeQzQH3ns6kGuhm3dCaBeWfjVRRkxRj3EwntIHRYag0vbcSdCJ5UqVYLxvaxOR4b5gCgxHS7ztHdbqWJLjkm9xT8WcWwnaeaKtRbhvKGsVL6F0AHxiOfXXFGfSkpmv-ZV3n_i20PTCfAO1kd89xl0mBLwxkPghb4Pljlvq65bTOPRAoQpkxp8JKEz7F8rVbPruqwoDOwOq7Ri1V6UALm5eyg%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

It’s me, Tommy Tuberville.

Throughout my life, I’ve been called many names. Whether it’s Coach, Dad, Husband, or Senator, I’ve always led by example for the people who depend on me.

**This email is a little longer.** [**I’m humbly asking you to read it through and consider donating to my re-election campaign for the United States Senate when you’re finished.**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=188612b638544d38bd4c2509e457ae36&_e=NQBw3r6AKMr2w36m61orJRz5X-3KumC0lXz6scWn-37jLueXujeghKRCDvFKNj4b5bGaIK2ePwJkqMJcmPuVkZ1eIX84Q-H1BmQPfc3KM15w1oSsAbEmcv-G-iR7BAAeQzQH3ns6kGuhm3dCaBeWfjVRRkxRj3EwntIHRYag0vbcSdCJ5UqVYLxvaxOR4b5gMC0p2ojJZfGXouNmIU7BoNFhudzjy0Lw92JVMFqrkTQQw6Uph2X05kGrNkQffuRNiGPQaohNuvI1Zd8KG2CCYeCYSEq1A9ilX5kRFeEBvNQx5QQOqYveBWsZN8hpxYCTRPoPSRmvK7N4AsLJ0OCF1Q%3D%3D)

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=188612b638544d38bd4c2509e457ae36&_e=NQBw3r6AKMr2w36m61orJRz5X-3KumC0lXz6scWn-37jLueXujeghKRCDvFKNj4b5bGaIK2ePwJkqMJcmPuVkZ1eIX84Q-H1BmQPfc3KM15w1oSsAbEmcv-G-iR7BAAeQzQH3ns6kGuhm3dCaBeWfjVRRkxRj3EwntIHRYag0vbcSdCJ5UqVYLxvaxOR4b5gC6AgtYEitBmcC--0Cha8ysKdKqedSFpx_sWTtf6h91ZKgKZ2cT_RjSP0IlQ-dBvstwqXiNYR4-MG3Tn5oGij37lfvwe1H2JISJ1US-ViwzCrgA1sc7SOpA3l6KROuNKjnV7iwfgnKB8HynmOqdrBaA%3D%3D)
I was born in Camden, Arkansas as the third of three children to my parents, Olive and Charles Tuberville. They raised me to always work hard and stand on principle, which I’ve brought with me in every step of my life.

I met my wife, Suzanne, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans in 1989. We married just three years later and have two amazing children together, Tucker and Troy. They continue to make me proud every single day.

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=188612b638544d38bd4c2509e457ae36&_e=NQBw3r6AKMr2w36m61orJRz5X-3KumC0lXz6scWn-37jLueXujeghKRCDvFKNj4b5bGaIK2ePwJkqMJcmPuVkZ1eIX84Q-H1BmQPfc3KM15w1oSsAbEmcv-G-iR7BAAeQzQH3ns6kGuhm3dCaBeWfjVRRkxRj3EwntIHRYag0vbcSdCJ5UqVYLxvaxOR4b5g09utRynkseC2DPRXhaoFiV48KufAeLzw1wIZtRheWlb3Vzs0N3-w2OCAk9y_GywUnbvYbj1459C_4krm1ONYaDpyCjAtWGtj0y_aGasL_dxpbkitm_5_yitTZ4jL2z7yN8swg0qUyFWQrt11fqRA3A%3D%3D)
After graduating from SAU, I took my first coaching job at Hermitage High School before graduating to the college level as an assistant coach at Arkansas State University.

Just two years later, I started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, where I went on to become their defensive coordinator. By the time I left the U, we had created one of the most storied programs in college football history. We won three AP national championships, and I coached future Hall-of-Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne “The Rock” Johnson.

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=188612b638544d38bd4c2509e457ae36&_e=NQBw3r6AKMr2w36m61orJRz5X-3KumC0lXz6scWn-37jLueXujeghKRCDvFKNj4b5bGaIK2ePwJkqMJcmPuVkZ1eIX84Q-H1BmQPfc3KM15w1oSsAbEmcv-G-iR7BAAeQzQH3ns6kGuhm3dCaBeWfjVRRkxRj3EwntIHRYag0vbcSdCJ5UqVYLxvaxOR4b5gX3apboz81kXf0X2oqtTGJw7aho6_DcbbZnrur2wRaNexM-rkONf87rKu36C4-M0gh7eHDIVzxIbCESN5ZPFRfXizyypIAzMuSUwo9d_fykXs1MbZhuObQ7xqwO6Z71vu1dZdmlrqbkRap2YT9-trXg%3D%3D)
I spent a short stint as the head coach for Ole Miss before becoming the head coach for the Auburn Tigers in 1998. I solidified my career there, making eight consecutive bowl appearances, winning five SEC Western Division Titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004 when I was named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year, among other awards.

I continued coaching at Texas Tech University and the University of Cincinnati until I retired from coaching in 2016 as one of the top 50 most-winning college football coaches of all time. But I wasn’t done winning just yet.

**In 2020, I went from Coach Tuberville to Senator Tuberville. After talking to my fellow Alabamians, I was enlightened by President Trump's concerns about the direction of our country, and I decided to do something about it. I ran for the United States Senate and won.**

Throughout my first term in office, I’ve been fighting non-stop on President Trump’s behalf. Whether it was fighting back against the countless witch-hunts or challenging the Biden-Harris Administration’s Radical and harmful policies, I always worked hard and stood on principle, just like my folks taught me at a young age.

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=188612b638544d38bd4c2509e457ae36&_e=NQBw3r6AKMr2w36m61orJRz5X-3KumC0lXz6scWn-37jLueXujeghKRCDvFKNj4b5bGaIK2ePwJkqMJcmPuVkZ1eIX84Q-H1BmQPfc3KM15w1oSsAbEmcv-G-iR7BAAeQzQH3ns6kGuhm3dCaBeWfjVRRkxRj3EwntIHRYag0vbcSdCJ5UqVYLxvaxOR4b5gGOZ7OSwsR-g7q07iyh_fVSn01FpH3pGX45XL8LIzIr1nCiuiuu-p3Y68trOwE516v15GCiLyiIThMLowC6IJTdW0f1tpPEar7mpUe0QLROBHPkd27AT7V639K1Sgw_-B48ca46wLazNtmvPe7XxpLA%3D%3D)
**Now, I’m running for re-election in the 2026 Midterm Elections.**

The Radical Left has circled me as one of their top targets to defeat in 2026. They’re going to spend MILLIONS of dollars trying to beat me. But if coaching in the SEC has taught me one thing, it’s this: there will always be a rival trying to bring you down, but with hard work and a strong team, you can go 13-0.

**I’m looking to go 2-0 in my lifetime as a Senate candidate, and I need your help.**

[**Peter, can you chip in just $10 before midnight to give my campaign the resources we need to defeat the Radical Left and retain President Trump’s Senate Majority?**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=188612b638544d38bd4c2509e457ae36&_e=NQBw3r6AKMr2w36m61orJRz5X-3KumC0lXz6scWn-37jLueXujeghKRCDvFKNj4b5bGaIK2ePwJkqMJcmPuVkZ1eIX84Q-H1BmQPfc3KM15w1oSsAbEmcv-G-iR7BAAeQzQH3ns6kGuhm3dCaBeWfjVRRkxRj3EwntIHRYag0vbcSdCJ5UqVYLxvaxOR4b5gD-Degqak9jaoCymOQwCriv-LXvj6mw7CUc2LkVCfzw6YQZXKic4iaRVSaGeTYYqIR3WcjtmViuzPR9bUCh-buhhup-WRq_utb0YuH8Ab-FFRnubjuslCxX07g6SirOMou95CuBJch32L346Sx_39wA%3D%3D)

I won’t take up more of your time.
