Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football’s 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville’s time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year’s Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul “Bear” Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=188612b638544d38bd4c2509e457ae36&_e=NQBw3r6AKMr2w36m61orJRz5X-3KumC0lXz6scWn-37jLueXujeghKRCDvFKNj4b5bGaIK2ePwJkqMJcmPuVkZ1eIX84Q-H1BmQPfc3KM15w1oSsAbEmcv-G-iR7BAAeQzQH3ns6kGuhm3dCaBeWfjVRRkxRj3EwntIHRYag0vbcSdCJ5UqVYLxvaxOR4b5gEiBBn2R25JDUrWAgg7xaofvJsX9DlEO_IU8E7YzPZSad0gdajg5T-F5Xl3jSYGHxiXRMFdUVfF2c0XH_1ebcq9PH7HMHARC5nryeihjIbXnAf508jO3cG9twJjv7CXXBMdPthGe9LMBJ2yIpuuAjQA%3D%3D)

clean_body: As a successful College Football coach, I want you to understand why I entered into politics | Peter, It’s me, Tommy Tuberville. Throughout my life, I’ve been called many names. Whether it’s Coach, Dad, Husband, or Senator, I’ve always led by example for the people who depend on me. This email is a little longer. I was born in Camden, Arkansas as the third of three children to my parents, Olive and Charles Tuberville. They raised me to always work hard and stand on principle, which I’ve brought with me in every step of my life. I met my wife, Suzanne, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans in 1989. We married just three years later and have two amazing children together, Tucker and Troy. They continue to make me proud every single day. After graduating from SAU, I took my first coaching job at Hermitage High School before graduating to the college level as an assistant coach at Arkansas State University. Just two years later, I started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, where I went on to become their defensive coordinator. By the time I left the U, we had created one of the most storied programs in college football history. We won three AP national championships, and I coached future Hall-of-Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne “The Rock” Johnson. I spent a short stint as the head coach for Ole Miss before becoming the head coach for the Auburn Tigers in 1998. I solidified my career there, making eight consecutive bowl appearances, winning five SEC Western Division Titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004 when I was named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year, among other awards. I continued coaching at Texas Tech University and the University of Cincinnati until I retired from coaching in 2016 as one of the top 50 most-winning college football coaches of all time. But I wasn’t done winning just yet. In 2020, I went from Coach Tuberville to Senator Tuberville. After talking to my fellow Alabamians, I was enlightened by President Trump's concerns about the direction of our country, and I decided to do something about it. I ran for the United States Senate and won. Throughout my first term in office, I’ve been fighting non-stop on President Trump’s behalf. Whether it was fighting back against the countless witch-hunts or challenging the Biden-Harris Administration’s Radical and harmful policies, I always worked hard and stood on principle, just like my folks taught me at a young age. Now, I’m running for re-election in the 2026 Midterm Elections. The Radical Left has circled me as one of their top targets to defeat in 2026. They’re going to spend MILLIONS of dollars trying to beat me. But if coaching in the SEC has taught me one thing, it’s this: there will always be a rival trying to bring you down, but with hard work and a strong team, you can go 13-0. I’m looking to go 2-0 in my lifetime as a Senate candidate, and I need your help. I won’t take up more of your time. name: Gabe Amo
subject: Seasons Greetings
body:
Hi Friend, I wanted to take a moment to thank you during this holiday season. I'm so grateful for your friendship, support, and commitment to our collective future. You do so much for our state, country, and world. And I'm honored to continue my service in the United States Congress on behalf of the people and communities of Rhode Island's First Congressional District.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99215309/519224025/-1283252511?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0NTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzY4NDI1YTctMTFjMi1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=eD1amcd2kNf9kp9cAKkOGw-XcW92SsZ_kkapj6-DLR0=&emci=1809ab0a-08c2-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=768425a7-11c2-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=12466492)

| | Hi Friend,
---
I wanted to take a moment to thank you during this holiday season.
---
I'm so grateful for your friendship, support, and commitment to our collective future. You do so much for our state, country, and world. And I'm honored to continue my service in the United States Congress on behalf of the people and communities of Rhode Island's First Congressional District.
---
---
To all who are celebrating, have a Merry Christmas, Happy Hanukkah, and Happy Kwanzaa! I look forward to a healthy, prosperous, and Happy New Year for us all!
---
Best wishes,Gabe

name: Maggie Goodlander
subject: Happy Holidays and Merry Christmas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for Congress
body:
As we enter this special time of year, I wanted to take a moment to express my heartfelt gratitude to you for all the support you’ve shown my team and me throughout this year.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99216345/519225397/478451526?refcode=BLU_EM_GOOD_2024-12-24_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTMwMjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjMzNWE0MDItMTNjMi1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3Ff5TgnUuG7ocxtsGFOwGnKbXJbGkKetrXuC0or8Jns=)
---
| Peter,

Happy Holidays and Merry Christmas!

As we enter this special time of year, I wanted to take a moment to express my heartfelt gratitude to you for all the support you’ve shown my team and me throughout this year. Together, we built a movement focused on bringing people together and finding common ground to ensure everyone gets a fair deal.

None of this would have been possible without your support. Thank you for bestowing your trust in me to represent and fight for our communities. It is truly the honor and privilege of my lifetime to be your next Congresswoman.

This holiday season, I hope you take comfort in knowing that the work we’ve done together is creating positive change—and that, with your continued support, we will overcome any obstacle ahead.

Wishing you a joyous holiday season filled with peace, love, and hope for the future!

Maggie Goodlander
---

name: Katie Porter
subject: One of my favorite holiday traditions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
Cookie season (+ dog photos inside)
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39363%2E3422442%2Ec6R3zC)
Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays from my family to yours!
One of my favorite holiday traditions is baking with my kids. And over the years, I’ve collected quite a few cookie cutters! Favorites include the state of California, and this dog shaped one that resembles our new dog, Poppy (who promptly ate this cookie after the photo was taken).
However you are celebrating, I’m wishing you a happy holiday season.
—Katie, Luke, Paul, Betsy, Poppy & Dino

we just need your signature

subject: Reflecting on what matters most
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THEIR FUTURE FUND
body:
| | | If you'd like to unsubscribe,[click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-gP0Xd1LL-Lub7Gk22PHy9v_zDMKsOhIsGaYsSQAIlT46RJ1cLFi0RbsWsZWZVQtXmgyDsn337uID04JUXAsI6orsUbi_w-ZL2hmMGJwRhHNHr4eq5tIuxevyPIGL_C4E-3_M1IzMNVjmw7VIbsziPV0lJTrwNdjlVnnGWVq1drunAsecm90swFwWlNnR_FsoHzy7fFkdO1Dov8LBqNjGYve-i-R4fgf4TDka9qb-zFXSu2CJokUeOz6-o3BKmcssT_2odV8m-EG83KCwBtByHB8QJJKuyPLO1-99Y5ZLxJiOwPnxuJWWT_F_h7E5LX6VF9GbSA4l57m3Oz6Cq2ulQ_Ja_dVVWRL3FH50da3XM-j5cw3p6lLSt3cyZXdURd9agxLKCyWCGmnUS6vJCSoi-b4TQ5mzZyw_f5cQe-NAW2F27XU5247kVa3Y7I5CDO8o0uuEOy9mS_KLcg3fRERzM/4ck/SX3c_ykaS2G_LZ4xmyj7Zg/h0/h001.OWHEBsCkX9NktKGzrwY6Q6S18_FNhe3dJThOvCxPs3c) | | Happy Holidays! Everyone here at Their Future Fund wants to wish you and your loved ones a joyous & warm holiday season. As we look to the New Year, Their Future Fund is committed to continuing our work to support our children and fight for their futures. Their needs are too often overlooked in policymaking, but we’re dedicated to ensuring that ALL children have the opportunity to thrive.

We want to thank you for all your support this year. It’s important we take the time this holiday season to reflect on what matters most. We believe that building a better future for the children of America is one of the utmost priorities — and we know you do, too.

Thank you again for all you do. Enjoy the rest of your year with your loved ones, and let’s start the New Year strong, together.

Until the kids are alright,

Annie & Renee

body:
This holiday season, I am filled with hope and optimism, not only for the future of our campaign but for the future of Virginia.

| **On behalf of my family and our campaign team, I want to wish you a very Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays!!**
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99217173/519227322/-1898250644?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-12-24_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGRhNDJiOGYtMTRjMi1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9e4foCyE4GXqCyIeHiTGXSOuS6igaWs_tj3FDhE1b0Q=)
This holiday season, I am filled with hope and optimism, not only for the future of our campaign but for the future of Virginia. We’ve made incredible strides over the last year, and I’m looking forward to what 2025 holds for us.

I couldn’t be more grateful for my loving family, an exceptional team that works tirelessly so I can continue to serve our community, and a coalition of supporters across Virginia and this country.

I’m excited to continue this journey with you by my side as we work toward a Virginia that is more prosperous and fair for all.

May this season bring you peace, joy, and a renewed sense of hope for the year ahead.

Have a wonderful, safe holiday!

Abigail Spanberger

body:
I wanted to take a moment to wish you and your family a happy and safe holiday season.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99217177/519227328/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzVjMzk5NS0xNGMyLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PenDIPX8GBqUxSm-4aoErNLvhmkgFu9VHJQFm9D0v6Y=) I wanted to take a moment to wish you and your family a happy and safe holiday season. Today, I am so, so grateful for your support throughout this long, hectic election year. Thanks to the efforts of supporters like you, I will continue to have the monumental responsibility of fighting for KS-03 families in the halls of Congress — a privilege that I will never take for granted. I am also grateful for the bravery and sacrifices of our nation’s servicemembers, police officers, and first responders, who may not be able to celebrate the holidays at home because of their important work. I can’t thank you enough for all of the kindness and support you’ve shown over the years. There’s a lot of work to do in 2025, but with you by my side, I know we’ll have the determination to get it done. Wishing you a joyful, restful holiday season and a happy new year, \- Sharice

| Dear friends, In just seven days we are going to face our Year-End Federal Election Commission Filing Deadline. **This is our final FEC Filing deadline before Donald Trump is sworn in** , and all eyes will be on us to see whether Democrats are demoralized or ready to hold Donald Trump accountable. **[We are looking to raise another $15,000 so that when our filing goes public, the media and pundits will see that Democrats haven’t given up and are still in this fight! The pundits on TV are saying that Democrats are demoralized from Donald Trump’s victory and are giving up. **We’ll be honest: We’ve seen the exact opposite here in California**. clean_body: In 7 days: | = | Dear friends, In just seven days we are going to face our Year-End Federal Election Commission Filing Deadline. This is our final FEC Filing deadline before Donald Trump is sworn in , and all eyes will be on us to see whether Democrats are demoralized or ready to hold Donald Trump accountable. = = We’re sure you have heard some of the media stories. The pundits on TV are saying that Democrats are demoralized from Donald Trump’s victory and are giving up. We’ll be honest: We’ve seen the exact opposite here in California. For weeks after Election Night, countless volunteers helped us ensure that every eligible vote was called in the U.S. House races. People were ready to do their part. And we need THAT to be the story that media outlets report. But they will be looking closely at our FEC filing to see where our grassroots fundraising numbers are. If they see us raising less than this time last year, they could conclude that Democrats are tuned out. = = = = = = With Republicans now controlling the White House and both chambers of Congress, California stands at the forefront of leading the way in driving economic growth, creating good-paying jobs, lowering the cost of living, and protecting our fundamental values. Together, we must fight for the future. Thank you for being in this fight with us. We are so appreciative. \- CADEM | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. | | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/trump-threatens-to-invade-foreign?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Donald Trump has gone into overdrive in his threats to invade sovereign nations. And rather than call out his extremism, corporate media is either complicit or downplaying the threat. It is critical we understand that Trump is not joking, but rather moving the Overton window to normalize the idea of the United States expanding its territory. We cannot allow these extremist ideas to become normalized, and must call them out for what they are. **Let 's Address This.**
As Legacy media continues to fail to hold the powerful accountable, your support of _Let 's Address This_ remains more critical than ever. **Please become an active member of this community and subscribe.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..aCu0ZeoUHCw_PlnPPdyOcU_sedfq_Psvd5k-s1704EA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=153579908)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6612f1db-cdb8-4207-a385-d7ecb55c00d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Photo Credit: HT
In the last few weeks Trump has referred to Canada as the 51st state and its Prime Minister as "Governor." He has discussed a "soft invasion" into Mexico by deploying the United States military. He has again revived the idea of buying Greenland, as if it is for sale. And Trump is now discussing taking over Panama to gain control of the Panama Canal. These are not jokes made at a bar by a random drunkard. These are the rantings of an aspiring autocrat and should be taken seriously--because he isn't joking.
Unfortunately, corporate media is once again failing to call out this fascism for what it is--which is one reason I am compelled to write this piece. Fox News describes Trump's fascist rhetoric as "tough talk." If anything this reminds me of how media bought Trump's admission of sexually assaulting women as "locker room talk." This framing was a failure then, and it is a failure now.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fb07425f-68a5-4bf1-8e3b-b5e8a2cfdbb7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The billionaire owned Washington Post simply restated Trump's framing on buying Greenland, and whitewashed Trump's threat to annex Canada as "eyeing" Canada. It should be a major cause for alarm that Trump is referring to our closest neighbor, and the largest non-militarized border in the world, as an opportunity to annex Canada. Instead of calling out this dangerous rhetoric--one that calls for violence and could undermine safety and economic security for hundreds of millions of people--the Washington Post describes Trump's intentions for Canada as one might refer to purchasing a new car.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8130dd0b-b6a6-4507-97d2-9e8d59cc9a90?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
MSNBC didn't do much better by framing it as a Trump "suggestion." Again, words matter. You suggest a different route to get to a venue. You suggest a different tie to wear with that shirt, or different shoes with that dress. One does not simply suggest invading another sovereign nation--especially when the person making the "suggestion" controls the world's most powerful military and nuclear arsenal.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bbf3a10b-444d-411a-b5d7-dbb3d2b38144?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Taking the cake is CNN, whose ratings by the way have dropped 52% since the election. CNN describes Trump's fascist threat to conquer sovereign nations as "a teased expansion" and then doubles down by inexplicably comparing it to the Louisiana Purchase.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/032d1bc2-0bc6-4683-8365-f34c03404b7a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The trifecta of stupidity in CNN's framing comes with their additional "if he's serious" comment. Rather than condemning the fascist claims Trump is making, whether they're 'serious' or not, CNN still seeks to give a man bent on advancing fascism the benefit of the doubt. Unsurprising from a network that refused to fact check Trump during the presidential debate last Spring.
Finally, keep in mind that Trump's rhetoric to invade other nations mimics the behavior of Putin as he invades Ukraine, and Netanyahu as he annexes parts of Syria, Lebanon, and Palestine. The precedent Trump sets with this rhetoric threatens to undermine global stability. It diminishes our ability as a nation to hold other powerful nations accountable if and when they break international law. Corporate media must understand that by whitewashing Trump's rhetoric, they not only undermine American democracy, they also undermine global security.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..aCu0ZeoUHCw_PlnPPdyOcU_sedfq_Psvd5k-s1704EA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=153579908)
## Conclusion
Trump's suggestions to take over Canada, Mexico, Panama, Greenland, and who knows what else, are not jokes. They are not suggestions. They are not teases. They are market tested ideas to move the Overton window to the fascist right, and normalize this extremist ideology. They threaten global safety and unity. Media should be at the forefront as the fourth estate to call out, condemn, and reject these ideas, and keep the public informed on just how dangerous this rhetoric actually is. Instead, the capitulation of corporate media in real time is a depressing indicator of how badly they will fail to hold the powerful accountable once the next Trump administration begins.
I launched _Let 's Address This_ to hold the powerful accountable with factual analysis and insight, especially on human rights issues in which legacy media is failing. And I am hopeful to earn your trust and support so we can continue to analyze, create, and disseminate important pieces like this one to call out fascism where it exists, and demand accountability.
**Before you go!** I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.**Subscribe and join the movement.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..aCu0ZeoUHCw_PlnPPdyOcU_sedfq_Psvd5k-s1704EA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=153579908)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fa0bb92e-976f-4030-987c-5b219f38c70b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

name: MassGOP
subject: Wishing You a Joyous Holiday Season
body:
| | | | |
---
| | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yVAcHwtSBlhB7cNMtUZXdhxtpDbQLgVxHfk5fzOkJoq2WEqgKoZvShvk8IEPWASK3wmaUluuXDdmgLUZ-84CtUz4azm5HVQ9BX-lr3MlCCjMPgssH-3TdqMgDjbYyTtiBghcIPNlUZGYmq9_L4gh2g==&c=r2SPJRbX_pRT53DzVqfaupcFxCxhUDAL5RX1hw2jH8iPuKNk8d7-Mg==&ch=xnexoerxN62zJzwVXCQJGBoI8ItmKadXhw7f0RfOZy0t725g4f-z3g==)
---
| Wishing You a Joyous Holiday Season
---
---
| Dear Friend,
As we close out 2024, we are filled with gratitude for you, our dedicated supporters and friends. This year has been nothing short of remarkable, thanks to your unwavering commitment to our shared values and the future of Massachusetts.
In the spirit of the season, we want to wish you and your loved ones a Merry Christmas, a Happy New Year, and a joyous celebration of all the holidays that bring warmth and light to your lives. Whether gathered around the tree, lighting the menorah, or enjoying quiet moments of reflection, we hope your holidays are filled with love, laughter, and cherished memories.
This season is a time to give thanks, and we are truly thankful for you. Your support has made all the difference in the work we do together, and we look forward to another year of opportunity and progress in 2025.
From our MassGOP family to yours, Merry Christmas, Happy Holidays, and best wishes for a wonderful New Year!
Warm regards, The Massachusetts Republican Party Amy Carnevale, Chair Janet Fogarty, Massachusetts Republican National Committeewoman Brad Wyatt, Massachusetts Republican National Committeeman
---
| |
---
---

name: Concealed Carry
subject: Your CCW Permit is approved! download here ✅
body:
It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19469/6374453/8541ba2a1c093eeb1bbf398f1d75320b65e0c2ed/2126922233a49d2403d4d623329faed166296538)
---
| | |
---
_December 24th, 2024_
---
| | |
---
It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP**.

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19469/6374453/8541ba2a1c093eeb1bbf398f1d75320b65e0c2ed/2126922233a49d2403d4d623329faed166296538). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter:
* Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)...
* Zero lines, classroom time or books to read...
* Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit).

**[It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple)](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19469/6374453/8541ba2a1c093eeb1bbf398f1d75320b65e0c2ed/2126922233a49d2403d4d623329faed166296538).**

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19469/6374453/8541ba2a1c093eeb1bbf398f1d75320b65e0c2ed/2126922233a49d2403d4d623329faed166296538)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!
---
| | |
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19469/6374453/8541ba2a1c093eeb1bbf398f1d75320b65e0c2ed/2126922233a49d2403d4d623329faed166296538)

name: Eleni Kounalakis
subject: Happy holidays from my family to yours!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eleni Kounalakis for Governor 2026
body:
Eleni Kounalakis for Governor Logo [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/62802/images/ekg-logomark-min.png]

My dear friends and family,

Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays!

Christmas time is very special to me and my family. While my boys are grown up now, it’s still a magical time when we cherish our friends and loved ones and reflect on all that we’re grateful for as we close out another year.

And in a year too often marked by conflict and divisiveness, I hope we can all take a moment to think about the true gifts of this season — time with loved ones, rest, and peace on earth — and how we can bring them with us into 2025.

We’re looking forward to another big year together and continuing to fight for a better, stronger California and nation.

Wishing you and your loved ones a happy holiday season and a 2025 filled with joy, peace, and prosperity.

Love,

Eleni and the Kounalakis family

Paid for by Eleni Kounalakis for Governor 2026
2443 Fillmore Street #300
San Francisco, CA 94115

This email was sent to .
Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/Vm1adzX1UkmdxnshGX5o5A2?unsubscribedata=nSOR0hVGNgzIbooUzK7ZWoFM2MseFJEuR1nrSEYB11itA8fXW5QSGCSlLQdYHlcVPcxh7RV1cpAyXqzWDggJLufcXEdnowdH1INR2HCZrhrHI9msqFBil%2Flx0fAlEAWLGhlIMNbwkzA0a2p3sD4evisgPfH7XRj7JhR8yewFdi%2F%2F81bKOBp%2FDEFIiIVL1Dhf01IkUIEfC43ltqHtVfFBR7yzRrbTxs1xw2VMCJcB6el7muMtC44kKuFizD%2FaRob0mHXS1zZekmzZfoIJD5Sa9Mx%2FiZFb0JT9NtzZGnT5EeB8WZSAwjcoBcAjaBfXLEJlzOXxgJX4mLfHxdAl%2B7o%2FCnGHbILnRyR3Dlp%2FmRGv3CVs5zNTWTDWJqNSjIvpjeP1PU1UkHfLJQ%2BX7tM6LgRJItWpnJVTCLhIxHgz52xA0dg69zJU5WLW8KAyx64%2FI6%2FA] to unsubscribe.

name: Tina Smith
subject: Happy Holidays!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Happy Holidays, folks! I hope you and your loved ones have a joyful, restful holiday season. For me, Christmas time means spending time with Archie and our kids and grandkids. I’ll be baking up a storm (my specialty is lemon meringue pie, made with my Grandmother’s recipe — it calls for “as much butter as you can afford”), reading books, going for walks with our dog Moose, and doing lots of crossword puzzles. No matter what holiday you celebrate, or how you choose to celebrate it, I hope you are filled with happiness and comfort this season. I’m grateful to have your support, and I’m excited about what we have in store ahead. Best wishes this holiday season, Tina
---
Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
---
Tina Smith for Minnesota
PO Box 14362
St. Paul, MN 55114
United States

name: Powered By People
subject: On behalf of Beto and our whole team, Happy Holidays!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
We wanted to take a moment to wish you the happiest of holidays!
We hope that you’re able to take a few days to slow down, relax, and enjoy precious time with family and loved ones.
On behalf of Beto and our whole team, we’re wishing you joy and best wishes for a very successful New Year!
Much love,
Team Powered by People

| | Friend, This holiday season, I want to extend my most sincere thanks for your support and trust.

Serving you and our community in Congress is an honor, and I am grateful for the opportunity you have given me to be your voice in Washington.

Wishing you and your family Happy Holidays, filled with joy, peace, and time well spent with those who matter most.

Thank you and be safe,

Tom Kean, Jr.

name: John + Gisele Fetterman
subject: Grateful for you this season 🥰
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
HAPPY HOLIDAYS!!
#
Happy holidays, Derek, from our family to yours! ❤️🎄
2024 has definitely been a wild ride. But through it all, we’re so incredibly grateful for each and every person who’s supported John and worked to make PA + our country even better.
Every member of this team — that means _you_ — means so so SO much to us, and we can’t wait to get back out there and keep fighting in the New Year.
So thank you again, Derek, and HAPPY HOLIDAYS!! ❤️
With love,
John + Gisele

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20241224-9723-footer&t=1&refcode2=9723_434096_hQuDso&akid=9723%2E434096%2EhQuDso)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=9723%2E434096%2EhQuDso)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/drmichaelgoldstein4ct/p/bridgeport-school-capital-improvements?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Bridgeport estimates $709 million in capital improvement over the next decade. Bridgeport ranks 161 of the 165 school districts.
[Pledge your support](https://substack..mgBIPndox7__oyn1XVs1R7JVAsCRwr7zScNESJbUeqo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=153540194)
Thanks for reading Michael's Substack! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.
[Pledge your support](https://substack..mgBIPndox7__oyn1XVs1R7JVAsCRwr7zScNESJbUeqo?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=153540194)
Bridgeport education needs an improvement as much if not more than its buildings (except those that are structurally unstable). Unfortunately, politics are to blame. _**The State of Connecticut and its democrat-controlled House, Senate and many other municipalities have failed and continue to fail our school children**_ (See [Article](https://open.substack.com/pub/drmichaelgoldstein4ct/p/build-back-bridgeport-with-education?r=26c3ku&utm_campaign=post&utm_medium=web&showWelcomeOnShare=false)).
The proposed solution in that article was that _**competition, school choice and charter schools are the only ways to improve performance of poorly performing public education**_. While competition poses a threat to the encumbered teachers unions, it is time to prioritize the future human capital to our Constitution state over job-security.
At the same time, a recent survey by the CEA, the largest union that represents CT teachers, indicates that even teachers in the union are frustrated with politics and cite that as a major contributor to "burnout".
The top five issues contributing to stress and burnout:
1. Challenges with student discipline/behavior
2. Insufficient pay
3. Lack of respect
4. **Politicians and non-educators making decisions that affect classroom learning**
5. Too many district initiatives

([Source - Connecticut Education Association](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/4eefac60-4777-4938-9bc2-269e521a149b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg))
**National Education Changes Since November**
Changes to education are forthcoming with the re-election of Donald J. Trump and Connecticut's own Linda McMahon has been selected to head the Department of Education.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/c5e799b3-b96e-464c-b977-347d1703492e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Source](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/10257a59-5b58-48f7-9446-f7d6c11cb662?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- America First Policy Institute
This selection of Ms. McMahon will bring national attention to Connecticut and to our public school system. Ms. McMahon was nominated for the Connecticut State Board of Education in 2009 and has frequently explained how education has been a passion of hers. In her confirmation hearing, McMahon noted that her corporate experience as the CEO of the WWE taught her "firsthand the skills Connecticut students need to obtain through education to be successful." She also spearheaded the WWE's _Get R.E.A.L._ program, which used wrestling superstars in public service announcements to encourage literacy among young fans with its R.E.A.L. core of **R** espect, **E** ducation, **A** chievement and **L** eadership.
In previous political campaigns, Ms. McMahon's campaign website highlighted "competition and choice through charter schools," "secondary school reform" and a strong belief in "local control". She also expressed that she was "an advocate for choice through charter schools," which are all likely to be areas of focus at the Department of Education.
**Back to Bridgeport - Where Does the $709 million in repairs go to?**
1/3rd of improvements are architectural in nature on the interior 1/4th are mechanical and the remainder are for the building envelope, life-safety systems, plumbing and ADA compliance. For more specifics see [here](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/e2076622-09f4-4425-9d08-624fcea7a56a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
In addition, there were previous proposals by the prior superintendent Carmela Levy-David for closures of 6 schools for unsafe building conditions and poor scholastic performance. Levy-David was previously in the news for the essential vote of no confidence by the teachers of Bridgeport (See [here](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/61bc3e29-eab4-4a53-8b71-7455c6a27864?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)). However, 17 of the 30 K-8 schools, several high-schools and magnet schools are under capacity with declining enrollment predicted over the next 10 years. There are some schools that are busting at the seams (Bassick, Central and Harding) while the Bridgeport School District has almost a $40 million deficit.
Something is clearly off when one of CT's largest cities which should have increasing population and enrollment is declining, especially given the historic demographics of Bridgeport.
**Enrollment Down, Costs Increase**
Across the state, school enrollment is down around 6 percent as compared to 10 years ago. (See [data](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7031119e-8700-4f3a-9c5c-256073130129?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg))
Factors may include residents having fewer children, an aging population and overall cost of living.
Separately, the number of Connecticut students with high needs and those with disabilities have increased over the last 10 years. In 2014-15, there were 13.32 percent, or 72,773, students with disabilities. In 2023-24, that number has jumped to 17.92 percent, or 91,847 students with disabilities.
**Bridgeport Heavily State & Federally Funded**
**Unlike most cities and towns, Bridgeport receives 70.9 percent of school funding comes from the State, 19.2% is local (real-estate taxes) and 9.9 percent comes from the federal government. Bridgeport receives more state funding than most towns so our state legislators should have greater oversight over Bridgeport and any other school districts with the same spending breakdown to ensure a better outcome.**
Connecticut is facing a host of education issues and deficits. Bridgeport spends nearly $2,600 less per student than the state average ($21,143). This may contribute to poor performance, but it is not the only issue as there are districts that spend less with higher performance.
**Alternatives to Traditional High Schools - Technical Schooling**
It is time Hartford and the local towns look to make a meaningful impact on education for a brighter future for all and shift focus to trade schools and STEM. Connecticut Technical Education and Career System (**CTECS**) is a statewide system of 17 diploma-granting technical high schools serving approximately 10,200 high school students.
Bridgeport has one CTECS - The Bullard-Havens Technical High School which rates in the top 4 of CTECS while it rates as **163 out of 198 CT High Schools and 32 out of 40 of the Bridgeport Schools (See[data](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/edb148b6-3cde-424e-8d66-01d50573c872?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)). **
CT has a long way to improve its education system. Competition, training, better spending are critical to the future development of our future workforce.
**Banksy in Bridgeport**
It is fitting that the Banksy Graffiti on a building in the South Bronx came to Bridgeport. _**The building that housed this graffiti in the Bronx was demolished to make way for a Charter School.**_
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/ace2f0a3-206c-45b9-9639-025b3920ab92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Photo by Jonathan Goldstein
_**Maybe this installation that is now in Bridgeport will serve as an inspiration to make meaningful investments in Bridgeport education and throughout the state.**_
**Thank you for your continued support. Please subscribe and spread the word.**
Dr. Michael Goldstein & Jonathan Goldstein
_The father-son team continues on_ so please spread the word and lets really rebuild CT together in a meaningful way.
For all demographic changes over the last decade - see the following [article](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7031119e-8700-4f3a-9c5c-256073130129?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[](https://substack.com/profile/45119203-jonathan-goldstein)| A guest post by| [Jonathan Goldstein](https://substack.com/@jonathangoldstein81?utm_campaign=guest_post_bio&utm_medium=email)Business Consultant, Political Consultant, Campaign Manager, Construction Consultant and Corporate Attorney. Jonathan served as the Campaign Manager for Dr. Michael Goldstein - CT-04 [Subscribe to Jonathan](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/3484dd42-25e9-4cb2-8643-3ba3aa337f41?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Team OLCV
subject: Peter, happy holidays!
body:
| | |
# Dear Peter,
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99221721/519241524/-2029533079?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjljMzY0MmIyLTFjYzItZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=exJ1cXzVW1Dgam2Dzn6c63e5UhLAuEpthLo9sVmNnRI=&emci=c5054bc4-85bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=9c3642b2-1cc2-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=2107230)
---
During this season of gratitude, all of us at OLCV want to thank you for being a part of our community. From volunteering, to taking action, to donating — you make our work possible. This year, OLCV volunteers knocked on over 5,200 doors to support OLCV-endorsed candidates in the 2024 General Election. They also submitted 33 letters to the editor (LTEs) in support of OLCV’s priorities and endorsed candidates. With their help, over 84% of OLCV-endorsed candidates were elected and we secured supermajorities in the Oregon House and Senate. **A special shoutout to our volunteer leaders,** who collectively spent over 635 hours interviewing candidates and ballot measure campaigns through OLCV’s endorsement process! We could not make our important endorsement decisions without your dedication and support — thank you **so** much!
**Another shoutout to the MCAT Steering Committee,** who organized weekly lobby days during the 2024 short legislative session to support our climate priorities! And that was just one small part of their incredible advocacy work this year. Thank you for all you do to support OLCV and our work! Over a thousand individuals have donated to OLCV this year! Your gift, whether big or small, makes all of our work possible. A special shoutout to members of our Environmental Leadership Circle and Sustainer Circle — your commitment to our work is an invaluable part of our community!
---
---

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: ¡Felicidades!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:
The holidays and the end of the year mark a time to be with our loved ones, relax, enjoy the winter weather and reflect on the year we've had so far.

Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=lIeLkFmseItahNzTxXFD1UWdoPbKHKDntOKFAMjWpCZnBj7idGmhGaaAvW4i0txIoIM%2BusU3yZfqzzxF95wUPv6veuud5E%2BRH8guKCEAvN%2BKuVRMOSbfvXZA5FT3BZEgkdArxu%2F49j9R9pxVGH3KnxKmOVZhGhzYwrZSWdog68hACa2GqthvaS9nBOkSI8UgaMRNZ0OfJDu3KWzBpiWQHbU7sUSnmTjZx%2F7AsiMKhTP%2FRBW%2F0rjOoHqXJ3r1ZuKdBSyEvtiXgRJQNh4quwB%2B98vy1P5gJk4RzKxt8f5zDgoc7j5WQlhj4cYOoy3SPl9T1xlYg3oToAFmeEFX%2BdIoCeuqYXlGkJHthuZEmJ1sIGCKF2V57tRoaoj%2Fa6Rp3u1I0ERIKVspuPV5un9cnWgGjltA0QLpPKtfXuCDAKlRtf0%3D)
---
| |
---
¡Felicidades! The holidays and the end of the year mark a time to be with our loved ones, relax, enjoy the winter weather and reflect on the year we've had so far. Thinking about 2024, it's easy to get overwhelmed by uncertainty about what this year’s election results mean for the future of our country and democracy. But we've also had so much success in less than just one year:
* 👂 Listened to your needs and wants to represent the people of NM-02, not extremism and political games
* 🤝 Successfully kept this frontline district blue in the face of MAGA dark money and disinformation
* 💙 Became the first Democratic campaign to win in NM-02 for two consecutive terms in over 40 years

Despite the turmoil of the year, we've had a fulfilling year of progress for New Mexico — and it's all thanks to you. Never forget that the huge successes were made possible through YOUR support and advocacy for this campaign. I'm ready for a holiday season of rest, relaxation and time with my loved ones. But after that, it's back to gearing up to champion New Mexicans in Congress for another term, and I’m grateful to have you standing by me every step of the way. Gracias,
Gabe
* * *

clean_body: The holidays and the end of the year mark a time to be with our loved ones, relax, enjoy the winter weather and reflect on the year we've had so far. Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | ¡Felicidades! The holidays and the end of the year mark a time to be with our loved ones, relax, enjoy the winter weather and reflect on the year we've had so far. Thinking about 2024, it's easy to get overwhelmed by uncertainty about what this year’s election results mean for the future of our country and democracy. But we've also had so much success in less than just one year: 👂 Listened to your needs and wants to represent the people of NM-02, not extremism and political games 🤝 Successfully kept this frontline district blue in the face of MAGA dark money and disinformation 💙 Became the first Democratic campaign to win in NM-02 for two consecutive terms in over 40 years Despite the turmoil of the year, we've had a fulfilling year of progress for New Mexico — and it's all thanks to you. Never forget that the huge successes were made possible through YOUR support and advocacy for this campaign. I'm ready for a holiday season of rest, relaxation and time with my loved ones. But after that, it's back to gearing up to champion New Mexicans in Congress for another term, and I’m grateful to have you standing by me every step of the way. Gracias, Gabe | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Hi,

This is Majority Leader Steve Scalise. I respect you too much to waste your time. I get it. You're busy with more important things.

**But I needed to make sure you had your eyes on this before you log off for the holidays.**

I just penned our final memo for 2024. Three new Special Elections could determine the fate of our House Majority AND our Republican Trifecta that will fast-track President Trump's agenda.

_I humbly ask you to read every word. _

The significance of what we're about to tell you cannot be overstated. _**[Use this secure link to review my memo as soon as possible:](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Tq1zquAtp4M2VE4ftGH2Xg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpTY- "Use this secure link to review my memo as soon as possible:")**_

_- Steve_

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: George Bailey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
You may or may not know this fun fact

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2435%2E4032634%2Eoyk9P_)
---
You may or may not know this fun fact: Bruce and I named our dog Bailey after George Bailey, the community banker in _It’s A Wonderful Life_. He was decent, he was determined, and, most of all, he saw the best in people. We had hoped that our Bailey would be as kind and loyal as the fictional George Bailey — and that he would also stand up to Big Bank executives just like his namesake, but we know that dogs can only do so much. And when I think about George Bailey’s big-hearted grit, I think about all the Americans who dig deep every day to take care of the people they love — even lassoing the moon — and to strengthen their communities. I’m grateful for them — and I’m grateful for you. Thank you for channeling your inner George Bailey. That’s what this team is all about. Bruce, Bailey, and I are wishing you and your loved ones a happy, healthy, wonderful holiday season full of your favorite movies and favorite people. |
---

Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

---
| | | |
---

Take the DOGE Survey today | | | | Friend, President Trump has selected Vivek Ramaswmany and Elon Musk to lead the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE). This is an exciting development, and there's a lot of work to be done to cut the waste. But what should be on the chopping block first? "Complete the Official DOGE Survey and let House Republican leadership know what should be first to go!" | | | "COMPLETE DOGE SURVEY" DEPARTMENT OF GOVERNMENT EFFICIENCY (DOGE) SURVEY PATRIOT: Friend STATUS: INCOMPLETE | The American people put their trust in President Trump when they elected him in a LANDSLIDE victory. And he has pledged to cut wasteful spending and reform the government into a lean, mean, patriotic machine. The American people have FULL faith that Elon and Vivek will deliver. "But House Republicans need your help- which government program should DOGE cut? name: Jim Jordan
subject: Just 1 SEAT?!
body:
Our new majority is on the brink.
| [](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=6fe12c1c9cd944788e2f209e8a5d00a7&_e=ACoXBY7Kc4jQ_I6kpj3O6cd9PsCVPrw83Azz7AvfkwzwRRAIYCdgsv7T_Ax8cZ2ZoBQMd1oBq6OitQv4eLtgF6UaccW5TI31bwzv1hY0H1ZAqZiP-hSnNhVg_--wDRZKaDdLkwDDNVNEVhjKj4lL9hU80zh5aOeFpigxmd1aH_418S4VGjjIrZ_b2FrS4gi4Oqn-FjorX55zdUhRqEJ1fSUb0r12i_fx1V2NfdnDEKGGDYHLxc4dhQipcEKA1faeHLvHrMizU8qkCovKjoC3-QXRUr6y6q7IOQKQGmcctb27BaxNG1SK4DR36nsA1KwAbWrj3VLnd3xBMOTSPk4Z5s0Mv8NCZBgicoMk92Kd0OkI7DrIWn9aPeKLPlVMAJ3gnMmJmOFxhulsbEaVJwhlIaSQm7O-ZhcsNYd86rqezO0%3D)
---
Peter,
---
Please don’t misunderstand...
---
I don’t want this email to come across as a message of doom and gloom.
---
_After all, no one can deny the sweeping mandate that President Trump and Republicans were just given by voters like YOU, sweeping the White House _AND_ both chambers of Congress. _
---
But we also must face a glaring reality:
---
**Very soon – with a number of special elections already on the books for 2025 – our new majority will be narrowed to just 1 SEAT.**
---
Yes, you read that right. _1 seat._
---
I know how hard you fought for this new majority, Peter. I’m right there with you...
---
**Over the course of the election, I transferred _$2.5 million_ from my own campaign to help counter Kamala’s plot to buy our House majority.**
---
And now that our new majority could be hanging on by a thread next year, I refuse to let those efforts go to waste.
---
That’s why I have no choice but to reach out before year’s end.
---
I’m asking **_2.5 million patriots_** to match my 2024 commitment with a contribution of ANY amount to help defend our NEW majority that will soon be cut down to just 1 SEAT.
---

name: Save Social Security via Our Revolution
subject: Stop Trump and Musk from slashing Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20730?t=1011?refcode=email-122424_v&akid=7432%2E5885482%2EcyEqHO ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Despite Trump’s campaign vows not to cut Social Security, the truth is
quickly coming out. Surprise! He lied.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20730?t=1061&akid=7432%2E5885482%2EcyEqHO ][IMG]

After Trump’s shadow VP Elon Musk met with top Republicans about cuts to
the federal budget, they left the meeting saying everything is on the
table. Then, Fox News reported that Musk told lawmakers that no federal
program is safe, including Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid.

We’re NOT going to let it happen. When Republicans have floated threats to
cut Social Security in the past, massive public outcry has forced them to
change course. It’s going to be a bigger fight than ever this time, but
Our Revolution is ready to do it again.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20730?t=1057?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-122424nd&akid=7432%2E5885482%2EcyEqHO ]We are gearing up to launch a massive Save Social Security rapid response
team to activate the grassroots, deploy activists to DC, and lobby with
everything we’ve got to save the social safety net. But a fight this huge
is going to take massive resources – can you chip in to help save Social
Security?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20730?t=1042?express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-122424nd&akid=7432%2E5885482%2EcyEqHO ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20730?t=1043?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-122424nd&akid=7432%2E5885482%2EcyEqHO ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20730?t=1045?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-122424nd&akid=7432%2E5885482%2EcyEqHO ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20730?t=1046?express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-122424nd&akid=7432%2E5885482%2EcyEqHO ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20730?t=1047?express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-122424nd&akid=7432%2E5885482%2EcyEqHO ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20730?t=1048?&amount=9&refcode=email-122424nd&akid=7432%2E5885482%2EcyEqHO ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Staffing levels at the Social Security Administration have fallen to near
50-year lows, even as the number of beneficiaries soars to record highs.
And it could get even worse. Republicans’ proposed budget bill would slash
$401 million from SSA’s current operating levels – the equivalent of
closing all field offices and shutting down its helpline for about four
weeks.

40% of older Americans rely on Social Security for their entire retirement
income. Forcing people to face delays in applying for benefits or getting
problems resolved because of staffing shortages is UNACCEPTABLE.

But that’s only the beginning of the threats Social Security will face
with Trump and Musk looking to slash anything they can, all while passing
massive tax cuts for the rich and privatizing the government to line
billionaires’ pockets.

Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene, of all people, has been tasked with
helping Elon Musk with government cuts — and she’s made it abundantly
clear how she feels:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20730?t=1060&akid=7432%2E5885482%2EcyEqHO ]MTG threw out promises

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20730?t=1054?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-122424nd&akid=7432%2E5885482%2EcyEqHO ]This is going to be the fight of our lives to save Social Security. And we
are not going to win this fight without MASSIVE mobilization. Our
Revolution is ready to go all in to protect Social Security from Trump and
Musk’s efforts to destroy it – but we can’t do it without your support.
Can you chip in to save Social Security?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=7432%2E5885482%2EcyEqHO ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=7432%2E5885482%2EcyEqHO ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=7432%2E5885482%2EcyEqHO ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=7432%2E5885482%2EcyEqHO ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=7432%2E5885482%2EcyEqHO ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=7432%2E5885482%2EcyEqHO ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13135?t=1007&akid=7432%2E5885482%2EcyEqHO ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13135?t=1008&akid=7432%2E5885482%2EcyEqHO ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13136?t=1009&akid=7432%2E5885482%2EcyEqHO ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13139?t=1010&akid=7432%2E5885482%2EcyEqHO ]GIVE ONCE

http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=7432%2E5885482%2EcyEqHO

name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: Throwback 📸
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
Hey Peter, I don’t want to keep you long, but I wanted to share this throwback before I close my computer for the holidays: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99225376/519252520/-988752728?refcode=AU_YA_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20241224_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDcyZDE0My0yOWMyLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M8cauSrC89r5r9u5mKsK5OEsjYPRnQnj22x6mUxldpg=) Yes, that’s me and my brother Darius, circa 2002 (ish). I love, love, love Christmas, and usually as a kid I’d spend the holidays making home movies with my brother. This time of year is a stark reminder of who I’m fighting for every single day. I represent the people of Arizona’s 3rd — people who’ve immigrated in search of a better life, everyday working families, and the next generation of leaders working to build a better future for all of us. In less than a month, I’ll be sworn into the 119th Congress and as the Democratic Freshman Class President for the next Congress. I promise that I’ll fight for an agenda that uplifts the middle class, protects abortion rights, and is bold and ambitious in addressing the climate crisis. I hope that you and your loved ones have a happy and safe holiday season, Peter. I’ll be taking a few days off to fully rest and recharge with my family, before the real work begins in January. Warmly, — Yassamin Ansari
Congresswoman-elect, Arizona's 3rd District

* * *
Yassamin Ansari for Congress
PO Box 13524
Phoenix, AZ 85002
United States ****[yassaminforcongress.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99225381/519252530/1625509068?refcode=AU_YA_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20241224_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDcyZDE0My0yOWMyLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M8cauSrC89r5r9u5mKsK5OEsjYPRnQnj22x6mUxldpg=&emci=4972d143-29c2-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=5072d143-29c2-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=45157234) ** | [info@yassaminforcongress.com](mailto:info@yassaminforcongress.com)** | **Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress.**

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: Happy holidays, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
Dear friend ,
Happy holidays! Before many of us log off to celebrate with our families, I wanted to personally thank you for everything you have done and your support this year.
As I reflect on 2024, I am so proud of what we did. Together, we reached millions of Floridians and helped make their stories known. I still believe in a brighter future for our home, and I believe that this campaign was a step in that direction.
Watching thousands of people rally behind our movement was the honor of a lifetime. Your hope for Florida and our country inspires me. And whatever 2025 brings, I am glad that I got to spend so much of 2024 with you, friend.
I hope your holidays are filled with loved ones and laughter, and lots of good food. Thank you for all that you did this year, and I will see you in the new year!
My warmest regards ,
Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
Paid for by Debbie for Florida.
Debbie for Florida
PO Box 432250
South Miami, FL 33243
United States

Peter – Pennsylvania elections are rotten to their core... and we won PA anyway.****
**But my fight isn’t over.**

[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=f0a8d2aa42244ec0b3574099477db1fb&_e=w0CS3Vn2eiY9fjbrQdHhcuJjKeufZheRJDIOsNONsbQ9o4Gl8Hjhrd04JcwTgirdh7CnzUP61FFfQUyhhyGOXfijaxSCsZkK_KqOOXa9TZtAd5Q_52qgdEzCcv5BJittvlI-1mus1MydTf1YOxwqL4Guy4-F5V-CBDunY8ceatAwf6VKHCYMJRcc-O4cN3hIGF5YiA0LUpJjd011PmBc3vXTc-YhZUWcB1fhacPl6cd0xbGuLHvCYOyZIPAvcrqKDzSxY3rMQlbFwrq22X2nHdiQ-5MzNcmPdWZHim9L8Zj9nOHLiZUAIock91I13wdf5B6oh1hEP9o5EesXVt3_6qMqUybHYo5tXBb3f65nsW6B2gdcA6iBI86kLK90fp9L)
The actions of corrupt Democrat officials like **Bucks County Commissioner Diane Marseglia** and **left-wing activists like Marc Elias** prove that our work is just beginning.****
**I’ll never stop until we fully secure the integrity of our elections in Pennsylvania and every state in the union.**

With your help, I proved that Early Vote Action was an unstoppable grassroots force, and I’m gonna prove it again.

We’ve got an unprecedented opportunity to drive out corruption where it lives.

Just recently, I told corrupt Diane Marseglia that we’re going to take her seat... **_and they haven’t stopped coming after me since._**

The election is over, but the real work begins now... **_I’m not backing down, but I need_**** __your help__****.****____**
**__[Will you help me continue to fight for election integrity and take our country back](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=f0a8d2aa42244ec0b3574099477db1fb&_e=w0CS3Vn2eiY9fjbrQdHhcuJjKeufZheRJDIOsNONsbQ9o4Gl8Hjhrd04JcwTgirdh7CnzUP61FFfQUyhhyGOXfijaxSCsZkK_KqOOXa9TZtAd5Q_52qgdEzCcv5BJittvlI-1mus1MydTf1YOxwqL4Guy4-F5V-CBDunY8ceatAwf6VKHCYMJRcc-O4cN3hIGF5YiA0LUpJjd011PmBc3i1qKXqoZk_4rywcypbNQHpqfMX222gnRV5BYUMHTZgrxw_9JuGidHs6mRmleLvpP_0w2oJ48zE5tVjXbzsW-UsUPvi0lMVDCaxkeZOKNI0JmmrKPAyxflq4DF-f0xpanH4ZFLHVc-JL3_sM3QrLi-EHx2RDzy-3h7vs_TWKfU-z)_?_**

_God bless you,_
Scott Presler

body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99226268/519256014/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmE4MjRhNi0zMWMyLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mcoTp1xLBH8cdNHH1SmDiQmvRmdOuf2hcgumM9nn9fM=&emci=12d303ba-8bc1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=e2a824a6-31c2-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=9818364)

| | As this year comes to an end, I'm reflecting on how the work we do for a stronger, fairer, more equal country built on our shared values is never done. Sometimes we see great victories, and other times we experience setbacks. But no matter, we carry on – because **the promise of tomorrow**** _always_****matters.** None of our ongoing work is possible without your support of our grassroots movement. I am so grateful for all you've done and continue to do. So no matter where this holiday season finds you, I hope it brings you much light, happiness, and good memories — as well as promising signs for the year ahead! From all of us in the Wyden family: Happy holidays! _Ron_ |
---|---|---

| | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate.

name: Labin Duke
subject: Share the Spirit of Christmas with Hillsdale
body:
Make Your Christmas Brighter with Hillsdale College

_**A message from our sponsor...**_

| | | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5044ccae1bbb417489b5d53d7fd2ceed&_e=uDQhBsnZegb-jACNGk2RZdqRe2WMmzweOeX36uRdQFiFexg5q6iaHZYK2sUWPR44_53Ijx4OmNkgWsRIMYi3C5vcYoaXlDo3eU_TTqeVz_9kfVzt7QbtYlwgWorNZpwUTJlszisddvx0wJ_cNWbvcHjv1gl_sTYusg58j14yIXCInIX-Nj8LSM0DECvwWy3HaL7pcJsiEVHvQa5c8Dg4KzAhKCBMdUCFbb7t8WH_G_YtM4hxcN4xpVdbQL5_XCfnDJOlYOaMcVjwuVZjl1sGRj3MZJwBeenj9z6nKoeTxGdE6iI3fEs_aE9XkQ8vWm1dSYpX_97kF2YnBjEHrMv5yyIy6dJ_MNpPsf5cs-iVtF_YoQjVIxAUA33PWPuMlhyWN-2xNKsRsDbMjE1BNCT_tK0-e4H10gcOos4f6MuGeVg%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

This season is a time of reflection, faith, and generosity--a reminder to us all of the true meaning of Christmas.

This year, I invite you to share this message by supporting Hillsdale College's educational mission on behalf of liberty.

**For your tax-deductible gift of $50 or more, we 'll send you a limited-edition Hillsdale College Christmas ornament.** This beautiful ornament is a meaningful keepsake to hang on your tree and a symbol of our gratitude for your support.

Your generosity will help Hillsdale College continue to reach millions across the country through our free educational resources, publications, and programs--all without accepting any--NOT. ONE. PENNY.--of government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans.

**You can reserve your ornament here:[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-ornament](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5044ccae1bbb417489b5d53d7fd2ceed&_e=uDQhBsnZegb-jACNGk2RZdqRe2WMmzweOeX36uRdQFiFexg5q6iaHZYK2sUWPR44_53Ijx4OmNkgWsRIMYi3C5vcYoaXlDo3eU_TTqeVz_9kfVzt7QbtYlwgWorNZpwUTJlszisddvx0wJ_cNWbvcHjv1gl_sTYusg58j14yIXCInIX-Nj8LSM0DECvwWy3HaL7pcJsiEVHvQa5c8Dg4KzAhKCBMdUCFbb7t8WH_G_YtM4hxcN4xpVdbQL5_XCfn95e49k1LOrwMjCDOZnDyd3kCCaLmWx6O_BVjRjKDviQIijEGdmN610DgRgxe8U2bkhkpWV3272-bL5PBtOCyvgUFPR4MBBChjOAbFOcnZDlOCRKOeHxLEZwi_OKCaScRgqe8ZY1f4-0CsJ6TJMOQbh3Hl8ROdJe5tWwwW9n0PGQ%3D)**

Supplies are limited, so don't wait to make your year-end gift! Together, we can celebrate Christmas while ensuring liberty endures for generations to come.

Warm regards,

Labin Duke, Th.M.
Associate Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
[

Unsubscribe](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=5044ccae1bbb417489b5d53d7fd2ceed&_t=PBbMqZhff0j6YoZGVMvYwqFZJS5mm2HPoFuc9x2mOZm7ZugyDiA8FcqP8vMoHypSsDtllzNoOC0LpyAC7C6BQjXyv_3rW_WYOhosEBUr27sq1qVAXdTNxeVcdakOwaux)

subject: My hope for you this holiday season
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=JnBjHiNAjB7D0uBSLDpiXjwP8yYxMAMpbeWcfBmmREvJ9yYb2B3Nm5ydoSf2k2gMFjxrEavqZZ8UD%2FmcMF77l7JliUCPSTWbMijDeYxjTRGhbpFEwA1DFQoacUEhgn9PPKEKis4vcGwt2%2BfqFTyxmaE9L0aCJfOBXCcJUUV%2FAa5bmrYypyQS3F0R9g4KTOjLqbM1iunU6sMc4jCG7IPjiZ6utTsPwd3mTedzDgWRHq4LedlzCB8cDCOky%2Bp%2BQLSMcsGcQNn%2F98Ta0Zf9e4Wfl4eHWV244AHO9fGWtPTWu8peNUKbMJUSdX%2B9%2B0SV6Dgs4U1qRhE23yS92akR402tNFD6Xrj%2B3QxRHjXQGnmzKa2gKemfzS1vTGauOYZfjgw9eTcypdAaIUbgSdFn28p4fU0vqDkBqeoTaymhS36zXf69j4d2JmC0ABNQCQGTo1g5]

# [#]
I wanted to reach out personally and wish you happy holidays from myself and all of us here at Team Ruiz.

Around this time, I find it important to take stock of all the progress we’ve made throughout the past year and the hard work we’ve done.

Though the Presidential election didn’t turn out how we’d hoped, the victory you all delivered for us here in CA-25 will help Democrats build a blue firewall in the face of a Republican trifecta — and for that, I couldn’t be more grateful.

I hope you take this time to rest, reflect, and enjoy holiday traditions with loved ones like I am. I appreciate your hard work and support throughout 2024, and I’m ready to get back to work for our communities in 2025.

From my family to yours, happy holidays!

Sincerely,
Raul

# [#]
https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/ [https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/] https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz [https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz] https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz [https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]
The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress and to flip the House blue this November.

---

President-elect Donald Trump **[invited an unexpected guest on stage](https://substack.com/redirect/407f8e11-6131-429a-a4bd-eacb6562a6ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during his speech at TPUSA's AmericaFest2024, an Angel Mom; a parent of a child killed by an illegal immigrant.
**[Watch what she does when Trump gives her the microphone](https://substack.com/redirect/407f8e11-6131-429a-a4bd-eacb6562a6ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , you don't want to miss this!
[](https://substack.com/redirect/407f8e11-6131-429a-a4bd-eacb6562a6ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/407f8e11-6131-429a-a4bd-eacb6562a6ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Angel Mom Patty Morin lost her daughter, Rachel, who was **[reportedly killed](https://substack.com/redirect/ef36dbb3-4317-40d3-8989-be8639a4708a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** by an illegal immigrant in August 2023.
Trump explained **[he was financially helping Morin pay for a procedure](https://substack.com/redirect/407f8e11-6131-429a-a4bd-eacb6562a6ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to fix her eyesight, which she clarified would happen in January.
"She suffered, she suffered greatly," Trump told the crowd. "I said let me help you with your eyes. She has an eye situation which can be fixed with some medial help."
Morin spoke highly of Trump during her short and very emotional speech. "I think of you as a friend," she told the President-elect.
Trump moved in **[to comfort the weeping mother with a hug](https://substack.com/redirect/407f8e11-6131-429a-a4bd-eacb6562a6ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in a touching moment.
* * *
# **Jim Jordan DESTROYS hysterical Democrat who tries to shame him in front of congress**
Rep. Jim Jordan UNLOADED on the FBI's political targeting of "pro-family catholics" and conservatives **[until he was interrupted by his Democrat colleague](https://substack.com/redirect/77b17835-10cf-453b-a9fc-2d8f53b9a387?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , then the gloves came off!
"I think it's very clear you support defunding the FBI!" the democrat rep accused Jordan.
"Absolutely NOT!!" Jordan fired back. "I bet you have catholics in your district who want you to look into this!"
**[Watch him put her in her place:](https://substack.com/redirect/77b17835-10cf-453b-a9fc-2d8f53b9a387?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/77b17835-10cf-453b-a9fc-2d8f53b9a387?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Glenn Grothman
subject: Merry Christmas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Glenn Grothman for Congress
body:
| | |
---
| | I want to wish you and your family a very Merry Christmas! As I spend time exchanging gifts with the ones I love, I am reminded of **Matthew 7** , which reflects on the joy of giving: _"If ye then, being evil, know how to give good gifts unto your children, how much more shall your Father which is in heaven give good things to them that ask him?" _ This Christmas season, I hope you're surrounded by the love of family and friends and you take the time to remember God's greatest gift, which is what the Christmas season is all about. _"Glory to God in the highest, and on earth peace, good will toward men." \- Luke 2:14_ I wish you and your loved ones a wonderful Christmas full of peace and joy! **Glenn Grothman **
---
|

only open for a few more hours!
| **Tomorrow is the Bidens’ LAST Christmas in the White House!**

_We don’t want you to miss this opportunity to send the President and First Lady well wishes — so we’re giving you ONE LAST CHANCE to sign our card!_

[**⇩ ADD YOUR NAME TO SIGN THE HOLIDAY CARD NOW ⇩**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/biden_family_card/?source=VPP_20241224_EMCARD_E2_T0_AC&t=6&akid=18341%2E878179%2EnVEDI0) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/biden_family_card/?source=VPP_20241224_EMCARD_E2_T0_AC&t=7&akid=18341%2E878179%2EnVEDI0) | [ADD YOUR NAME: SIGN OUR HOLIDAY CARD TO THE BIDEN FAMILY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/biden_family_card/?source=VPP_20241224_EMCARD_E2_T0_AC&t=8&akid=18341%2E878179%2EnVEDI0)

President Biden has been such an incredible leader for our country. The least we can do is make his last Christmas in the White House the best one yet!

Thank you,

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18341%2E878179%2EnVEDI0). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18341%2E878179%2EnVEDI0).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18341%2E878179%2EnVEDI0) to request fewer emails. body:

| |

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Merry Christmas
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
I didn’t grow up with much, and I know that none of this was guaranteed. Without you and your support, none of it would be possible.
#

[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/team_gallego_christmas_2025/?refcode=em241224-1-120&refcode2=3618.734936.c4Ee9v&akid=3618%2E734936%2Ec4Ee9v)
---
Peter —
About two years ago, as we were settling into the holiday season, I was in the middle of making one of the most important decisions of my life.
And now, in just a few weeks, I’ll be sworn in as Arizona’s first Latino U.S. Senator. Together, we made history.
I didn’t grow up with much, and I know that none of this was guaranteed. Without you and your support I would not be here today.
So, as you gather with your loved ones for the holidays, I wanted to make sure I sent you a quick note to tell you how grateful I am for your help.
It meant the world to me. Really.
Merry Christmas, and happy holidays to you and yours.
Ruben
[SIGN THE TEAM GALLEGO CHRISTMAS CARD](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/team_gallego_christmas_2025/?akid=3618%2E734936%2Ec4Ee9v)

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=1&akid=3618%2E734936%2Ec4Ee9v). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=3618%2E734936%2Ec4Ee9v). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=3&refcode2=3618_734936_c4Ee9v&akid=3618%2E734936%2Ec4Ee9v)

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: This Christmas season...
body:
| | |
---
| | Peter, As 2024 winds down and we celebrate this Christmas season, embracing the spirit of giving, gratitude, and love, I want to thank you again for all you have done for me this year. I hope as you celebrate this Christmas, you and your family stay safe, warm and you get a chance to feel the miracle of the season. Have a blessed Christmas, **Scott Fitzgerald**
---

name: Dan Carr
subject: Merry Christmas
body:
Jesus is the reason for the season

| |
---|---|---
|
# Merry Christmas
### Jesus is the reason for the season
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@dancarr2014)
---
| Dec 24
---
| [](https://substack.com/@dancarr2014)
---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/86ddd945-1bb4-4074-bffe-1552b55da55f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As the Christmas season envelops our nation, it is essential to pause and reflect on the true meaning of Christmas. While twinkling lights, cheerful carols, and beautifully wrapped gifts fill our homes and streets, the heart of this holiday lies in an extraordinary event over 2,000 years ago--the birth of Jesus Christ.
[CLICK HERE TO FINISH READING:](https://substack.com/redirect/ec8901b5-0822-4236-84b2-98ba30710eef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

body:
| | After the tough fights we’ve won this year, we can enjoy the holidays knowing we won the battle to keep extremism out of WA-03. I’ve been right back to work on behalf of working families in Southwest Washington and look forward to reconnecting soon in the New Year.

Until then, from my family to yours, happy holidays!

– Marie
