name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: You are one of TEN patriots selected!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I need your feedback, Peter

|
---
| | |
Peter -

This is Speaker Mike Johnson

The 2024 Election has come and gone, and we have a plethora of Republican warriors, from President Trump on down to our House Majority, who will fight for our shared conservative values. As the year comes to a close, I need to hear your opinion on our platform.

You were one of TEN conservative patriots from your area chosen to take this audit.

Please view our audit below and consider leaving your feedback.

---
| |
---
|
---
**OFFICIAL AUDIT**
_Please submit before midnight._
---
Peter,

Conservative Leaders urgently need your help to shape their agenda heading into 2025.

Joe Biden and his radical administration have been a complete and total DISASTER for the American people. From record inflation to out-of-control crime to deadly drugs crossing our border, one thing is clear -- The Democrats have failed the American people.

**We are reaching out to ONLY 10 Top Republicans in every zip code and asking them to take this Platform Audit.** Congrats, you have been selected to represent your area! That's impressive. Don't let this opportunity go to waste.

**[It is essential that we have 100% participation from every zip code to make sure our results are correct. As the year comes to a close, I need to hear your opinion on our platform. You were one of TEN conservative patriots from your area chosen to take this audit. Please view our audit below and consider leaving your feedback. | | | OFFICIAL AUDIT Please submit before midnight. Peter, Conservative Leaders urgently need your help to shape their agenda heading into 2025. Joe Biden and his radical administration have been a complete and total DISASTER for the American people. From record inflation to out-of-control crime to deadly drugs crossing our border, one thing is clear -- The Democrats have failed the American people. We are reaching out to ONLY 10 Top Republicans in every zip code and asking them to take this Platform Audit. Congrats, you have been selected to represent your area! That's impressive. Don't let this opportunity go to waste. "It is essential that we have 100% participation from every zip code to make sure our results are correct. Team -- The Obamas have been a force for good in our country for _years_ , leading with dignity and grace to improve the lives of all Americans. **Now that the holidays are here, it's the perfect time to send our well wishes and gratitude for all they've done.**

We're organizing a special card from Democrats _across the country_ to thank them for their continued service. To send the card, we need _100,000 signatures before midnight_ \-- **but as of 5:00 PM ET,_we're tracking behind on responses in Pennsylvania!_**

**From:[_dpwillis67@gmail.com_](http://go.dscc.org/go/20814?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241224-SignTheCard-ObamasHoliday24RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241224-SignTheCard-ObamasHoliday24RF-Pros-sl1&akid=19201%2E9716520%2E60rhxW)**
---
**To: President and Mrs. Obama**
**Signature: Missing!**

**[Before 11:59 PM TONIGHT: Sign the card to the Obamas and wish them a happy holiday season!](http://go.dscc.org/go/20814?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241224-SignTheCard-ObamasHoliday24RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241224-SignTheCard-ObamasHoliday24RF-Pros-sl1&akid=19201%2E9716520%2E60rhxW)**
| [SIGN THE CARD](http://go.dscc.org/go/20814?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241224-SignTheCard-ObamasHoliday24RF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241224-SignTheCard-ObamasHoliday24RF-Pros-sl1&akid=19201%2E9716520%2E60rhxW)

The clock is ticking. Only hours remain before Christmas, and we're at risk of falling short of our goal to deliver 3,000 Christmas meals to deployed service members who can't be with their loved ones this holiday season.
**Thanks to The Coca-Cola ® Company, every gift is still being matched, dollar for dollar, up to a total of $50,000 -- but we can't meet this critical goal without YOUR support.**
**[Please, will you rush $37.50 or more to help deliver a taste of home to deployed service members all over the world and make sure our military heroes aren't forgotten this holiday season and into the new year?](https://links.e.uso.)**
